name: MGP
subject: We can do it
body:
| | Peter, our April deadline is just hours away, so I wanted to reach out one last time to ask:

Will you chip in just a few dollars to help us reach our $25,000 fundraising goal?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/april](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106853077/542821666/2110417860?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_WL_250430_3_5&refcode2=d786c43d-1f26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzg2YzQzZC0xZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGgedMBX4cc1636B26nnbQ9Lbqg4N7ZrVt6ISRXbtHQ=)

As I’ve always aimed to do in Congress, I’ve been doing a lot less talking and a lot more listening. In the first few months of the new session, I’ve held town halls across the district to hear directly from constituents about what’s most important.

I’m hearing from families who don’t care about petty political fights in the other Washington – they care about being able to afford groceries and health care, having schools that work, and streets that are safe.

I’m putting their concerns front and center in Congress, even when that means making tough decisions. But, I need your help to keep up this work.

Are you with me?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/april](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106853079/542821668/2110417860?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_WL_250430_3_5&refcode2=d786c43d-1f26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzg2YzQzZC0xZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGgedMBX4cc1636B26nnbQ9Lbqg4N7ZrVt6ISRXbtHQ=)

Thank you so much!

Marie

---
|
* * *
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106853082/542821670/-1644157728?amount=25&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_WL_250430_3_5&refcode2=d786c43d-1f26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzg2YzQzZC0xZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGgedMBX4cc1636B26nnbQ9Lbqg4N7ZrVt6ISRXbtHQ=)

subject: Tell Jamie Raskin thank you before it’s too late!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
You have been personally selected, Peter >>

|

**→ FIRST:** Elon Musk gutted federal agencies, fired thousands, and gained access to Americans’ confidential Social Security data — **all without being elected to a single office.**

**→ THEN:** Jamie Raskin introduced the** “Nobody Elected Elon Musk” **to hold him accountable for his unconstitutional attacks on democracy! **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853086/542821706/-609596625?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250430_EMLTR_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81WNx6Igq4YrZ5uk1Yfvlf9zeoer0HIDPSZWVliGNA0=)****→ NOW:** They’re _**ruthlessly attacking him**_ to try to silence him and stop him from passing this critical bill!

[We’re sending a “Thank You” letter to Jamie Raskin at 9:00am tomorrow morning and we need your name on it to show he’s got the American people’s support behind him](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853087/542821707/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250430_EMLTR_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81WNx6Igq4YrZ5uk1Yfvlf9zeoer0HIDPSZWVliGNA0=) | [50 SPOTS LEFT FOR Cresco DEMOCRATS: SIGN THE “THANK YOU” JAMIE RASKIN LETTER NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853088/542821708/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250430_EMLTR_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81WNx6Igq4YrZ5uk1Yfvlf9zeoer0HIDPSZWVliGNA0=)

**TO: Jamie Raskin
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: The American people are on your side!** Dear Rep. Jamie Raskin,

Thank you for standing up against MAGA oligarchs Donald Trump and Elon Musk!

**Like so many Americans, I’m OUTRAGED by their attacks on the Constitution** — from gutting federal agencies to violating our privacy!

They must be held responsible, **that’s why I’m so grateful that you’re taking a stand by championing the “Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act.”**

As they try to silence you, please know that thousands of Americans – _including myself_ – have your back and stand with you against the MAGA regime!

[That’s why I’m chipping in $7 today to show my support for this bill and so we can keep electing amazing Democrats like you to defeat the MAGA oligarchy! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853090/542821710/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250430_EMLTR_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81WNx6Igq4YrZ5uk1Yfvlf9zeoer0HIDPSZWVliGNA0=) | [50 SPOTS LEFT FOR Cresco DEMOCRATS: SIGN THE “THANK YOU” JAMIE RASKIN LETTER NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853092/542821712/-609596625?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250430_EMLTR_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81WNx6Igq4YrZ5uk1Yfvlf9zeoer0HIDPSZWVliGNA0=)

name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: Re: The message from Attorney General Holder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Peter, did you see this note from A.G. Holder?
He lays out threats we’re facing to our democracy — from the attempted election theft in North Carolina to a voter suppression bill working its way through Congress — and how the All On The Line campaign is fighting back.
**Your support helps make this work possible, and we still need to hit our April fundraising goal by midnight as we continue mapping out plans for the year ahead. The funds we raise will make a powerful statement about the strength of our movement.**
About the power of a grassroots team. About the progress we can make when each of us gets into the fight.
**[Make a donation to All on the Line to power the fight for fair elections with fair maps, and help protect our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853175/542822457/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOMLift_email_20250430-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250430-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift_&utm_campaign=AGEOMLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5ODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=go9j8mjvzn8opUF7W9NfDpmHB71jWiFzxAmBBb_izfo=)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
Date: Fri, Apr 28, 2025
Subject: An outright attempt to steal an election
Team, democracy is under attack in North Carolina.
The failed candidate in last November’s state supreme court race has sued to try to throw out enough legally valid ballots to overturn his loss. And a new ruling greenlights his request to disenfranchise military personnel and overseas citizens.
**Let's be clear: This decision abandons the judiciary’s most basic role, to protect the rights of the people, and sanctions an outright attempt to steal an election.**
This alarming development is a stark, present-day example of what we've seen throughout our nation’s history: far-right leaders going to extraordinary lengths to bypass democratic principles — _all in their relentless pursuit of power._
Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard.
**But team, we are not powerless observers.** Our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And when we work together, we can make it happen.
**[That’s why today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to All On The Line to power the movement for fair maps in the months and years ahead.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853183/542822466/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOMLift_email_20250430-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250430-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift_&utm_campaign=AGEOMLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5ODZjNDNkLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=go9j8mjvzn8opUF7W9NfDpmHB71jWiFzxAmBBb_izfo=)**

Students have always been the trailblazers for political change and social justice, sparking movements and inspiring others. Yet, some of these passionate change-makers can’t vote! _How can we anticipate a brighter future when their voices are muted?_ Let’s reimagine a country where young voices shape the future—a world where 16 and 17-year-olds can vote in local elections. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qWiuQhewtBjemi5m78jm_JucPQ1g5FOez_p8eQBaUxUTFa5HXPSivrT8lsiJ6kZINY4OtzZ3Vxy5y9HoVYYS-wJ7Z1mKhukIMMWLH-HqN8nufo0UG7Ohc-ZT39duaijzXS5__jCYB5PfMqZwb2Xjglt2VPsHDJyYdt95Xqrd2UaAMTORbUyIc-a0yb5R8ySmPktTJm9AdhU81qzFeryQVcDF12jJJPBQ8EzcL_rLkk2dM-cCXz4gLWoMkvPWSi14mCFjDW4Uuww6uMHGFfTF94O3OfMAJIWzJVI7I9pldRyKlLdh__RTcPZueHD-Gu1NLaV0Ar70AQoga02uwcuYVHRXkLoXTV5xDhgC_AhsY5XTKRPcDBQ-0ZbqMy0M_3Gk0ctITdN6DKZUipdmwJy7-0vDabJPfa8lshGBbklznnrk-TRAvpXP_z7-BQJh-AjTKK13OXUpfKOWa39Js5mfvuyT8l_BeRnCiimaznbWCY7-CUM-UyFp7-8v4Gt79cLb2v/4g4/ZHsYxuznQXKFooyWV-YdiQ/h0/h001.xMmqRbpqQTHz7vhMPv96BYx_zLIi_iddckrVfJTWMak)
**At Local Democracy Project, we believe empowering young people is key to a vibrant democracy, and we’re on a mission to make this happen.** **[Let’s give our future leaders the voice they deserve! Sign on to support the youth vote in local elections!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qWiuQhewtBjemi5m78jm_JucPQ1g5FOez_p8eQBaUxUTFa5HXPSivrT8lsiJ6kZINY4OtzZ3Vxy5y9HoVYYS-wJ7Z1mKhukIMMWLH-HqN8nufo0UG7Ohc-ZT39duaijzXS5__jCYB5PfMqZwb2Xjglt2VPsHDJyYdt95Xqrd2UaAMTORbUyIc-a0yb5R8ySmPktTJm9AdhU81qzFeryQVcDF12jJJPBQ8EzcL_rLkk2dOgn66otSzRfvdjFynlPRQkZaIhwgJtkD2TIpVqjfiPjFW-WiyLW2qydjaofKwy1VBZHuSpAcZ9rrJs_rfRcL_dHKtgn6MqQSqpstkho3maCQWz8tvDTOdNSfUG60HQAERiOFn1AKoJuEwi7o9HqbPDpNOo1HBnqArUS2u8uX56Lu5sgNWY5Z3IAs34an1XTWNhUyVTVuxN9jGy_XL8vrWzZUiNyRvLDLoun3nUZAeI6ypajZG60ylEiE1XbzTv0y9f1PjSbpft-zPwtc5zhdiw/4g4/ZHsYxuznQXKFooyWV-YdiQ/h1/h001.z5SaXWxvx9Ae9aAoqqv9nDHN94Ol9zm-TSxEi_Y1wMg)** [SIGN ON
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qWiuQhewtBjemi5m78jm_JucPQ1g5FOez_p8eQBaUxUTFa5HXPSivrT8lsiJ6kZINY4OtzZ3Vxy5y9HoVYYS-wJ7Z1mKhukIMMWLH-HqN8nufo0UG7Ohc-ZT39duaijzXS5__jCYB5PfMqZwb2Xjglt2VPsHDJyYdt95Xqrd2UaAMTORbUyIc-a0yb5R8ySmPktTJm9AdhU81qzFeryQVcDF12jJJPBQ8EzcL_rLkk2dOygAsrqUsZE9uxOpc7s7qMPkqP-u_98hr3JsqvFG40fMbDFjHfgjdank2OlORw_f7be1jW-_dG2NMdJ4LFMJlNmXGRnPi0Xm5FmzRMk51ul0UhNgfuuGhnld2njr0TGJYWkFr6q5KbKWw3gEVyT3vROuxVibZdb6Grkbgaw2Ca_7noGxOPYqOTXzTeI6jL6tVvZE5jKTZ889-K-i0H5ZVQwMclykmNdVukSAiI75B5Yc4vHU_0qFNNH6s7-ch_n1FcWplcGdUyySH4LC1ITrS8/4g4/ZHsYxuznQXKFooyWV-YdiQ/h2/h001.lruyzcK6GcVLpzxHDlzjaM6l0yTbF1gTSOLIJTobTLw) Some local communities are considering giving students a seat at the table in school district elections. These teens are passionate about issues directly impacting their lives, from redistricting to budget allocations. Opponents argue teens can’t make informed decisions or that including them in elections is too costly. But let’s look at the facts: when Takoma Park, Maryland, lowered the voting age, student turnout in their local elections soared from 44% to 69% in just a few years! This isn’t just about numbers; it’s about engagement, empowerment, and ensuring every voice is heard. **Join us in advocating for young voters and expanding voting rights.** **[Add your name to our petition supporting voting rights for young people in our local elections.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qWiuQhewtBjemi5m78jm_JucPQ1g5FOez_p8eQBaUxUTFa5HXPSivrT8lsiJ6kZINY4OtzZ3Vxy5y9HoVYYS-wJ7Z1mKhukIMMWLH-HqN8nufo0UG7Ohc-ZT39duaijzXS5__jCYB5PfMqZwb2Xjglt2VPsHDJyYdt95Xqrd2UaAMTORbUyIc-a0yb5R8ySmPktTJm9AdhU81qzFeryQVcDF12jJJPBQ8EzcL_rLkk2dOMqDKLX5731iecg7AJyqbZ3LiizD05lESF7vjUOiQR7S4pFdy52x5BGGgJJRnbnYDILEiyCPpkdTX747p4SXuC6crltb0wHKq4od3tyvn4yYsVAAEH9rPmui-7zuc0uEnJvtICXSs6nUJsFxDImnOMAAC6Q13KkqcfrLl9QDe-R2hy6IKtKE1HuXG1sazsOHcfh_N93KbOvisZV_uHBvgh-gzrCTzW-cz8xpFEzpCY-nAK_Om23AZEf8CzXL5A5_xuv7_OPBLZI_XpzLABWOUe/4g4/ZHsYxuznQXKFooyWV-YdiQ/h3/h001.w4ZPs5IQj9cApQoIsHTGeaabtJJ0QI0KV3OPuVcb17o)** Thanks for your support.

The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | Back in January the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned last week to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. **[The threats are clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation. This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from _The Guardian_ : "_Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division._ " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. **Are we surprised? No.** But this action -- _though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years_ \-- highlights how badly **we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens** , from the outside of government. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106853253/542822660/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=Ack2dZ9F/WffcHATXbNiFtsGCxqlBRTYCnypf+RPG8nlgLd2P/Zq4YcBaji82h3kmA9uvMukciFWKOs79HjjmUV44bmGQsqDXF3qBoe2XQ8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NzA3YTYwLTFmMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k-3V-ZY75Z-OrOhu5Kkzci6OcCiqR4jYvOUi_25FqBs=&emci=03741ade-d325-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c8707a60-1f26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=33603084)**

| | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, **she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.** You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. clean_body: The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | Back in January the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned last week to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. | | | This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian : "Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years \-- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Derek Tran (personal)
subject: The most vulnerable Democrat in California.
body:
Here’s some news you may have missed this month:

_The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ all released their first House race ratings for 2026. The consensus? **CA-45 is a pure toss-up.**

There are a few reasons why I'm considered the most vulnerable House Democrat in California: We won this race by just 653 votes last year, and it ended up being one of the last called races in the entire country.

Flipping this district and unseating Michelle Steel was a huge deal -- not just for us, but for Orange County. And you can bet Republicans are already treating 2026 as their best shot to claw it back.

The bottom line is I'm the most at-risk I'll ever be. And if we're going to hold the line, we need to close out this month strong.

We're running a little short of our end-of-month goal, and we need a last-minute surge to make up ground. If you can, please use the personalized link below to chip in $3 today.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tranq22025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106853870/542826530/2039042026?refcode=em-4.30.25-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNkODc5MTQtMjAyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-07o_XfMKbVXPK7sr3Wa8p-dIrJpqLegE7zSMs6A1dI=)**

If we learned anything from my last campaign, it's that early resources can have a massive impact on shaping the battlefield. Strong early fundraising makes it harder for super PACs to justify flooding CA-45 with attack ads. It can even dissuade new opponents from jumping into the race.

This seat wasn’t handed to us. We fought for every single vote. Now, we have to fight to protect it. If you’re able, chip in whatever you can today. We’re relying on individual supporters - not special interests -- to keep this seat blue.

Here’s that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tranq22025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106853871/542826549/2039042026?refcode=em-4.30.25-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNkODc5MTQtMjAyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-07o_XfMKbVXPK7sr3Wa8p-dIrJpqLegE7zSMs6A1dI=)**

Thanks for standing with me.

-Derek

* * *
Derek Tran for Congress
10441 Stanford Avenue
#395
Garden Grove, CA 92842
United States

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/3I6agODchUmprbbV4lfW0Q2?unsubscribedata=h%2FLyDLG9N0Yo8gXWykyZ86gRAT2FhP5SVqvHxHZILI6rkOFkUzsCyjhN7PA6iIxE4yMTvAewMH9mOFBdBdor86JW3PqKjCfK0abfEVkOjEnoJ1dsgLTNasKjPovx53Iw2ZcZfCoxtXWIazU4qmtMYz8BJq%2BFBwA4NCLN7ChNWPi%2BDtxuP%2Bi4OxOpw%2B8HLbcCXV8lo7Kw2i9p27%2B6L75%2FDEFwRNwN7LPBX3F%2FRxtwqzG%2BlBY7otXlvSa0P%2B1EHDlEHa%2FL5WIqPYYkNTaRqJMGqrq7hb1Qf9P%2BfQNtslV2zdvKJSdvsAPK2M%2F0Gg4%2F%2BR7Lk3uRjVQmZBQ8meezAwNW7VqMz%2Fsd00x8QC0g1AQXeR1QgsCjfP8yg4M1LIVgVeA9dx2vSOe%2B6094uuFhp5B3xOUv%2FmkA%2B0VcNR%2BjCgEUOHW9l48MphwFVrG6hpZ4Fy58)

Here’s that link again: = Thanks for standing with me. -Derek * Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to

body:

Hey Peter,

Just two days ago, Donavan McKinney launched his primary campaign to take
on self-funded multimillionaire Rep. Shri Thanedar in Michigan’s 13th
district, and he faces his first critical fundraising deadline in just a
few hours!

and Justice Democrats right now?

Midnight marks the end of April, and every grassroots donation helps us go
toe to toe with a millionaire incumbent who can write himself another
check whenever he needs to.

contributions from corporate PACs. He's counting on this movement to have

the start it would be a battle between people power and big money, and we
need you with us.

Hi Peter – Patty here, with a simple question:
**With a remaining 37% gap to reach my $20,000 end-of-month goal tonight, is there anything I can say to convince you to[pitch in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854105/542829458/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk501-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjY0NDFhMS0yMDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=av51c-xb2GeLjeCU692gFixieuILQ6pq0bk5NbBjZFU=)**

name: Sarah
subject: seven sentences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Reaching out one last time.
#
I’m reaching out with one last reminder about tonight’s deadline. **We’re just a few hours away from midnight, and we’re still $2,100 short of our goal.**
Donald Trump and House Republicans are hellbent on pushing forward heartless policies and attacks on our freedoms. I’m working hard – inside and outside of Congress – to hold them accountable and fight for Delaware.
But that urgent work relies on grassroots donations. I’m counting on your help to close the gap.
[**If you can afford it, please pitch in $50, $10, or even $1 before midnight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-1953&amount=5&refcode2=1953_21716_jbT-4v&akid=1953%2E21716%2EjbT-4v)

Sarah McBride

name: Abigail
subject: what this campaign is all about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As we approach tonight’s deadline, I’ve been reflecting on why I decided to run for Governor—and I wanted to share a bit of that with you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854230/542833815/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-30_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBjYmFkZjEtMjEyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xfKyETKGAW7punfupN77s4uJulwiCz_xx-SMJi6RuY0=)
---
| Peter,

As we approach tonight’s deadline, I’ve been reflecting on why I decided to run for Governor—and I wanted to share a bit of that with you.

It wasn’t for a title or to check a box. I got into this race because I know how much better Virginia can be—for our kids, our neighbors, and our future.

From my time serving Virginia’s Seventh District in Congress, I’ve seen firsthand how much good we can do when we come together to solve problems and put people over politics. That’s the kind of leadership I believe in—and it’s the kind I’ll bring to the Governor’s office.

With the chaos and division coming out of Washington, Virginia needs steady, thoughtful leadership more than ever. Leadership that puts our communities first, that protects our rights, and that focuses on the issues that actually matter to families across the Commonwealth.

That’s what Virginians deserve and that’s what this campaign is all about. But with just hours left to reach our April fundraising goal, I’m counting on your support to keep us on track.

[_**If you’re able, please consider making a contribution to my campaign before midnight. Whether it's $5, $50, or more, every donation adds up, and it's how we can afford to reach voters all over the Commonwealth.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854231/542833816/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-30_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBjYmFkZjEtMjEyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xfKyETKGAW7punfupN77s4uJulwiCz_xx-SMJi6RuY0=)

subject: got a minute?

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=y1lemhGtD9gDN1SWkkoME0%2FJy%2BbD5i3dKjWgXtda38G1arJ8CZjh7xXbScpoMVnJFJut6J9erBZ92MO6WckjYqtJBDb%2FA1VS7MgW5fX4gAlfRaH4x0abQWAhUXvB0sg9WPIGHNEUqyml4vbbECLlBnyqgCBJV8EJcWAykPgwv4WNLwauG3bFRDKRkdj3gGlCbqCXQIBBB%2BFe4maTEtmaQnnUcoSL1caUdlYoF1G2V2%2FyOTb7PJZDnU%2Bw6k9uuR4Q0AvsFY12ru0CiE1r2BDed7ImTAKXYTdPDeYUxbVmuNglV2%2BX8m1mCfxJBJh1kWf96KEstfY%2B9%2FOJ53xdmtfMcs0UE438ia0xD0x%2Bn%2FstOHfWMEpImgMGNSj2aFc%2BoEo2WldB7xyIwyCcJsaWIdWFWoQzPjQ5ZDKqc6T6ewTjZgs%3D)
---
| | Gabe here — promise to be brief. Donald Trump is actively working to dismantle the Democratic Party in a desperate attempt to hold onto his Republican trifecta, meaning we need to work twice as hard to flip the House blue next year. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Anything makes a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=267%2E181023%2Ej2OlrF)
Hey there — It’s Jocelyn.
My campaign has a big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, **and I’m hoping you can chip in a few bucks to help us hit our goal. You can use this link to give:** [**secure.actblue.com/donate?jmb-em-q22025**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250430_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=267%2E181023%2Ej2OlrF)
The movement we’re building for this campaign is energizing.
I’ve met some incredible people across the state, fired up and ready to see real change made.
I’ve also met a lot of people who are scared and frustrated by the chaos coming from Washington. **Me too.**
But there’s power in us coming together, speaking out, and fighting back.
I saw it in 2016 at the Women’s March after President Trump was first elected. I saw it when I was first elected as Secretary of State of Michigan, just two years after the state went red, in a powerful blue wave. And I saw it a few weeks ago at the Hands Off Rallies across Michigan and beyond, where people rallied for our rights and freedoms.
**We have the power to make a difference.**
I’m glad to have your support, and I’m humbly asking you to **chip in a few dollars before my campaign’s midnight deadline. You can use this link:**[**secure.actblue.com/donate?jmb-em-q22025**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250430_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=267%2E181023%2Ej2OlrF)
Thanks again. We’re in this together.
— Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=267%2E181023%2Ej2OlrF)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

name: George Whitesides
subject: The last time I’ll ask Peter
body:
Peter,

I know you’ve heard a lot from me and my team recently – so I promise this is the last time I’ll ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854570/542840312/1606932672?refcode=em-4.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThmNDdiNS0yMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADF77-SCaG8GAETRzghOC8SsIc8ovBklqpC3Q8K69GY=)** ahead of tonight’s deadline.

But first, I need to take a step back:

Back in November of last year, our race went down to the wire. We were one of the only Democrats who flipped a red seat, and Republicans haven’t forgotten.

That’s a big reason why I’m already facing super PAC and national GOP attacks. We rose above the millions in outside spending in our last race, and the reality is we’ll have to do it once again if we’re going to keep this seat blue.

But as I look toward my first re-election campaign, I know things are going to be a lot different this time. I’m in Congress legislating instead of campaigning full time, which will make things difficult, but I refuse to back down from the fight.

The upcoming midterm elections will not only be consequential for CA-27, but for our democracy. **The path to flipping the House majority blue and holding this reckless administration accountable runs through this district.**

That’s why we need to start now. **[Your support has been crucial – can I count on your $3 tonight to stand with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854571/542840313/1606932672?refcode=em-4.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThmNDdiNS0yMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADF77-SCaG8GAETRzghOC8SsIc8ovBklqpC3Q8K69GY=)**

Thank you,

GW

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106854572/542840314/1606932672?refcode=em-4.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOThmNDdiNS0yMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADF77-SCaG8GAETRzghOC8SsIc8ovBklqpC3Q8K69GY=)****
---

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=IJRCq51zGCXIEplorlwIX1bsazhpKHwO4HHLcZvuJNQIzTLDOJdWQQ8lBbqHkgP0i5HaRihkDZXj8abYqzHOHyboLCrSkQ24HNwzvfwKEv%2Bq%2FyLvLZZfE8lagWslw9bUgawDPxgGcE9li2qYGvjC%2F4zGkTkClWit92POj1nVmWuuLpIKww9dIuRvONR3Zd4PETOi7YUdewFoVcFjHGL%2F4q%2BOlSaS7vHUziL2Zyu5qT1Kk5JID7BaJF6XuKK8L%2FGwzUxoi5Lx%2BRmYkir4Rwb0gcK4EbWzQoHH3qTl6ovPeJC%2B8iAKMm7hHDD%2Bc9v1JQlFk1saZfb%2B9ReKZkCJMsIRWBrYhMozftBtfqdQybq2rzQRllJrGNnlBVxGHgi69OWWpIJI2Iy%2FMfIu2oHceYzDpDaCFc2mdj4wNFS8FketjhQF5wqL4I7XJlM4LP9jg0lb).

Polluters are being given a green light, and industry lobbyists have been installed at agencies that are supposed to protect public health and the environment. **We must flip the House in 2026 to restore oversight and push back against these dangerous actions.**

As DCCC Frontline Co-Chair, I’m working to support Democratic candidates across the country who are committed to defending science, public health, and our environment. **We’re close to hitting our end-of-month goal — but we need a final push before the deadline at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. 🕛**

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Fighting back is what we do best.
body:
If Trump and his allies think 100 days of fear and hate will break us, they are about to find out just how wrong they are. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106854944/542851926/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE484_20250430_EOMJMCloser_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056017&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlOGY5ZC0yNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vkWrLAvIHi3wRJ1Wc6vGb0oMdS8imMaahojkkVkPew8=) Hi Peter,

From the moment Trump took office, he made his priorities clear: strip away the fundamental rights and protections of the U.S. Constitution, make himself and his ultra-rich cronies even richer, and silence anyone who dares to stand in his way. Every day since, we have watched him and his allies launch one assault after another on the freedoms we hold dear.

And every day has made one reality clearer than ever: **EMILYs List was built for this.**

When others get discouraged, we get organized.
When others step back, we step up.
When Democratic pro-choice women are under attack, we don't flinch — **we fight.**

[**Now, as we close in on a critical End-of-Month fundraising deadline, we need you with us more than ever. Donate before midnight tonight to help hit our $125,000 goal:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106854945/542851931/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE484_20250430_EOMJMCloser_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056017&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlOGY5ZC0yNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vkWrLAvIHi3wRJ1Wc6vGb0oMdS8imMaahojkkVkPew8=) | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106854946/542851934/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE484_20250430_EOMJMCloser_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056017&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlOGY5ZC0yNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vkWrLAvIHi3wRJ1Wc6vGb0oMdS8imMaahojkkVkPew8=)
---
EMILYs List women are not backing down. They're speaking out in the halls of Congress. They're marching in the streets. They're standing up in town halls, facing the crowds that Republicans are avoiding, and showing America what real leadership looks like. And they're inspiring thousands more women to step up and run for office — women who are angry, determined, and ready to lead.

Make no mistake: the other side is counting on us to be too tired, too overwhelmed, too scared, or too discouraged to keep fighting. They are wrong.

Fighting back is what we do best.

If Trump and his allies think 100 days of fear and hate will break us, they are about to find out just how wrong they are.
****[**Stand with EMILYs List today, Peter. Help hit our End-of-Month goal and send a clear message: We are not backing down. Make your donation here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106854947/542851953/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE484_20250430_EOMJMCloser_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056017&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlOGY5ZC0yNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vkWrLAvIHi3wRJ1Wc6vGb0oMdS8imMaahojkkVkPew8=)****

clean_body: If Trump and his allies think 100 days of fear and hate will break us, they are about to find out just how wrong they are. | = Hi Peter, From the moment Trump took office, he made his priorities clear: strip away the fundamental rights and protections of the U.S. Constitution, make himself and his ultra-rich cronies even richer, and silence anyone who dares to stand in his way. Every day since, we have watched him and his allies launch one assault after another on the freedoms we hold dear. And every day has made one reality clearer than ever: EMILYs List was built for this. When others get discouraged, we get organized. When others step back, we step up. When Democratic pro-choice women are under attack, we don't flinch — we fight. = | = EMILYs List women are not backing down. They're speaking out in the halls of Congress. They're marching in the streets. They're standing up in town halls, facing the crowds that Republicans are avoiding, and showing America what real leadership looks like. And they're inspiring thousands more women to step up and run for office — women who are angry, determined, and ready to lead. Make no mistake: the other side is counting on us to be too tired, too overwhelmed, too scared, or too discouraged to keep fighting. They are wrong. Fighting back is what we do best. If Trump and his allies think 100 days of fear and hate will break us, they are about to find out just how wrong they are. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Jessica Mackler President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Autism Health
subject: Last Chance to Give During Autism Awareness Month
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| As **Autism Awareness Month** comes to a close, we invite you to take action and support the mission of **Autism Health Inc.** Your donation helps us continue to provide life-changing resources, educational scholarships, and parent coaching to families impacted by autism.

Every contribution counts, whether it’s a one-time gift or a recurring monthly donation. Your support allows us to reach more families, fund critical programs, and advocate for the health and well-being of children on the spectrum.
If you believe in the work we’re doing, now is the time to act. Together, we can create lasting change. **Thank you for your continued support!**
---
| [Donate](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=d7f1f72675&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate")
---
|
---
| Dear Friends, If you missed the 2025 **Autism Health Summit** or want to revisit the powerful presentations from this year’s event, we are excited to announce that the **recordings are now available for purchase**. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or professional, these recordings are packed with valuable insights, expert knowledge, and actionable tools to support individuals impacted by autism. We offer two options based on your needs:
* **[2025 AHS General Recordings](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5df4add6e4&e=3a42edfdc4) – $75**
Includes full access to the two-day summit recordings and all speaker presentations for 1-year. Ideal for families and caregivers seeking holistic health information, tools, and resources.
* **[2025 AHS Professional Recordings](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=55d3b39ac2&e=3a42edfdc4) – $250**
Includes full access to the two-day summit recordings and all speaker presentations for 1-year. This track is intended for healthcare providers, practitioners, and professionals and is **eligible for CME credits**.

---
| [Buy Recordings](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=39e543c20b&e=3a42edfdc4 "Buy Recordings")
---
| If you are a professional and have already purchased the professional track but have not yet received information on how to claim your **CME credits** , please contact us at _[info](mailto:info@autismhealth.com)@autismhealth.com_ and we’ll send you the link to complete your submission.
---
| **Autism Health Inc.**
**501(c)(3) Nonprofit Organization
San Diego, CA**

---
Peter, it's Kevin. We’re in the final stretch. There are less than four hours left before our April fundraising deadline at midnight, and we’re still short of our $40,000 goal. This moment matters. A lot. Georgia is one of the most competitive swing states in the country — and the road to a Democratic Senate majority in 2026 runs straight through us. If we fall behind now, we risk losing critical ground at a time when the stakes couldn’t be higher. [We need to reach our $40,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline to fund our voter outreach efforts, keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue, and prove that grassroots Democrats are ready to fight. Will you chip in $10 right now before our midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106855267/542858480/850125521?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_043025_EOM5_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D5_S1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODY4YzE3Yy0yODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7d86gzw5k3QH5F0UiR-6NRy70ys2NSae-0mSjKMIVUk=) | | **[RUSH A DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106855268/542858485/850125521?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_043025_EOM5_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D5_S1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODY4YzE3Yy0yODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7d86gzw5k3QH5F0UiR-6NRy70ys2NSae-0mSjKMIVUk=)**
---
Yes, Marjorie Taylor Greene is already laying the groundwork for a 2026 Senate run. And yes — MAGA money is flooding into Georgia to shut us down and secure another victory for Trump’s extremist agenda.

body:
Our midnight deadline is coming. We need you to help us meet our goal.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250430-2&t=1&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)
Peter, we’ve only got a few hours left until our end-of-month deadline — so I’ll keep this quick.
When we launched our **$20 million plan** to rebuild the Democratic Party, we knew it would take every single one of us stepping up to make it real.
Now, we’re just shy of hitting **our $75,000 end-of-month goal** — and we need your help to put us over the top before midnight.
If you believe we deserve a party that fights harder for working people, that actually meets the urgency of this moment, here’s how you can help right now:
* * *
**⇢ HIGH EARNERS:**
If you're able, please consider investing at a higher level to power this plan.
**[Donate $1,000,](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=1000&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)[$500, ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=500&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)[or $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=100&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)**
**⇢ MEDIUM EARNERS:**
Grassroots donations are what fuel this movement.
**[Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=25&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy) – [or start a $5 monthly gift »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=5&recurring=true&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)**
**⇢ EVERYONE ELSE:**
If you can't donate tonight, that’s okay. You can still make an impact – forward this email, post about us on social media, or bring one more person into this fight.
* * *
Peter, every single donation tonight brings us closer to a stronger future. **[If it makes sense for you, will you pitch in $5 right now to help us meet our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250430-2?refcode=em20250430-2068&amount=5&refcode2=2068_587540_4LkUAy&akid=2068%2E587540%2E4LkUAy)**

In solidarity,
David Hogg

name: Jena
subject: One last message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friend,
I’m reaching out one last time tonight because this moment really matters.
In just a few hours, we’ll close the books on our April fundraising—and what we raise in these final hours will help determine what kind of campaign we can run heading into May. The stakes are high, and I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.
That support we’ve received since we launched - and the belief so many Coloradans have shown in this movement - means the world to me.
There are so many of us who believe that we must continue the work to ensure that Colorado is a place of opportunity, justice, and freedom.
So, before the clock strikes midnight, I’m asking one more time, will you chip in and help end our first month of this campaign on a high note? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2504-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250430-emailpm]
Together, we can protect what’s best about Colorado—and keep building toward a future that works for everyone.
With deep gratitude,
Jena

subject: FWD: Sen. Warren DROPS THE HAMMER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Save Social Security and protect Sen. Elizabeth Warren! >>
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS** We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to Elizabeth Warren.

Social Security is under ATTACK, and so are the Democrats fighting for it.

**_It’s absolutely critical we stand with Elizabeth Warren in this must-win fight for our benefits!_**

[**We need 32 more Democrats in your state to sign on. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=6&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=7&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL) | [**ADD YOUR NAME WHILE YOU CAN: THANK SENATOR ELIZABETH WARREN FOR LEADING THE FIGHT AGAINST TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=8&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL)
---
Thank you,
Voter Protection Project
**\- - - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - - -**
FROM: Sign the Letter 📝 (protectvoting.org)
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SUBJECT: re: Elizabeth Warren DROPS THE HAMMER
Elizabeth Warren just wrote a SCATHING op-ed for Fox News slamming Trump’s attacks on Social Security:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=9&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL)
**The MAGA mob is FUMING — Trump will do anything to force her silence!**

[**We need 500 local Democrats to stand with Warren in her fight: Donate $3 to add your signature to our thank you card! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=10&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL)
[**DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=11&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=12&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89678?t=13&akid=19715%2E878179%2Ec1QrrL)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Can you believe this, null? Donald Trump rallied here in Michigan to _celebrate_ the first 100 days of his administration. He claimed that his tenure has been "the best start of any president in history" and that "everyone is saying it."
You know who disagrees? Millions upon millions of Michiganders – and many more Americans – who are dismayed by the economic turmoil Trump has caused, along with his alarming attacks on civil liberties and democracy. The only thing we can take Trump's word for is when he said we "haven’t even seen anything yet."_And that's just terrifying._

name: James Carville
subject: A new kind of Democrat that needs to be on your radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow, who recently announced her Senate campaign in Michigan, is something else. And I need you to help her come out of the gates swinging.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250430-8910&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8910%2E614464%2EShOqFg)
Here’s the deal, Peter –
**[I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow, who recently announced her Senate campaign in Michigan, is something else. And I need you to help her come out of the gates swinging. Will you rush a gift split between her campaign and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250430-8910&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8910%2E614464%2EShOqFg)**
I’ve known my good friend Mallory for a while now. She made waves back in 2022 with a viral speech—and let me tell you something: I’ve been in this business a long time, and that was one of the best political moments I’ve ever seen.
She stood up on the Senate floor, called out the absolute garbage coming from the far-right, and did not flinch. She told the truth. With fire. With heart. And people listened.
Hell I told everyone I’d show that speech as an instruction manual, and I meant it.
That’s the kind of leadership we need right now.
So when I tell you Mallory’s a fighter, I damn well mean it. She flipped a Republican state Senate seat that nobody thought was winnable. Then she helped flip the entire chamber for the first time in 40 years.
And now? She’s stepping up again — because Donald Trump and Elon Musk and the rest of that billionaire boys club are lighting our democracy on fire. **_And they’d love nothing more than to take back Michigan while they’re at it._**
**Here’s the truth: Michigan might just be the closest swing state this year.**
National Republicans are gearing up to spend more than EVER this cycle in Michigan, and if we don’t crush our grassroots fundraising, we’ll spend the whole campaign playing catch up to their war chest.
If Mallory’s going to fight back — and win — we’ve gotta get her campaign off to a hell of a start.
**[So I’m asking, Peter — will you rush a donation right now to help my friend Mallory crush her fundraising goals and show the GOP we’re not messing around?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87905?refcode=em20250430-8910&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8910%2E614464%2EShOqFg)**
Let’s go win this thing.

clean_body: I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow, who recently announced her Senate campaign in Michigan, is something else. And I need you to help her come out of the gates swinging. Here’s the deal, Peter – I’ve known my good friend Mallory for a while now. She made waves back in 2022 with a viral speech—and let me tell you something: I’ve been in this business a long time, and that was one of the best political moments I’ve ever seen. She stood up on the Senate floor, called out the absolute garbage coming from the far-right, and did not flinch. She told the truth. With fire. With heart. And people listened. Hell I told everyone I’d show that speech as an instruction manual, and I meant it. That’s the kind of leadership we need right now. So when I tell you Mallory’s a fighter, I damn well mean it. She flipped a Republican state Senate seat that nobody thought was winnable. Then she helped flip the entire chamber for the first time in 40 years. And now? She’s stepping up again — because Donald Trump and Elon Musk and the rest of that billionaire boys club are lighting our democracy on fire. And they’d love nothing more than to take back Michigan while they’re at it. Here’s the truth: Michigan might just be the closest swing state this year. National Republicans are gearing up to spend more than EVER this cycle in Michigan, and if we don’t crush our grassroots fundraising, we’ll spend the whole campaign playing catch up to their war chest. If Mallory’s going to fight back — and win — we’ve gotta get her campaign off to a hell of a start. Let’s go win this thing. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: — James Carville Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: They've got my back, because they know I'll always have theirs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
These are the endorsements I’m most honored to receive. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=1a63bb1d6c&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/86a4bf7688f1/theyve-got-my-back-because-they-know-ill-always-have-theirs?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d874766fd5&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

My campaign just received another fantastic endorsement--this time from the Puget Sound Police Managers Association! I'm always thrilled to receive endorsements from across my district, but it is especially meaningful when our law enforcement heroes and first responders--who put their lives on the line protecting our community--are willing to stand with me. These are the endorsements I'm most honored to receive.

I'm proud to announce that my reelection campaign can add the endorsement of the Puget Sound Police Managers Association to that of former King County Sheriff Dave Reichert, the Seattle Police Officers Guild, the mayors of all 9 cities in my district, and many more. They've got my back because they know I'll always have theirs.
[](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7560346e71&e=77eef70c61)
* When the defund, disparage, and disarm the police movement took hold in Seattle, I was one of the few legislators in our region willing to fight back.
* When the Executive tried to close our only youth jail, I wrote _and successfully passed_ legislation to keep it permanently open.
* And now, with a budget proposal threatening to cut law enforcement and criminal justice resources by over $70 million, I am the last line of defense fighting to protect those who protect our community.

**Friend, we only have a few hours left before the month ends and we are still a few hundred dollars away from hitting our goal._Will you join our law enforcement heroes in supporting our campaign by donating before midnight tonight?_ [Make a secure online contribution here!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=a5edc1fc91&e=77eef70c61)** **\---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=0c7c756ff2&e=77eef70c61)
\----------------**
Thank you so much for your support!
Reagan Dunn

name: The Democrats
subject: Last chance: Can you chip in $3 before midnight?
body:

Derek — Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching at midnight, and we cannot afford to fall short. [Can you make a $3 contribution now to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250430_3306_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3306_22930333_-Iqnwl&akid=3306%2E22930333%2E-Iqnwl) $3 to support the DNC’s efforts to hold Trump and his allies accountable in court, and at town halls across the country. $3 to help fund our work — including our new People’s Cabinet and our War Room operation — designed to fight back against Trump’s destructive agenda and illegal executive orders. $3 to keep making necessary investments in our state parties to organize everywhere and ultimately elect Democrats at every level this year, next year, and beyond. $3 may not seem like it can do all of that, but when we add up your $3 contribution with contributions from supporters like you all over the country, it makes a big difference. Team,

****Last week, with**Trump’s executive order attacking ActBlue** , our team decided to _set an_ ambitious goal for the final week of this month to build a war chest he couldn’t touch - _since then we have seen a massive surge of support_!

People from all over the country - from Ohio, Alabama, California, New York, Montana, Colorado and nearly every other state - have donated and sent us messages of support for **our mission to fight back against the Trump administration.

** However, our donations have slowed heading into tonight’s end of the month push and _we aren’t sure if we’re going to reach our goal before midnight_. Missing this goal means that if things hit the fan and we have to go weeks if not months unable to raise money we won't have the war chest to soldier through.

**As they say - a bird in the hand is worth**** _TWO_****in the bush!** And as the sun sets on Trump’s 100th day back in office, oh boy are we headed for one _helluva bush_!

Right now, we are so close -_only $415 away from hitting our goal_ \- and we might not make it. $415 may seem inconsequential but in uncertain times like these every dime counts tenfold.

name: Kim Schrier
subject: This is important, so I wanted you to hear it straight from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This grassroots team means everything to me. This grassroots team means everything to me, Peter.

I just checked in with my team, and I’m so excited to say we’re incredibly close to hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal!

You’ve shown up time and time again to help power this campaign and keep this pediatrician in Congress. And it’s because of you that we’re able to take on tough fights, stand up for our values, and deliver for WA-08. Now, we just need one last push to get over the finish line.

I know I can count on you. subject: Last call: Help us hit our goal by midnight tonight

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92850/images/Smiley%20for%20County%20Mayor%20Logo_JB_Blue.png]
Dear Friends,
This is it — the final hour before one of the most important fundraising deadlines of our campaign.
Every dollar we raise before midnight will help us stay competitive, reach more voters, and keep building momentum toward victory in Shelby County.
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to chip in, now’s the time. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2KpQ6IgorEWrIEj5AQW0eg2?am=50&contactdata=YCaloCng93rZKu5aVWoqyOMhSc+AuFs8pD5Hyu72YFlfP9ednuiJqMGzj2/wm4L5rkn7kK7j7ELpxYZMUGI/uwSBFYOtxQLNnc7M3vjmT3E=]

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Workers’ rights are human rights / Los derechos de los trabajadores son derechos humanos
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/PNG%202023%20TOP%20Newsletter%20Header.png]
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
MAY DAY 2025:
Join TOP as we lift up the power of workers with our labor allies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20fist%20air.jpeg]
This Thursday is International Workers' Day, where our movement once again makes clear that it’s everyday WORKERS (not billionaires) who keep this world turning each and every day. No matter our age, race, place, gender, who you love, or who you pray to, we as Texans know our worth -- and we are worth so much more than what this backwards administration would have us believe.
From sinking our economy with reckless tariffs to purging our federal workforce, Trump and his MAGA cronies are as anti-worker as they come. It's up to US to show up and send a message that there is power in numbers, and that through unwavering solidarity, our people-power is unstoppable.
Get details for May Day actions near you:
* Dallas [https://www.mobilize.us/mayday/event/781369/]
* Houston [https://www.mobilize.us/mayday/event/782136/]
* San Antonio [https://actionnetwork.org/events/may-day-march-the-people-over-billionaires]
We'll see you in the streets!
MAKE CALLS:
Help us defeat right-wing bills that target Texas tenants
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Eviction%20notice%20pink%20sticker.jpg]
Let’s keep up the pressure! HB32 [https://www.expressnews.com/opinion/editorial/article/texas-house-bill-32-squatter-eviction-20227578.php] and its Senate companion SB38 [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/fight-against-squatters-could-bring-faster-evictions-for-all-texas-renters/] are dangerous bills that chip away at tenant rights. They wind back the clock on legal protections for renters and make evictions even harder to fight. These bills allow landlords to evict tenants without prior notice or legal proceedings for reasons other than non-payment of rent, enabling judgments without a hearing in some instances.
Authors of these bills claim they will address the issue of squatting, but instead they infringe on tenants' due process rights, and will hurt Texans already struggling to make ends meet. These pieces of legislation aren’t about squatters — they’re tools to fast-track evictions and silence Texans fighting unfair displacement.
Working together, we can make sure these bills don’t get a vote on the Texas House floor.
CALL your state representative to urge them to oppose HB32 and SB38! [https://www.texastribune.org/directory/]
GO VOTE:
Election Day for local elections across Texas is this Saturday
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20woman%20voter.jpg]
DALLAS and SAN ANTONIO: If you haven’t voted yet, you still have time! Election Day is this Saturday, May 3. Polls will be open from 7 a.m. - 7 p.m.
Click here for more information about these elections and what will be on your ballot. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/04/01/texas-local-voter-guide-2025-san-antonio-denton-el-paso-dallas/]
EVERY election matters and impacts our communities. The candidates and local propositions we vote for at the municipal level shape our everyday lives and those of our families. As voters and community members, WE have the power to elect leaders committed to progress and a future where every Texan can thrive — no matter their age, race, income level, or ZIP Code. Make your voice heard at the polls, and remind your friends and family to do the same.
P.S. – VOTE to re-elect TOP-endorsed Jalen McKee-Rodriguez [https://votejalen.com/] for San Antonio City Council Dist. 2!
TOP Tip: Be a more informed consumer! - Check out the political affiliations of brands and companies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/indirectpoliticaldonations.jpg]
From grocery store runs to online clothing purchases, we have power as consumers through what goods and services we purchase and invest in. At a time when big name companies are caving to Trump and his billionaire MAGA buddies like never before, we have the ability to see in real time where these brands politically align with their corporate political donations. Use this free and easy online tool from Goods Unite Us. [https://www.goodsuniteus.com/]
Español
PRIMERO DE MAYO DE 2025:
Únete a TOP para destacar el poder de los trabajadores junto a nuestros aliados laborales
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20fist%20air.jpeg]
Este jueves es el Día Internacional de los Trabajadores, donde nuestro movimiento deja claro una vez más que son los trabajadores de a pie (no los multimillonarios) quienes hacen que este mundo siga girando cada día. Sin importar nuestra edad, raza, lugar de residencia, género, a quién amamos o a quién le rezamos, como tejanos sabemos lo que valemos, y valemos mucho más de lo que esta administración retrógrada nos quiere hacer creer.
Desde hundir nuestra economía con aranceles imprudentes hasta purgar a nuestra fuerza laboral federal, Trump y sus compinches de MAGA son tan antiobreros como cualquiera. Nos corresponde a nosotros manifestarnos y enviar el mensaje de que la unión hace la fuerza, y que, mediante una solidaridad inquebrantable, el poder de nuestro pueblo es imparable.
Infórmate sobre las acciones del Primero de Mayo cerca de ti:
* Dallas [http://www.mobilize.us/mayday/event/781369/]
* Houston [https://www.mobilize.us/mayday/event/782136/]
* San Antonio [https://actionnetwork.org/events/may-day-march-the-people-over-billionaires]
¡Nos vemos en las calles!
HAZ LLAMADAS:
Ayúdanos a derrotar los proyectos de ley de derecha que atacan a los inquilinos de Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Eviction%20notice%20pink%20sticker.jpg]
¡Mantengamos la presión! La HB32 [https://www.expressnews.com/opinion/editorial/article/texas-house-bill-32-squatter-eviction-20227578.php] y su contraparte en el Senado, la SB38 [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/fight-against-squatters-could-bring-faster-evictions-for-all-texas-renters/] , son proyectos de ley peligrosos que socavan los derechos de los inquilinos. Retroceden las protecciones legales para los inquilinos y dificultan aún más la lucha contra los desalojos. Estos proyectos de ley permiten a los propietarios desalojar a los inquilinos sin aviso previo ni procedimientos legales por razones distintas al impago del alquiler, lo que permite sentencias sin audiencia en algunos casos.
Los autores de estos proyectos de ley afirman que abordarán el problema de la ocupación ilegal, pero en cambio vulneran el derecho al debido proceso de los inquilinos y perjudicarán a los tejanos que ya luchan por llegar a fin de mes. Estas leyes no se centran en los ocupantes ilegales; son herramientas para acelerar los desalojos y silenciar a tejanos quienes luchan contra el desplazamiento injusto.
Trabajando juntos, podemos asegurarnos de que estos proyectos de ley no se sometan a votación en la Cámara de Representantes de Texas.
¡LLAME a sus representantes estatales para urgirles a oponerse a la HB32 y la SB38! [https://www.texastribune.org/directory/]
VOTA:
El día de las elecciones locales en Texas es este sábado
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20woman%20voter.jpg]
DALLAS y SAN ANTONIO: ¡Si aún no has votado, aún tienes tiempo! El día de las elecciones es este sábado 3 de mayo. Las urnas estarán abiertas de 7 a.m. a 7 p.m.
Haz clic aquí para obtener más información sobre estas elecciones y lo que aparecerá en tu boleta. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/04/01/texas-local-voter-guide-2025-san-antonio-denton-el-paso-dallas/]
CADA elección importa e impacta a nuestras comunidades. Los candidatos y las propuestas locales por las que votamos a nivel municipal moldean nuestra vida diara y la de nuestras familias. Como votantes y miembros de la comunidad, tenemos el poder de elegir líderes comprometidos con el progreso y un futuro donde cada tejano pueda prosperar, sin importar su edad, raza, nivel de ingresos o código postal. Haz oír tu voz en las urnas y recuerda a tus amigos y familiares que hagan lo mismo.
P. D.: ¡VOTA para reelegir a Jalen McKee-Rodríguez [https://votejalen.com/] , quien cuenta con el respaldo de TOP, para el Concejo Municipal del Distrito 2 de San Antonio!
Consejos de TOP: Sea un consumidor más informado - consulte las afiliaciones politicas de las marcas y empresas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/indirectpoliticaldonations.jpg]
Desde las compras en el supermercado hasta las compras de ropa en línea, tenemos poder como consumidores a través de los bienes y servicios que compramos y en los que invertimos. En un momento en el que las grandes empresas se están rindiendo ante Trump y sus multimillonarios amigos del MAGA como nunca antes, tenemos la capacidad de ver en tiempo real dónde se alinean políticamente estas marcas con sus donaciones políticas corporativas. Utilice esta herramienta gratuita de Goods Unite Us para ver las inclinaciones políticas de las marcas y empresas a las que les compra. [https://www.goodsuniteus.com/]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=VUASFv4%2FvI%2FAVKRNX8cs5ZT1r1sDSNanztbd%2Fcj6P5IqwBrmse0jX0vLNQEGYQZ%2FQj4eXOLQYK4gPBYWxVwU%2FhuORhh5CoxHsWIoB9NvjQO8EErdkGlnEYNfv7DBV1L3tzZ%2BGOPFRKEOyujN2Avgfes%2BspaL%2BIHWePXE14xPj75%2FAOD2b6ybMVYWdCERW2OplHJr5SkEABEhhHVx%2BLJMPB6G1myvFBHuzciw%2F8bmhqzxCPzlCDZRLkBlRcyJ61ER1qGS7jgvV%2Bgz4ln0wUfFOYB%2Fm1QTuyFnCXzsGNbtfn2PQApfvYp8gNPQ6q%2FzLjgtdUmspxZbX7MdCg3lm8knil5spIr%2B6zIBFOu7cRSKH5jqpSwYZ1TFQzzjQaiMAa%2BS4O2B2RQcoyahxerPY3PCVE817IIMMoI2szjD%2Fw%2FfcZY%3D .

It's up to US to show up and send a message that there is power in numbers, and that through unwavering solidarity, our people-power is unstoppable. Get details for May Day actions near you: Dallas [] Houston [] San Antonio [] We'll see you in the streets! MAKE CALLS: Help us defeat right-wing bills that target Texas tenants [] Let’s keep up the pressure! HB32 [] and its Senate companion SB38 [] are dangerous bills that chip away at tenant rights. They wind back the clock on legal protections for renters and make evictions even harder to fight. These bills allow landlords to evict tenants without prior notice or legal proceedings for reasons other than non-payment of rent, enabling judgments without a hearing in some instances. Authors of these bills claim they will address the issue of squatting, but instead they infringe on tenants' due process rights, and will hurt Texans already struggling to make ends meet. These pieces of legislation aren’t about squatters — they’re tools to fast-track evictions and silence Texans fighting unfair displacement. Working together, we can make sure these bills don’t get a vote on the Texas House floor. CALL your state representative to urge them to oppose HB32 and SB38! [] GO VOTE: Election Day for local elections across Texas is this Saturday [] DALLAS and SAN ANTONIO: If you haven’t voted yet, you still have time! Election Day is this Saturday, May 3. Polls will be open from 7 a.m. - 7 p.m. Click here for more information about these elections and what will be on your ballot. [] EVERY election matters and impacts our communities. The candidates and local propositions we vote for at the municipal level shape our everyday lives and those of our families. As voters and community members, WE have the power to elect leaders committed to progress and a future where every Texan can thrive — no matter their age, race, income level, or ZIP Code. Make your voice heard at the polls, and remind your friends and family to do the same. P.S. – VOTE to re-elect TOP-endorsed Jalen McKee-Rodriguez [] for San Antonio City Council Dist. 2! TOP Tip: Be a more informed consumer! - Check out the political affiliations of brands and companies [] From grocery store runs to online clothing purchases, we have power as consumers through what goods and services we purchase and invest in. At a time when big name companies are caving to Trump and his billionaire MAGA buddies like never before, we have the ability to see in real time where these brands politically align with their corporate political donations. Use this free and easy online tool from Goods Unite Us. [] Español PRIMERO DE MAYO DE 2025: Únete a TOP para destacar el poder de los trabajadores junto a nuestros aliados laborales [] Este jueves es el Día Internacional de los Trabajadores, donde nuestro movimiento deja claro una vez más que son los trabajadores de a pie (no los multimillonarios) quienes hacen que este mundo siga girando cada día. Sin importar nuestra edad, raza, lugar de residencia, género, a quién amamos o a quién le rezamos, como tejanos sabemos lo que valemos, y valemos mucho más de lo que esta administración retrógrada nos quiere hacer creer. Desde hundir nuestra economía con aranceles imprudentes hasta purgar a nuestra fuerza laboral federal, Trump y sus compinches de MAGA son tan antiobreros como cualquiera. Nos corresponde a nosotros manifestarnos y enviar el mensaje de que la unión hace la fuerza, y que, mediante una solidaridad inquebrantable, el poder de nuestro pueblo es imparable. Infórmate sobre las acciones del Primero de Mayo cerca de ti: Dallas [] Houston [] San Antonio [] ¡Nos vemos en las calles! HAZ LLAMADAS: Ayúdanos a derrotar los proyectos de ley de derecha que atacan a los inquilinos de Texas [] ¡Mantengamos la presión! La HB32 [] y su contraparte en el Senado, la SB38 [] , son proyectos de ley peligrosos que socavan los derechos de los inquilinos. Retroceden las protecciones legales para los inquilinos y dificultan aún más la lucha contra los desalojos. Estos proyectos de ley permiten a los propietarios desalojar a los inquilinos sin aviso previo ni procedimientos legales por razones distintas al impago del alquiler, lo que permite sentencias sin audiencia en algunos casos. Los autores de estos proyectos de ley afirman que abordarán el problema de la ocupación ilegal, pero en cambio vulneran el derecho al debido proceso de los inquilinos y perjudicarán a los tejanos que ya luchan por llegar a fin de mes. Estas leyes no se centran en los ocupantes ilegales; son herramientas para acelerar los desalojos y silenciar a tejanos quienes luchan contra el desplazamiento injusto. Trabajando juntos, podemos asegurarnos de que estos proyectos de ley no se sometan a votación en la Cámara de Representantes de Texas. ¡LLAME a sus representantes estatales para urgirles a oponerse a la HB32 y la SB38! [] VOTA: El día de las elecciones locales en Texas es este sábado [] DALLAS y SAN ANTONIO: ¡Si aún no has votado, aún tienes tiempo! El día de las elecciones es este sábado 3 de mayo. Las urnas estarán abiertas de 7 a.m. a 7 p.m. Haz clic aquí para obtener más información sobre estas elecciones y lo que aparecerá en tu boleta. [] CADA elección importa e impacta a nuestras comunidades. Los candidatos y las propuestas locales por las que votamos a nivel municipal moldean nuestra vida diara y la de nuestras familias. Como votantes y miembros de la comunidad, tenemos el poder de elegir líderes comprometidos con el progreso y un futuro donde cada tejano pueda prosperar, sin importar su edad, raza, nivel de ingresos o código postal. Haz oír tu voz en las urnas y recuerda a tus amigos y familiares que hagan lo mismo. P. D.: ¡VOTA para reelegir a Jalen McKee-Rodríguez [] , quien cuenta con el respaldo de TOP, para el Concejo Municipal del Distrito 2 de San Antonio! Consejos de TOP: Sea un consumidor más informado - consulte las afiliaciones politicas de las marcas y empresas [] Desde las compras en el supermercado hasta las compras de ropa en línea, tenemos poder como consumidores a través de los bienes y servicios que compramos y en los que invertimos. En un momento en el que las grandes empresas se están rindiendo ante Trump y sus multimillonarios amigos del MAGA como nunca antes, tenemos la capacidad de ver en tiempo real dónde se alinean políticamente estas marcas con sus donaciones políticas corporativas. Utilice esta herramienta gratuita de Goods Unite Us para ver las inclinaciones políticas de las marcas y empresas a las que les compra. [] Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project.
