name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziutf3isf8289jr8cbslvhr256rcnh5407hcasuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)
---
| |
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z146l8bjiu1di6n8m3h8k52odnmh6kg4hd77sd90_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmcd8nb4bl4fg1bapuaujrbanskkfec8vamkcmbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It pains me to announce this…
body:
But the numbers don’t lie.

But the numbers don’t lie.
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4hitl124fh95au1ikn15jbskcoo8843f591p6vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
It pains me to announce this...
---
But numbers don’t lie. And __these__ numbers tell a deeply troubling story:
---
[**“House Democratic campaign arm raises $36.9M in first quarter” – _The Hill_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfok06sqj6fptkvh1c0mrp8c62ni5dg5fgkp5mn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1clh2bs)
---
The radical Democrats have gone on an all-out fundraising BLITZ over the past few months.
---
_We saw what that meant for the recent special elections where the Left was able to OUTSPEND us in Florida by 1000%!_
---
_And now, I worry what it means for our TOSS-UP majority of just a handful of seats._
---
When the Democrats came for our majority in November, I transferred **$2.5 million** of my own campaign funds to ensure we could protect key battleground races from their massive warchest.
---
But after House Democrats just released their target list of vulnerable Republicans for the midterms (_and with their fundraising haul of nearly $40 MILLION!_), I won’t lie, my personal commitment alone would be a mere drop in the bucket.
---
That’s why at this pivotal moment for our majority, I have no choice but to turn to grassroots conservatives like YOU to take a stand with us.
---
If we fail to act right now, a Democrat majority would freeze President Trump’s agenda in the blink of an eye – and all our hard work would be for _NOTHING_.
---
**So, before tonight’s deadline, I’m calling on _2.5 MILLION PATRIOTS_ to MATCH my 2024 commitment by making a grassroots contribution of any amount to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority.**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our razor-thin House majority.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0plk3nfmofoc8p8ke5a3oac41c4oru90f5ldg08_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1clh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38li24pobdo3864cho56pqimeoq61pci79kmmo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgp1e81f15i394e8nlrjctba08mil1i6fs9supk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3bo7gr408jbugs7nq9julmcls3g1548p9e09ofo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcnie3cp25faj0asnst13e60lsh4vb4du7fipej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmohof5itksv3s7ajfffe1ek38q30dpiqm5b703g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor6c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34adn2j21o79db1tne5pom8reephegtl5ne7ht8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4f8e5m3mfbe7u6dvh5nkpr7cg7d8ckb2vhoivmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1c9h2bs)**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9566kpea5r2soiob0dqkuqli426jd0fja6509po_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1c9h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr6a0ko5tlsqricifbne71vk4o722712deiogao0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1c9h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmm5dp6fo5l7k2kj2369p9or02igi85kc2aei5v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c1iecor1c9h2bs)**_

clean_body: Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished Constitution , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has always been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government. This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available free of charge to any citizen wishing to learn. “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” is a powerful counterweight to The New York Times ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more? Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Can Islam and America Coexist? + Remembering David Horowitz
body:
They call it "EPIC" — a planned Islamic city in Texas that would be four times the size of Disneyland. Charlie explains how this undercovered story represents a threat to the West's future and a sign of our leaders' failed immigration policies. Plus, Charlie and Mike Cernovich remember the legacy of conservative legend David Horowitz, who did so much to pave the way for the Trump movement and more. Lieutenant Governor of Texas, Dan Patrick, announced in a press release that Senate Bill 30 (SB 30) is designed to protect individuals and businesses from financially devastating jury awards, often driven by what are termed "nuclear verdicts." Read more...

---
A federal judge on Wednesday ordered the immediate release of Mohsen Mahdawi, a Palestinian who was recently arrested by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement as part of a crackdown by the State Department on foreign nationals who organize or are part of protests on college campuses.Mahdawi was arrested when he showed up to an appointment for his process to become a U.S. citizen. name: Amy Carnevale
subject: 🏅 Nominate a Republican Hero for the Lincoln-Reagan Award!
body:
May 29th: Honoring Legacy & Celebrating Leadership
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xsG4x830LND2K2d4fuLpZ3svyo4x7znzYbruokL304toVLa3yh67JXIqyfDcQK_ORjGSkXMspcYhMqZbOnQDu6R8Hff86GiKQrLHT4okJgIwuJgHY1V1fdNJ4V7xYtkAcoo9v15xJOf_fjCPI6Fw2A==&c=G2H-Z-zsD7J2W0EJtalhpuupiYyqy8MC68n1xlCKoP49mRJN2CnU8w==&ch=pzi2vlmri6BOsdxArcPAR8U1kABBt5Qip5hj7AO4p_bUW9Gfx4Fu1A==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Each year, the Massachusetts Republican Party bestows its highest honor upon a Republican who exemplifies the values, vision, and tireless dedication of our Party's greatest icons: Abraham Lincoln and Ronald Reagan.
The Lincoln-Reagan Award is more than just a distinction -- it's a celebration of Republican excellence. It's a moment to honor those who go above and beyond to advance our principles of freedom, opportunity, and constitutional government here in the Commonwealth.
This year's event is on Thursday, May 29th at the Lenox Hotel in Boston. More on that later...
Right now, we're turning to you.
Do you know a standout Republican who has made a powerful impact in your community or across our state? It could be an elected official who's led with integrity, a grassroots warrior who never backs down, or an activist whose passion has inspired the next generation. Whether they're in the trenches or behind the scenes, we want to hear about them.
Nominations are officially open for this year's Lincoln-Reagan Award!
---
| | [NOMINATE A REPUBLICAN FOR THIS YEAR'S AWARD](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xsG4x830LND2K2d4fuLpZ3svyo4x7znzYbruokL304toVLa3yh67Je9yeTiqv4osVqfuYpPjkSDXp9PPoDgci9WUNwGsekITbcd_bvPOZE-nBirOLsZkoDUdEWGFlOeWdXRrawRSfw-KHYyaOiSy1phlUw2j6oG6HQDXbHldtVT_Awg0_Yj2iqwZZdoenOY8eZaLunwA_LM=&c=G2H-Z-zsD7J2W0EJtalhpuupiYyqy8MC68n1xlCKoP49mRJN2CnU8w==&ch=pzi2vlmri6BOsdxArcPAR8U1kABBt5Qip5hj7AO4p_bUW9Gfx4Fu1A==)
---
| Let's honor the best among us -- the bold leaders, the tireless volunteers, and the unwavering voices who make the MassGOP stronger every single day. And don't forget to RSVP [by donating online](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xsG4x830LND2K2d4fuLpZ3svyo4x7znzYbruokL304toVLa3yh67JaIPlegytXggsG6dMs6jgF_OrrGsuJskm7kT1DGRLWa31LVdPZ2cfPQUVCxCdS9sEO-WxYgkST2IQKu5vpPjTCFtoSgd62Z7wiNXmgiWgqV_xO2BWydg3QlrOcFg4eb5Umso_-gKuXpCXDomWBAzlmVAUZuGG5EJaQ==&c=G2H-Z-zsD7J2W0EJtalhpuupiYyqy8MC68n1xlCKoP49mRJN2CnU8w==&ch=pzi2vlmri6BOsdxArcPAR8U1kABBt5Qip5hj7AO4p_bUW9Gfx4Fu1A==) or emailing [finance@massgop.com](mailto:finance@massgop.com) today to reserve your spot at this year's event. I've included a copy of your invitation below.
Yours in service,
---
| | |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP
| |
---

subject: 🌸 Join me for brunch with Sen. Tarr this Saturday!
body:
10:30AM in Hamilton...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MxxytwUum9wnqRO0nG1VndlTuLcrz9G3aoRrSXMn2EBOBcq_Ewx4sdFxBDZ6skDN85K9g1jOrFHGZ4PPXh3Izjxt2guT5OXdnlKPtqazUgGk7DNs8oo6fmzF-PdGJajDcJ2JK1Tq0AIvZvlFuwW-Cg==&c=QWTFlLZykp1CZwgfCVObpGBwE4c2bRqpdRO3VRDRCJzsDV1IgQw6dA==&ch=9cEVKFp792ZXVy_IvSaEqGlTt8WzRjNRibyPfgVyldnZiSuSZP10vA==)

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Across the Country: May 1st, 2025
body:
Progressive Democrats are uniting to take on the ruling class. This is how we create real change.
| | | | | |
---
**_Across the Country_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to Across the Country with Zoltan Nemeth. Every Thursday, we take a closer look at how the latest domestic political developments are shaping America’s future, the polls, and the national conversation. This week, we’re focusing on a powerful shift happening within the Democratic Party, a new era of progressive unity. Let’s dive into how this progressive wave is reshaping the party and what it means for 2026 and beyond.
---
| | | | **Progressive Momentum is Growing**
---
|
---
The progressive front of the Democratic Party is coming together like never before, and the energy is undeniable. David Hogg, Vice Chair of the DNC and a powerful advocate for a new generation of leadership, is taking bold action to unite and strengthen the progressive movement. Through his grassroots organization, Leaders We Deserve, Hogg is backing primary challenges in safe districts to replace ineffective, out-of-touch Democrats with leaders ready to meet this moment. Despite resistance from establishment figures, Hogg has made it clear: this is not about division, **it’s about renewal.** It's about building the strongest opposition possible to take on Donald Trump, defend our democracy, and fight for working people. After spending $2 billion and still losing to a convicted felon who tried to overthrow the government, it's clear the Democratic Party needs bold change, **not more of the same.** Hogg’s leadership is sparking a national conversation about who our party stands for. Voters, **not party insiders** , will decide the future. And for the first time in a long time, progressives are organizing around a common mission: to build a Democratic Party that fights harder, dreams bigger, and truly represents the will of the people. The stakes have never been higher. Trump and his allies are already taking a chainsaw to our democracy. Progressives are rising to meet this historic challenge, not by stepping back, but by stepping up. **Now is the time to stand together, unify, and fight for the future we believe in.**
---
|
---
In solidarity, Zoltan Nemeth
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xen0e-wk3ixw-kyd76rh6/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xen0e-wk3ixx-kyd76rh7/)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xen0e-wk3ixy-kyd76rh8/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2xen0e-wk3ixz-kyd76rh9/)
---
We appreciate your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---

name: Big Trump Knife
subject: Introducing The 10" BIG Trump Victory Knife
body:
The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21405/6374453/5a28b150a7d35df568cefaab677f5da893bee1fd/f9c5176e641984946ce7736a1540e87a25814ef0)

_May 1st, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | Celebrate Victory with the 47th President Donald Trump in 2025!

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21405/6374453/0073a4017629d38cf0710da9f3b1d63cafa16721/f9c5176e641984946ce7736a1540e87a25814ef0)

---
The patriotic handle scales are crafted of a **[blue pakkawood panel that has“Donald Trump” in white, surrounded by white stars, and a red andwhite-striped acrylic panel.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21405/6374453/0073a4017629d38cf0710da9f3b1d63cafa16721/f9c5176e641984946ce7736a1540e87a25814ef0)**

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.
**Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1931, President Herbert Hoover symbolically dedicated New York City’s [Empire State Building](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uqzAUAOCnMVvQ8Q8GBg9XithypU7pZjn2AU5lcGSbRLx91b5CX-AbvvvN3hxF2pf_bkNT52R3fJeItWK2G-2YXSwBXSy07Bj8iu75claA6C7QXYDb4CieVjXBzIgCZYOG90rDqKCHZjV89AK47wate-ilxtGPutNjp7iaJR8aMj8adMA5QK-G9oFaBvRcKC3GQQemAAPVlNuvRHtdcY5nemFufdqaaNZan4XJf0xMTExnOurRPpCJiS_3z-MaP4gKk9OMrh4ZmbyW1WUMTTbh-aYYqeieKVg2R_GXrH96eBnxHQAA___g4G_K) by pressing a button from the White House to turn on its lights, while someone else flipped the switches in New York. ## U.S., Ukraine Ink Rare Minerals Deal
[Ukraine signed a deal Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u7CAUhJ8Gd1gY8F9BcRt3e9uUFobj9UkwWAe81r595FTp0430SaP55uMxPywGjM__dgdT1jRHuHKAUoDmHSOQDdmDDRmfEbzbwB4vO0shWy5aLprZWwzvWVferAASVAWm6XUnRi16UW3G68F7qXpo3aKcsq1exbg4pZuh7Re9VGjuNtGKphGi10O9QKc8uEbqTo5D55kW4LEkqj8TxrLBGt7pBVS7tFfBbKUcmal_TE5MTtd11XFxt8XNmZyOFLCgy78ivzGT05n5-UUWI_Dbj4NLMe3o-G3MC9CeebTlJBs4QU4nOcj8ssRLoshdOmOhNycXrRRq7FRFxh8XhoC565kWz91i-NlZ_nTuy8jvAAAA__81YpGM) granting the U.S. access to its rare minerals in exchange for continued American support in its war against Russia. Deputy Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko traveled to Washington to finalize the agreement, which also establishes a U.S.-Ukraine Reconstruction Investment Fund to attract global investment for Ukraine’s recovery. The signing followed tense last-minute negotiations, as [Kyiv initially balked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0cHqnDAQx_GnibdZYszqevCw5Y-37aWUHiU64zrdmIQkKr59sdAn6PkLA5_5_XoNL8OW3fu7WanLsx8cHclSzhSHlR1FYxOSsYnfjnBayITdDEqqO8g7yHJAw_YcdIHdTKSoKqgrG13LVstGFktXItZY00hV2z6wmYy-t804llI1OOlKF9xd1-RdlqWUjX7cRqorpKlUulbto0ahJSFnH2-_Pbu80GxPv1O8TX4tbLfkHJKonkL1QvXHcdzW5K4mVE8OtiRUf6Gu6KNFofotgXEI2ycadgSXDf5h4dKCmTNFyHFbA4RIKVGCz8k7ZA_BnDCa6QNbgtlHWMgGdm-IFMhC3FJiI1RvIjyf5ddPu2-i6v3EKKqvb9er6Ug_KIYidhgOtpZT3Qgt36th-xeV_2uJvVN_AgAA__82MKBj) at two additional documents the U.S. sought to include alongside the main deal.
## U.S. Growth Slows as New Investments Surge
The U.S. [economy contracted by 0.3%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GO83lisgUFH9jN3-7pUG4KhsEF5gx8_ab2ewbbHtOck6-7-M-340PPm7_zUG6rmmOdJVAtVKeDx8pm1AcmVD8FsnZncz5NDMCDi0MLfDZGR9es2icXomQ-oY0H4WEm4ARml0r5YaBFiMAb4NF4ka5XlqFEsitcmm8fq_BAJwDjEJ1C8nekeUoJN6UdEwAOV9T7j6Tj3WnNbzSk3Jn09EEvdd6Ftb_YzgxnK7r6uJi3xTvnuG0PIqPVArDiWyK6XgxnDZ3tl-8fZT2N2ttijUbW0ubbTQIvQTVZO3Oy4fgixyZgO0wPvzc1j-5emr8DgAA__80Fn42) in the first quarter of 2025, marking its first decline since 2022, according to new Commerce Department data. The slowdown was driven largely by a surge in imports, as companies moved to stockpile goods ahead of President Trump’s planned tariffs. At an _Invest in America_ event at the White House, Trump [highlighted corporate investment](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOtBi_gsXaegubUpkvOtjE2OQvQe6t4_IK6QbaUYzmu_rMT8Mew7PT7ORFrfPga7kSYTivHGgaHxCMj7xMxDalcxxmlmBagtoC6hmNOzfc5OjdkSK6px01TcdjA30kK_aWIXKDThaC7Agtm6ooVqw7hSafqSc9d0GLVQVQN8M5UJdjWQr1XRqHDrMGiBk2WP5vXOQlZx_7yfF0u5b7vUqcqSs_sjUlKnpuq7SLul-cfuZmm6ZqUniazuKa2WhYt1fiQoOJyXZKEgh0dgfioWYyM7d8TxqPC72nlPXZw08N8P-b1H-henU6jcAAP__4ph-VA) and reiterated support for tariffs as part of his broader economic strategy. The White House has also unveiled a new public tracker that lists 47 projects from 50 companies, including high-dollar commitments from tech giants like Nvidia, Apple, and OpenAI. [See the website here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFytCAYBuDTYLfOJyK6BcXf2O3fpnRQXvXLIDhCZPb2meQKucBTPB-v6WXZc9j-2wMmr3EKKMkjZ1zTwQGX9cnB-sRbgFt22PO2kyTZPah7UDM5y_49qcqZFZBoK5imV5qeinqqdgPM3TxIO_d4Nk5posFh1e2wqmVQbVux-dGoo6Yh6tVQz9Ctw9JIpeVz0E4oguMcr_ozcsg7Vv-ON656iUflzZ7zmUT7T8hRyLGUUpedM_b4lVBv8RZy5HAj5QMhJyHH6jLuLOw9J90LRdth2f9i-U8Dt5HfAQAA__8D3XAT).
## Best Cheap Vacation Spots in U.S.
From red rock deserts to puffin-packed beaches, _U.S. News & World Report_ just released its 2025 rankings of the [best cheap vacations in the U.S.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMR1oMcZwhYs0dJc2JVrOa9jE2Mj2cbq_j8gvpH-a0czXfb4jew7rJ-5kiotzoFf2VAqleedACX22hD7zGsg-NsLjxFmC7Gvoa2hni-zfs6qscUSSuopMOygNNwUDVJtRNPTd6KDXAKOWMKjF9nohsK6VTncVmysNemhbgEGNzUK6s_RopdLyNmorFJDlElPzHTmUjZx_x5NS84h75c1WypFF9yHkJORUEp7km2e-dlxCyClh-OGwZiGnhXKp0bmYLC6e6mfG2lIuHLBwDBepkrHHi73nrAehYN2R_V9X-ddBp5G_AQAA__-Fy3qX)—a list packed with national parks, small-town charm, and wallet-friendly adventures. Grand Teton National Park in Wyoming claimed the top spot, with Moab, Utah, and Gulf Shores, Alabama, rounding out the top three. Most destinations boast scenic views, free museums, or low-cost campsites—with entrance fees often $35 or less. Rankings were based on affordability, availability of free or inexpensive attractions, natural beauty, and overall value for travelers. [See the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMR1oMcZwhYs0dJc2JVrOa9jE2Mj2cbq_j8gvpH-a0czXfb4jew7rJ-5kiotzoFf2VAqleedACX22hD7zGsg-NsLjxFmC7Gvoa2hni-zfs6qscUSSuopMOygNNwUDVJtRNPTd6KDXAKOWMKjF9nohsK6VTncVmysNemhbgEGNzUK6s_RopdLyNmorFJDlElPzHTmUjZx_x5NS84h75c1WypFF9yHkJORUEp7km2e-dlxCyClh-OGwZiGnhXKp0bmYLC6e6mfG2lIuHLBwDBepkrHHi73nrAehYN2R_V9X-ddBp5G_AQAA__-Fy3qX).

#### Welcome to Steak for Substack 🥩📰!
Rone recently moved you from another platform to Steak for Substack 🥩📰, hosted on [Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/1c1ad162-6325-4ff7-860a-cebf8cfedc62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). New posts will be automatically delivered to you via email or via [the Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/5b5493a7-44dd-4d16-ad1e-c1a531685f26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
To set up your profile and find more to read, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/9af60a78-37d5-411c-9057-268821d4a0a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you do not want to receive emails from Steak for Substack 🥩📰, you can unsubscribe [here](https://substack..BDxQN4TEdlQ43plUTlYYosHp04zVwnp6J74hQnYvy68?).
The Steak for Breakfast Podcast is excited to announce some upcoming changes that's going to help change the way you consume your news
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e06aa313-c9a2-4e00-9acb-c4ff6ae19e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While the typical format and show structure that has helped Steak for Breakfast become America's fastest growing and quickly becoming favorite political podcast won't be changing, some of the additions and feature we are working on behind the scenes are expected to push the show to a whole, new level
For years, we have prided ourselves on being the Capitol Hill insider podcast with broad and exclusive coverage of the sitting Administration and beyond-
And our trusted content is about to get a whole lot better
**SUPPORT THE SHOW AND SUBSCRIBE**
First of all, please make sure your subscribed to the show (it's free) across all the major podcast platforms - we prefer Apple Podcasts and Spotify but are also featured on iHeart, Samsung, Amazon Podcasts of wherever you hear the show

• Press the "+follow" button, and make sure the podcast is downloading to your electronic device. Rate Steak for Breakfast 5-Stars and write a positive review where applicable

Being subscribed to Steak for Breakfast helps the podcast grow, allows us to continue moving up the charts and rankings while ultimately better amplifying your voice within the movement
**Program Notes-**
For Friday's episodes moving forward, Rone will be joined by longtime friend of the show and contributor Alan Jacoby. This will add another layer to the regular political commentary and analysis that our listenership has come to love and enjoy. Noah will still be contributing to the podcast as much as he humanly can, and eventually have him back on regularly for our every episode lineup
New Additions:
Steak for Breakfast now has channels on YouTube and Rumble
http://Youtube.com/@steakforbreakfastpod
Please head over to both applications and subscribe to the podcast there as well
http://Rumble.com/steakforbreakfast
**Coming Soon:**
We are (finally) nearing the completion of the Steak for Breakfast Podcast website. It will be a one-stop-shop where you can find links to all the places you can subscribe to it show, check out our social media, learn about our sponsors and much, much more
Steak for Breakfast will also at some point in the imminent future be adding and offering the opportunity to subscribe to exclusive content, available to our listenership for a small, additional fee. This will coincide with the launch of our Steak for Breakfast Podcast merchandise line; something our loyal listeners have clamored for years about
Stay Tuned:
Buckle up and get ready for Steak for Breakfast to take the political world by storm-
For years, our podcast has been the leader in providing our listenership with the most exclusive, long form interviews of the biggest political figures, candidates, administration officials and more
How we have worked to build our resume, reputation and guest lineup is about to be poured back into our loyal listeners and new followers in ways that is going to revolutionize your experience like never before

name: History Facts
subject: What happened to the 3-cent coin?
body:
One of the lesser-known coins in the history of U.S. currency is the 3-cent silver piece known as the “trime.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69oj7cl1x9v2gmu5xfykgj65ig7xczut25tcmlhyeqt3w4rsc6c7cjary1f43tnw0p9mtywea45996kzg9eo0q7f9smzaeaplba7rml9sgfljeur8vkyuu1h7atwgnqbjs6kap3s9z6qh1uxs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [There used to be a 3-cent U.S. coin called the "trime."](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O ne of the lesser-known coins in the history of U.S. currency is the 3-cent silver piece known as the “trime.” In 1851, Congress lowered the cost of mailing a letter from 5 cents to 3 cents to compete with private mail carriers, and simultaneously [authorized](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=33hzx8e93euilfi8njd61ttuej2vaumv0nbau0ca9rgz4pfp3nv4ve4yt0z7aoe0vcl1ohbjtm9q209ojg1oeqtwtfxbj01ek9tuo95btc5w3ogcu69ox3dgvodojsutrsxsxekfq5d7uuigrj20we87w9pn6iwld7servtmki3czosfrgpg9jafqd39sa06spxnkpx7y4jr2r5dquc2imdtu5ys1b9lno6qqo9zhfywgpdu4mulc47he907x9f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the creation of the 3-cent trime to simplify postage transactions. Before that, carrying or making change with copper cents and half cents was impractical, since the coins were disproportionately heavy and large for their low value.
---
At the same time, the California gold rush, which peaked in 1849, had flooded the U.S. economy with gold, decreasing its value relative to silver. Coins such as the dime, quarter, and dollar were 90% silver at the time, and became worth more than their face value. They began disappearing from circulation as people started hoarding, melting down, and selling the silver coins. The trime, however, was 75% silver and 25% copper, making it the rare U.S. coin that was actually worth more in your pocket than it was melted down.
Designed by the U.S. Mint’s chief engraver James B. Longacre, [the trime](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) was one of the smallest American coins ever minted, at just 14 millimeters in diameter. Its obverse featured a six-pointed star with a shield, surrounded by the words “United States of America” and the year it was made. The reverse showed the Roman numeral “III” inside a decorative “C,” with 13 stars representing the 13 original colonies.
At first, the tiny trime did its job — it made buying stamps easier and it circulated widely. But the coin was so small it [often got lost](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and its alloy tarnished easily, eventually earning it the undesirable nickname “fish scales.” Its popularity waned, and after being replaced by a nickel 3-cent coin following the Civil War coin shortage, the trime barely resurfaced in circulation. It was officially discontinued with the Coinage Act of 1873.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## The first official U.S. coin said “Mind Your Business” on it.
In 1787, the United States was still in its infancy and was figuring out, along with many other things, its national currency. That year, Congress approved the first official U.S. coin for circulation: the Fugio cent. The copper coin, believed to have been designed by Benjamin Franklin, came with a curt piece of advice: “Mind Your Business.” It wasn’t meant as a slight: Taken together with the picture of a sundial and the Latin word _Fugio_ , meaning “run” or “flee,” it’s been [interpreted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svkvi3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to mean “time flies, so take care of your affairs.” The reverse side of the coin featured 13 linked rings representing the 13 colonies becoming united as a nation, surrounding the motto “We Are One.” The Fugio cent was made by a private contractor for just one year; in 1792, the Coinage Act was passed and the U.S. Mint was established.

clean_body: One of the lesser-known coins in the history of U.S. currency is the 3-cent silver piece known as the “trime.” | O ne of the lesser-known coins in the history of U.S. currency is the 3-cent silver piece known as the “trime.” In 1851, Congress lowered the cost of mailing a letter from 5 cents to 3 cents to compete with private mail carriers, and simultaneously the creation of the 3-cent trime to simplify postage transactions. Before that, carrying or making change with copper cents and half cents was impractical, since the coins were disproportionately heavy and large for their low value. At the same time, the California gold rush, which peaked in 1849, had flooded the U.S. economy with gold, decreasing its value relative to silver. Coins such as the dime, quarter, and dollar were 90% silver at the time, and became worth more than their face value. They began disappearing from circulation as people started hoarding, melting down, and selling the silver coins. The trime, however, was 75% silver and 25% copper, making it the rare U.S. coin that was actually worth more in your pocket than it was melted down. Designed by the U.S. Mint’s chief engraver James B. Longacre, was one of the smallest American coins ever minted, at just 14 millimeters in diameter. Its obverse featured a six-pointed star with a shield, surrounded by the words “United States of America” and the year it was made. The reverse showed the Roman numeral “III” inside a decorative “C,” with 13 stars representing the 13 original colonies. At first, the tiny trime did its job — it made buying stamps easier and it circulated widely. But the coin was so small it , and its alloy tarnished easily, eventually earning it the undesirable nickname “fish scales.” Its popularity waned, and after being replaced by a nickel 3-cent coin following the Civil War coin shortage, the trime barely resurfaced in circulation. It was officially discontinued with the Coinage Act of 1873. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Cost to make a single penny in 2024 3.69¢ | | Year the U.S. released its first general-issue postage stamp 1847 | Year the U.S. released its first general-issue postage stamp 1847 | | Face value of the rare double eagle U.S. gold coin (which sold for $18.9 million in 2021) $20 | | Coin denominations currently in circulation in the U.S. 6 | Coin denominations currently in circulation in the U.S. 6 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The first official U.S. coin said “Mind Your Business” on it. In 1787, the United States was still in its infancy and was figuring out, along with many other things, its national currency. That year, Congress approved the first official U.S. coin for circulation: the Fugio cent. The copper coin, believed to have been designed by Benjamin Franklin, came with a curt piece of advice: “Mind Your Business.” It wasn’t meant as a slight: Taken together with the picture of a sundial and the Latin word Fugio , meaning “run” or “flee,” it’s been to mean “time flies, so take care of your affairs.” The reverse side of the coin featured 13 linked rings representing the 13 colonies becoming united as a nation, surrounding the motto “We Are One.” The Fugio cent was made by a private contractor for just one year; in 1792, the Coinage Act was passed and the U.S. Mint was established. name: Dr. Ayana Elizabeth Johnson, Evergreen
subject: We have to fight this bad Republican budget deal
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Because the climate, the economy, and your wallet depend on it
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545715/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

One of the hardest things about climate action is that progress is never guaranteed. We have to fight hard for every inch of ground we gain, and then we have to relentlessly defend that ground.

It took decades of advocacy, science, and coalition-building to secure the historic climate and clean energy programs in the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA).

**And now everything we’ve fought for is at risk.**

As I write this, Republicans in Congress are charging forward with a budget bill that would eviscerate crucial IRA tax incentives—the same incentives that are projected to _cut greenhouse gas emissions by 40% by 2030._

Repeal would not only endanger our progress on emissions, it would also lead to higher energy costs— _as much as $500 per household per year._ |
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545716/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| I’ve spent my career working in the spaces where climate, policy, communities, and conservation intersect and interact.**So let me tell you, the climate and clean energy programs in the IRA aren’t just abstract policy. They’re real, tangible progress.**

They’re electric vehicle factories, good-paying union jobs, solar panels on schools, offshore wind farms, and so much more.

So here’s what I need you to do TODAY.

📞 [**Use Evergreen’s sample script to call your members of Congress right now.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545717/87SdQ4wZ)

If your member is a Republican, call them and make them feel the heat! If you have a Democrat, you should let them know that you want them _to fight_ to protect these important programs.

It takes just a few minutes, _and it matters._ Calls from constituents make a difference and remind our elected officials who they work for.

[**So please, give your members of Congress a quick call to let them know we won’t cede this ground.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545718/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CALL YOUR REPS NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545719/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for being in this fight. |
---
| | |
---
### Dr. Ayana Elizabeth Johnson
[ayanaelizabeth.substack.com](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3545720/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---

---

subject: Temple Approved, Loose Change, and Rookie of the Year
body:
The Fairview Town Council yesterday approved a revised plan proposed by the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints to build a temple with a 120-foot spire, ending a yearlong dispute that pitted religious freedom concerns against the community’s desire to retain its small-town character.

## Tragic Accident at Port Arthur LNG
Three workers died and two were injured when [scaffolding collapsed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2usyAcxq8GNwwgSh0YmveNW8_Yjgbhj5IgEKC1vfsTewtn-yVP8nw9bvNNOe_C-qN2kPVt4xzgKB5qhTxX2JMHlVKOLzA-xgJ6U2GFmRHWY9JjQmejnP_MvDFyIWakDUgq-EBGwUbSbBLG0SquR9FdeKeXpR-GjmhqoGNMgDCNk6cZ6QmllFAmWsbFZRRGdGSwC7twxAkYV2Nu6wYV3qpY_4kvyK2Oe-PlVmsqqLsiNiE2HcfR7iWcGmITBPwsiE3nKMSmL3fY5rjjLT5LjQGrYHAClf0JxoHBLuAUc8Uq1-2ZcdHK2uiNCyvW0XuVCuBordNO-YJ1DNblM0xlfL3S_49_93uTpUmH896VQSBO1l05_-1b__byS7LfAAAA__81AJMl) at the Port Arthur LNG construction site in Sabine Pass early Tuesday morning. Officials have not determined the cause of the collapse. Construction contractor Bechtel Global Corporation has [suspended work at the site](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOp9sYzAULtJcd2lTogWvDysLtuzN_bx9RF4h9YxG831ft_kGkeJx_4QdHb9Cmg98VkJmLDPjngkh55Ie6CmliusGxx1nLXUvZC-kmj1Ees-m9W6RflItOmXNICerJ9luzg6LnjqQaKBTuEy9DcqMnfeT7LXvoI3uHJO9VEpJpe1FGztO1ttODmHRo2mMRB85lQtvyPiCGuidHlgua9pbchtzrk330ehro68ZUyY8o0ZfO_FM5RtLFT6iCEAnqthTQcEbHGKQIiCygMBYRF0hhET-7KyJCHLFKoDFmo7K5WflmA5RI6NQymozKt0W5_MzEsU62MbI-w6R_n7x_2w-nP4NAAD__7Hnilo), and the federal Occupational Safety and Health Administration is investigating the incident. The Port Arthur LNG project, currently in phase 1 of construction, is a [joint venture](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZB7ZDRgcEFxCtpdeiHrcbfCpByPjHXb__sT9wqalUqne-_OxfGCStK-_8cVT_Yp52fk6hWvlslR-HcJ4HCW_mSTnk8OG-8oLGOi16bWxC2GS76VraHoa8rbhyQ6dM34Ab5ptMtw-yXhHEa3z4MbRG996tNFFpgBNmu4x0xtrrbEwPKAbRj_Q0BoXnzB2qjNMqebyqBtX_sIzynd-c3mE_Gpk2mo9TtX-UjArmK_reli4IfZ83Q0FM5aagrCC-c4VzJIDioIZNDGSbnXa_34WJp12fQaMMQulfdUhi-Bxssaqj1yqxlK3z6JlXxXMvQFtgiMa-1F7T6A7pFF7iKhboMAM2Paja8pEx5VE0ukG1Zn1hUn-n68_U_6e4F8AAAD__9Cbk6M) between Sempra Infrastructure and ConocoPhillips.
## Fairview LDS Temple Approved
The Fairview Town Council yesterday [approved a revised plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GO5zHE0ULijR0mzalg_JcmUFxgOju32d2kz9IfWfuufd83cab9cHv90-7kS6PJY47XTlQKZTGQtsRyB5Hiie5EGOmebX7nUYEbDm0HMTorA_PUVZOT-AGUZEWSnYwKBygWvUwL43tBVkxC-mGYWoXVG0n-qkRQsq28vpVBi0IIUCgqlGqflBONdAtE_aSSSDnS0x1WanQw-YlPONJqZ7jVgW9lnJk1nwwNAzNdV21o0yJyitnaBbry8rQvDAMDUiGpgGGpsRr53P83mcf-N_LzBfr0-np4m8U_3XA8-ETMTRV0u64fAg-d4pJuG_Wh_eQ8j99p8afAAAA__-CPYNg) proposed by the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints to build a temple with a 120-foot spire, ending a yearlong dispute that pitted religious freedom concerns against the community’s desire to retain its small-town character. The decision came during a packed meeting after [hours of public comment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGStCAUhE-DGdbjiYMGBH9iNn-6oYXwHKlFsYSRmdtvOXuETburu_rrr_t4Nz747fHfrKTza47jRiUFypmOMdO6BzL7fsSTXIgxkV3M9qARAVsOLQcxOuPDe5SV0xO4XlSkhZI36BX2UC16cq6HyUyNkqZTqu2g6eQMslGt6BvTVV5fZdCCEAIEqhql6nrlVAO3ecJOMgnkfI5HnRfK9DJpDu940lHbuFZBLznviTX_GA4Mh1JKbad0UVw-w-ETYThcEsNhNv44PRWeY9m4jc_N-sCDS_wXl9u4rs_N5zffn2mZjP1mOFSHdnvxIfh0U0zCYzU-fAbkv912avwJAAD__9kFgww) from 40 residents and church members. Opponents of the temple wore green, while supporters wore blue. Mayor Henry Lessner, who voted to approve the temple, admitted it was “not what we wanted” but said a lawsuit would threaten the city’s resources. When completed, the church will be [the town’s tallest building](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupiAQhZ8GO8w4omhBsY3d3XZLgzAqySgGiN7_7TfuPsJtz0lOzvf9-Zq_bOBwbr_tQaZ8r3E-6clMpVCaCx0Xk72uFG_yHGMmt9tzoxkBOwmdhGb2NvBnVpU3C_ixqcg0WvUwahyh2o1y3ejGnqC1XeexI7W4cUW7tAit07oK5h2DDpqmgQZ1jUoPo_a6hX5dcFBCAflQYqrLToW-bV75E29KtYtHxWYv5cqi_SVwEjg9z1Ofi_Pr89YCp5dH4MTRWRY4fcgmjucmF1sKk1xtSHegR7p45uApZXlROkJ5g_KCpxwsS_ZZ_vchcGoHHLAHgVOVjL-ewBxyr4WC7bCB_x0rP9N5G_wbAAD__7BNiwg). A church spokesperson said the new temple is needed to serve the region’s 100,000 members. “ _We believe we have the freedom in this country to practice how we believe_ ,” [said a member](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-upCAUxp8GOwycQdGCYpKN3d1miy0NFw5KgmAAdebtN84-wu3OyZd8f35_v-Yv7YOPy2-9oaovl-aIVwlYK-a54rYH1Pue04k2pFTQrDouOAODjrKOMj5b7cN7Fo1V38yOvEHFpejZKGFkzaoGZ3qHCGboenRu0Ix3cjSjEPiwPfSNV7cZ6xjnnHGQLQg5jNLKB-vdNwyCCIbW15TbumLFly4uvNOJuTVpa4Jaa90LeTwJTASm67rarcRbIzBhpEchMN2jCEyf-_IhUKd9Pj1eVEdLgy3UrEc2K3U-WmrStqVIl5yOz3dE4wNddF0xF-pSpv_J0DNVJDDpTJ9P_uvPMS1NVna_E3zpJRFs2bQPn6L1Z3hPBf8CAAD__7C0kRI) who attended the meeting. “ _This is what God wants_.”
## 8 Million Dimes Spilled in Crash
An 18-wheeler overturned on U.S. 287 in Wise County Tuesday morning, [spilling $800,000 in freshly minted dimes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGupCAQBdCvwR0dLLHRBYvZuHuznaWhoVCSkjLAtK__fuL8wltWKjm59_75Wr9copS33-5A274jrxmvStgalrXhcRK68yz8xkDMFf3u8oYrKBilGqXq1-ASfVbdBftSYe47tL3RTzUbmFW328kPgGBUBB80woxhGGdAo3WMrxF8l-yNqVH1fa96MA_QZppNMIN6xhdMWmiFITUuj7Zjw29XI334jeXh-ejI7q2dVQy_BCwCluu6HvnlQ7zut4Dl7iNgIfaOBCxHIkqcq-QoQzqwynomIslZFnbhch_piWvKm9zTtt83TEamLB29uQQZucid_5YbHSaYlDIClq7YcF63XZ9GaLUdLtH_gO1ns74t_AsAAP__r2-M1Q) and shutting down the highway for 14 hours as crews recovered the loose change. According to the Texas Department of Public Safety, the crash happened around 5:30 a.m. when the driver [veered off the road and overcorrected](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GO8zliqIFxTZ2s-2WBuGqZFGMMMP49hv3Ff7uFCfn5Pv-vKaX8cEf62-zk87fJU4HlRQoZ7qmTPsZyJznFT_kQoyJ7GaOlSYEbDm0HMTkjA_3JCunZ3CDqEgLJTsYFA5QbZp664zFwTRt3_WNxEXIGZqZFisHQKi8fsagBSEECFQ1StUPyqkGumXGXjIJ5HyOV503yvQ1aQl3_NBV27hXQW85n4k1vxiODMdSSr3Er3wwngLD8YkMx3y97d8QjePO75R4On0IiccjR158Im7j-8g33_y6FXNXl3Zn8SH41CkmYd2ND_8v889EfTT-CwAA__94Wn7j). The driver and a passenger were transported to a nearby hospital with non-life-threatening injuries. Crews used [shovels, vacuums, and their hands](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL8GM6wLg6IBwUvM5qUbWihXpfYqFrAy8_dbzi9s3Kf6VPfXc3xaT_5Y_9sdTX4tYTywJMKcMY4Z95PQnmcMFzoKIeG82WPFUYJsODQcxOisp_eoKmcmcL2o0AitWui17KHajJqw6VSL86JmBW5pheutnWzbwLxMsqu8ucugASEECKlrqXTXa6cf0N6AYgrQ-RxinTfM-LJpoXe4MNZz2CsyW85nYo9_TA5MDqWUegmve8WdMzn8JCaHOWJJvIT4zSPm6PFC3vHdE_lwcOd3TDydnggd_zj45tet2HcVjTvLzaVWMwXrbj19zPlvf11G_gYAAP__rliCCQ) to pick up the coins from the road and nearby brush. It’s unclear why the truck was carrying millions of loose dimes.

On this day in 1980, the officially became the 23rd franchise in the National Basketball Association. The team’s home court was the 17,007-seat Reunion Arena, built by the city of Dallas the previous year. A gator was spotted along a popular walking trail in McAllen earlier this week. Before it could be relocated, it posed for a glamour shot. Check it out ! Today's sponsor is , helping you protect your personal information online. Officials have not determined the cause of the collapse. Construction contractor Bechtel Global Corporation has , and the federal Occupational Safety and Health Administration is investigating the incident. The Port Arthur LNG project, currently in phase 1 of construction, is a between Sempra Infrastructure and ConocoPhillips. Fairview LDS Temple Approved The Fairview Town Council yesterday proposed by the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints to build a temple with a 120-foot spire, ending a yearlong dispute that pitted religious freedom concerns against the community’s desire to retain its small-town character. The decision came during a packed meeting after from 40 residents and church members. Opponents of the temple wore green, while supporters wore blue. Mayor Henry Lessner, who voted to approve the temple, admitted it was “not what we wanted” but said a lawsuit would threaten the city’s resources. When completed, the church will be . A church spokesperson said the new temple is needed to serve the region’s 100,000 members. “ We believe we have the freedom in this country to practice how we believe ,” who attended the meeting. “ This is what God wants.” 8 Million Dimes Spilled in Crash An 18-wheeler overturned on U.S. 287 in Wise County Tuesday morning, and shutting down the highway for 14 hours as crews recovered the loose change. According to the Texas Department of Public Safety, the crash happened around 5:30 a.m. when the driver . The driver and a passenger were transported to a nearby hospital with non-life-threatening injuries. Crews used to pick up the coins from the road and nearby brush. It’s unclear why the truck was carrying millions of loose dimes. | Flying together with our sponsor Put an End to Those Pesky Spam Calls There are few things more frustrating than dashing across the room to answer your ringing phone, only to see "Potential Spam" on the caller ID (probably for the third time today). Peter, _The Strong Church Podcast_ , hosted by Pastor Lucas Miles, brings you weekly conversations with pastors, leaders, and culture shapers who confront the confusion and compromise threatening today’s Church. This podcast empowers you to strengthen your faith and defend biblical truth in today’s culture. Episode 1 is live now! _"Heresy, Unity, and the Future of the Church”_ with special guest Elijah Lamb

[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWPG2-2Bs8WlW3bGyV43bRPrrW7FnbcL5w2GJ7N6fpSWl3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3k_W2knFVm1nW3LFW7QJbwJ33w45DW8RMWr07ysrF4W3DRql02SwjbFW17Lnkf7tFLG4W3pcKZV2qSphsW1G2ygt4WsxsTW80_Drr89xgJTW7MDkYn2lDMN3W3gb31152cH5nW6CLnNW2ghFBlN6hCNN7bFtCDW7YX6mL3VmY4kN4l7pnBGTlscW3PLbMT7-xR0pW7-Pd0m8f_Y-GW1BPpWw8F8MqgW853W6y6Xb1NWW9k31Wb2mf70tW6VcRnt5xKWJxV3MRs83Zg-SgN6jrBdSYwqcnN4LKvdCJDms5W6-Py7213P8Bvf54ykpq04)

In this launch episode, Lucas and Elijah get real about:
* Why “heresy” is a word we must use carefully — not casually
* Where unity ends and truth must divide
* What Gen Z actually wants from the Church (spoiler: it’s not fog machines)
* Why biblical preaching isn’t just for Sundays — it’s for worldview formation

If you're tired of watered-down Christianity and ready to stand firm on biblical truth, this podcast is for you.

| Since Trump has returned to the White House, he has only caused chaos by imposing his extremist agenda. And now he's upending the core of our democracy by laughing at the Supreme Court and our Constitution!! Trump has been stripping Americans of their fundamental rights, threatening to cut lifesaving programs like Medicaid and Social Security, and forcing working families to pay more for basic needs. And what's even worse: _Trump and his MAGA allies are betting that you won't mind!_ But we know you’re TIRED of bearing this MAGA burden, aren’t you? We know you want to make your voice heard and fight back against Trump’s disregard for the Constitution. [This fight to protect our democracy won't be easy, but Democrats will need your support if they want to continue holding Trump's administration accountable. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7b49468-d0ce-4623-ba26-85a0f560fb90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We know you want to make your voice heard and fight back against Trump’s disregard for the Constitution. | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, The Blue Amp Action Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/1/2025
body:
“Drawing the line”: School boards warn HB25-1312 oversteps on parental rights, brings policy chaos
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
It was a long night at the Capitol for HB25-1312—8+ hours of testimony. Don’t worry, we stayed through it so you didn’t have to. Keep an eye on our social media for updates later this morning, and we’ll be back in your inbox Friday with more coverage and analysis.
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Over [70 school board members](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) oppose HB25-1312, warning it will expose districts to costly lawsuits. Lawmakers may call a [special session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) if Medicaid cuts cost Colorado up to $1B. A controversial immigration bill is drawing backlash over [ICE restrictions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and funding risks. Meanwhile, Democrats are [hiking fees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) across sectors, prompting criticism for raising costs despite affordability promises.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** New reports highlight a [stark divide on homelessness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): Denver backs housing-first, while Aurora focuses on work-first—both models will soon be tested side by side. After the [Colorado Springs raid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), former ICE director John Fabbricatore explained how detainee processing varies by charges. And starting May 7, [Real ID will be required](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for air travel in Colorado.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A new op-ed challenges media narratives on immigration, pointing out that deportation numbers under Trump [trail behind Biden](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Bush, and even Clinton.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, May 1, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“Drawing the line”: School boards warn HB25-1312 oversteps on parental rights, brings policy chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
More than 70 school board members and education leaders have signed a letter urging lawmakers to reject HB25-1312, also known as the Kelly Loving Act.
Jason Jorgenson, secretary of the District 11 Board of Education and a lead organizer of the opposition letter, said HB25-1312 “risks encouraging youth to pursue a path of gender transition without appropriate parental involvement.”
Andrea Haitz, president of the District 51 Board of Education, warned that the bill “risks placing schools in an even more precarious legal position, especially when parents disagree on matters like gender identity or preferred names.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado braces for special session over bloated Medicaid spending amid federal pressure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado could lose as much as $1 billion in federal Medicaid funding under GOP budget proposals, forcing deep cuts to the state’s largest program without backfill from the general fund.
* With no plan in place, state officials expect to return to the Capitol this summer to decide where to slash spending, with health care leaders warning of job losses and reduced access to care statewide.
* Gov. Polis, health advocates, and even some Republicans are urging Congress to reject the cuts, arguing they would devastate rural providers and impact children, seniors, and people with disabilities the hardest.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[“Sitting on a powder keg”: Opponents slam SB25-276 for shielding illegal aliens, risking federal funds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Sheriffs and county commissioners warn that Senate Bill 276 would restrict cooperation with ICE, risking billions in federal funding and forcing law enforcement to choose between state law and public safety.
* The bill bans arrests based solely on immigration detainers and blocks federal agents from accessing schools, jails, and hospitals without a warrant—threatening steep fines for local officials who violate it.
* The bill passed the Senate, but heated debate continues in the House, especially after some Democrats compared immigration enforcement to the Holocaust—prompting sharp rebukes from Jewish lawmakers.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Denver vs. Aurora: Homelessness reports reveal two competing visions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A state-backed report supports Denver’s housing-first model—rapid placement in permanent housing—while a competing private study backs Aurora’s work-first model focused on job training and accountability.
* Despite Denver moving 5,000 people into housing, critics say it hasn’t made a meaningful dent in homelessness. Aurora’s model ties long-term shelter to work or treatment, aiming for self-sufficiency.
* The reports clash over how to use federal funds—Denver calls for more housing investment, while Aurora’s backers argue for flexibility to fund alternatives like job-readiness and addiction treatment.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Walcher: We built it, and they still won’t come](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY GREG WALCHER****| COMMENTARY | APRIL 29** _Building a new subdivision is complicated. Almost every city and county in America have master plans dictating “conforming uses” of land. Most specify lot and home sizes, rules for vehicle access, water supply, sewage disposal, flood control, affordable housing, and park space._
**[Was it the people’s town hall — or a political playbook in action?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV NE CO NEWSROOM | LOCAL | APRIL 29** _On April 26, more than 100 residents gathered at the Moxi Theater in downtown Greeley for a two-hour town hall organized by progressive groups, including Vote Save America PAC. Billed as “The People’s Town Hall: Where is Gabe?” – the event gave attendees from across the political spectrum a chance to speak up about representation, leadership, and what they want to see from elected officials._
**[Clock runs out on social media bill: lawmakers shield themselves and Polis from historic override](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | APRIL 28** _Without casting a single “no” vote, Colorado lawmakers on April 28 killed a bipartisan attempt to override Governor Jared Polis’ veto of a social media regulation bill. Just days earlier, the Senate had voted 29–6 to override the veto of Senate Bill 25-086, marking the state’s first successful chamber override of a policy bill in more than a decade._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** The Gateway Arch in St. Louis, Missouri stands **630 feet tall** —towering over the Statue of Liberty (305 feet) and the Washington Monument (555 feet). Completed in 1965 and designed by architect Eero Saarinen, the arch honors the city’s pivotal role in America’s westward expansion.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "This is no time for ease and comfort. It is time to dare and endure." – Winston Churchill
|
---

Almost every city and county in America have master plans dictating “conforming uses” of land. Most specify lot and home sizes, rules for vehicle access, water supply, sewage disposal, flood control, affordable housing, and park space. RMV NE CO NEWSROOM | LOCAL | APRIL 29 On April 26, more than 100 residents gathered at the Moxi Theater in downtown Greeley for a two-hour town hall organized by progressive groups, including Vote Save America PAC. Billed as “The People’s Town Hall: Where is Gabe?” – the event gave attendees from across the political spectrum a chance to speak up about representation, leadership, and what they want to see from elected officials. JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | APRIL 28 Without casting a single “no” vote, Colorado lawmakers on April 28 killed a bipartisan attempt to override Governor Jared Polis’ veto of a social media regulation bill. Just days earlier, the Senate had voted 29–6 to override the veto of Senate Bill 25-086, marking the state’s first successful chamber override of a policy bill in more than a decade. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? The Gateway Arch in St. Louis, Missouri stands 630 feet tall —towering over the Statue of Liberty (305 feet) and the Washington Monument (555 feet). Completed in 1965 and designed by architect Eero Saarinen, the arch honors the city’s pivotal role in America’s westward expansion. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "This is no time for ease and comfort. It is time to dare and endure." – Winston Churchill | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Riley Gaines
subject: President Trump is Investigating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project](https://go
body:
We’ve got a President who cares about keeping us safe, and the APP is supporting him every step of the way. Here’s ...

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
%recipient.first%, when fencer Stephanie Turner refused to compete against a biological male at the NCAA women’s fencing championships**she stood up for every female athlete’s right to a fair shot.**
Her courage caught President Trump’s attention, and now he’s launched an investigation into colleges allowing transgender policies that put women’s sports - _and women's safety_ \- at risk.
At the American Principles Project, we’re honored to have fueled this fight and we’re celebrating this major win for our daughters.
**[This investigation, targeting violations of Title IX, is a direct result of APP’s tireless advocacy](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).**

[DESTROY GENDER IDEOLOGY EXTREMISM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We’ve been sounding the alarm on policies that force women like Stephanie to face unfair and dangerous situations... We’ve rallied supporters like you to demand change... And without our work, the Department of Education would still be prioritizing _ideology_ over _fairness_.
President Trump’s action is proof: **We are making****waves****and _holding these institutions_** _**accountable**_**for failing female athletes.**

[DESTROY GENDER IDEOLOGY EXTREMISM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This victory reaches far beyond fencing: It’s about _every girl_ who dreams of competing, from _high school tracks_ to _college arenas._ The investigation could reshape how schools enforce Title IX, ensuring women’s sports remain a sanctuary for biological females.
**_[APP is already pressing forward, advocating for nationwide policies to protect female athletes’ safety and opportunities](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Your support drives this progress. By standing with us, you’re helping shield girls from policies that, as Stephanie’s case showed, dismiss their rights and safety.
If these fights are important to you, [**please consider chipping in whatever you can**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) to make sure we can keep bringing these fights to the Left, and destroying _Gender Ideology Extremism._

[DESTROY GENDER IDEOLOGY EXTREMISM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_With courage,_

**Riley Gaines** American Principles Project

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/apzR/?__vbtrk=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4MDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Need your input: the first 100 days!
body:
Please fill out our survey about President Trump’s first 100 days, and where you want to go from here.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Now that that President Donald Trump has hit the milestone of his first 100 days in office and has fulfilled many of the promises he made, we want to do two things: celebrate his accomplishments for the American people and **[get your feedback](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aabd9680/1edb9794aabd10da "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/action/100-days")** about how it's going and where we need to go from here.
But before we go any further, I also want to thank you because there is no doubt that President Trump is in the White House thanks to the work you did! There would be no "first 100 days" to celebrate without you. **_Thank you._****_
_**Just look at this partial list of the promises made and kept by President Trump in his first 100 days --and keep in mind this is just a list about border security and immigration!
* _Secured the border -- crossings down 95%, gotaways down 99%_
* _Restarted and expanded border wall construction_
* _Launched largest deportation operation in U.S. history_
* _Arrested 150,000+ illegal aliens, including gang members and criminals_
* _Ended catch-and-release_
* _Banned welfare and federal benefits for illegals_
* _Declared violent migrant gangs terrorist organizations_
* _Signed the Laken Riley Act into law_
* _Invoked Alien Enemies Act to dismantle criminal networks_
* _Shut down Biden 's migrant entry app_
* _Cracked down on sanctuary cities_
** _You made all of these achievements possible!_**
Now, I would be so grateful if you would take just a few minutes to fill out our grassroots survey about how things are going and what you want to see happen in the next 100 days and beyond. Which policies are really happy about and what do you want to see more of? **Please fill out the survey as soon as you can, so that we can ensure that Tea Party Patriots Action best represents the grassroots in every way.********************************** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ COMPLETE MY SURVEY ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aabd9680/1edb9794aabd10dc)
---
| **** ************ Lastly, the left is on a rampage to delay and obstruct President Trump's America First agenda. They'd rather Americans suffer than allow President Trump to deliver on his promises. Part of the reason is that they want an advantage going in to the 2026 midterm elections. They want to say things have not gotten better under the president and conservatives controlling Congress. They also want to scare members of Congress away from supporting President Trump's America First agenda.
Therefore, it is so crucial to the success of America First that we are all taking action when needed. Please make sure to read our call-to-action emails and complete those actions requested in each email. While America First won the election, it won't succeed without the grassroots taking action to support it.
**Thank you again for all you do, and don 't forget to celebrate President Trump's first 100 days on social media if you use it, and to **[**fill out our survey**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aabd9680/1edb9794aabd10de)** as soon as you can!****
**Here 's to many more years of promises made, promises kept!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************
---

---
|

name: Ayla & Amy
subject: The Flyover Podcast— Your New Daily News Fix in 15 minutes
body:
Are you fed up with mainstream media outlets like MSNBC, CNN, and The New York Times constantly pushing their agendas instead of giving you the straight facts?

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCknyQKahIKFPkotHYn9TXQ4KubmsPeANGmKv8B8gdRFMxvfY1v_S1Pus7mZmBBEnu8W7diA6hIMOeBRF9JzyfcMrnOsJIyBsJ5VIafNKPIcbacXo2nXCUCmRI98wbtJSjavdJ8YbxzUXM2NC79ioHEg-yB-LS3y2utc9Azqd9YY0GdkWBhuyO1j7VLyWpZBNss9JH2GPZv8DjH80gP-lcmo%3D)
