Hey there! We’re Ayla & Amy, hosts of [**The Flyover Podcast**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCknyQKahIKFPkotHYn9TXQ4KubmsPeANGmKv8B8gdRFMxvfY1v_S1Pus7mZmBBEnu-NwTuFYjtoCCA36Tad-wf9I6oRL1yd9IVp1y_cDtv-oZknzmj0oxHZxPnUTpkVh21getsKnf9T3wmGme_BdkpjHwm-nY-SY_YKjkVthxEsGaQWQrJ_oskO5FxsuC-C9fEgOrty0tqYb87auH3Z818M%3D) — your new go-to source for quick, unbiased daily news in just 15 minutes. | **Ayla** | **Amy**
---|---
Every day of the week, we break down the biggest stories across politics, business, sports, culture, and more. No noise. No hidden agendas. Just the day’s top headlines you need to start your day — with a few laughs sprinkled in to keep it light.
Whether you're commuting, working out, walking the dog or sipping your morning coffee, we're here to help you stay in the know without the stress.
Here’s how you can join us:
• **Listen + follow** on [Spotify](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCnhVbMnS3I_dMeeOB3pYwor_K1zTlv24s9jhivDJCCXhbds7gSYyI9rEc2DRyQs6PPkm4JDP2VbebladkpcVtn_YJT_3rCLLQOjWbbjSVPKGb0uAnygP4ee1ucCOwheNCsVPVtvGQfj7YCE9TDCHQVOuz3aov5X6GZ24F9oYL-w0x146D5FnlGQisn1vaqMwvFZ5BR-PUuoKfhcgFkJOmS9Ucf6g-ZJAgXCchEvCNYdQ) and [Apple Music](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCjSOpYbP7Oh9sKNh5AEluXGyAVEmSxbv_RoeRhaV4OX9r3ttGwhssyP4g7VXhNyW-bQW1KjgrQQBE0dIguZZnpTfRNxJT-q9UzVoRbAHFLSZVdJJnY84swZe2xp9fH9FrBQKn7X4okZGOjJWmklyw_so4GqaAnuvj96mw96NwHxbGSzsjMzs-qr67S9rRfquGxmYVk8tYXchUBt5kFiZeluzVS1xjQagjV-NF6A_-197-4khxpx480qLPykh10u6wQ%3D%3D)
• [**Watch + subscribe**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCknyQKahIKFPkotHYn9TXQ4KubmsPeANGmKv8B8gdRFMxvfY1v_S1Pus7mZmBBEnu6TPiOW0VQxB_WD6g7sYUU_-X2dKoBccmpqpK0uP18wr_ZyXxewN6y8EgBfC7F6UQtAoPeAZoAEl5JqcUGECoUGn7MCUbVsGuBbMx4D5-hIvgpnkj4pHqw3kD8wDQtct2eoHVcNGjB3GyjKOxSlNnO8%3D) on YouTube at [@WatchTheFlyover](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a0581de9f004043be5dff86605bff5a&_e=SPUyhbqBapn4JDafyT9eCknyQKahIKFPkotHYn9TXQ4KubmsPeANGmKv8B8gdRFMxvfY1v_S1Pus7mZmBBEnu2RoAL8Di9dFQW7XAf8APyF0WRNn6kD2vOAPSZbEmZt2VbJmMEb6zMQNEdMpc0AImKxIKG_BJneHTRf2Aw1z0aDzI90CG9rD11s-tIaBXKTm6gWdkeqbqMtoI8HvYZug5QK3jDM6TkIR-w-teZT2fGU%3D)

name: DOGE Alerts
subject: “If you’re a fascist, get a Tesla.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Neil Young takes direct aim at Elon Musk.

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8kaftg4btfeqpgc9t2e1rfgq4422bp5uamu2duo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chi6eo34c5h2bs)
---
****[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn3m0isnal2eg5a09intdegdsp6grnf1qqjpbajg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chi6eo34c5h2bs)

Singer/Songwriter and Liberal activist Neil Young debuted a new song that took **DIRECT AIM** at Elon Musk and the Trump administration.
**“If you’re a fascist, get a Tesla”** is a slap in the face to the **80 million Patriots** who voted for President Trump and stand behind his and Elon Musk’s leadership.
**The sad truth is: it’s not just deranged Neil Young who is smearing Elon Musk’s good name. It’s the entirety of the Democratic Party and every liberal activist in the U.S.**
They’re testing our loyalty; They think that calling us fascists will make us abandon Trump and Elon.
[But we’ll NEVER abandon President Trump and Elon Musk - not after all they’ve done to save America.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0gqqedtmej7tdlqt7hl2hc08f8qtiqjan0t99f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chi6eo34c5h2bs)

[STAND WITH TRUMP & ELON](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv8jqfdhsc8faj08jbakpsahafd6jemdqi2oo9e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chi6eo34c5h2bs)

Before they can levy their next round of attacks, can we count on you to **go on the record** and say: “I STAND WITH TRUMP AND ELON!”
Time is of the essence - we can’t possibly wait any longer for your response.

[STAND WITH TRUMP & ELON](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z30bujeoo64b7mfdleglp53qcs0a2ltrjr6pqid0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chi6eo34c5h2bs)

Ted Cruz here.

subject: A time for reflection
body:

| | Peter, In America, we observe a National Day of Prayer on the first Thursday in May. It’s meant to be a moment of national unity - a time to put aside our differences, reflect on our faith, and take meaningful action rooted in compassion and service.

That same spirit is at the heart of my new book, Heaven Help Us, which highlights how places of worship and faith-based organizations across the country are stepping up to solve real problems and strengthen the communities they serve. You can learn more at: [HeavenHelpUsBook.com](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/G7UaurMY0lz9t2xrLpHh9RO4GUPQnaLwW3mBIBPwruDZLyZgiGxZkzcY_ChcD43Zx_q2sG6vXjD709MycIy8-W2kd0FI_hsB1BeKVZ0glHUvfiIeTAt5DzJSZ4b5ZMFQ3mL-020dnX79S_t1JvKqaTxyNbpQu08htu--iRoDWGG0k3QmzCjwYsKEccz17hNCUZa65E1tC4rCeqWDkIfUf32zB3EHm7SDuIAF-f_dAo0OaEZ4mMA_zzgH7p9EYc7yVaU04S4Zor76cwl_6z2h0c7iy1EFPQ/9ocZ8Xsu8J7kLeo4exsX0PWhWK19kf0l/8)

_**Dear Reader:** Views expressed in featured op eds are not necessarily held by PolitiBrawl or PolitiBrawl's editorial staff. We aim to feature a wide spectrum of thought-provoking political perspectives to foster discourse. Thank you for your readership and support!_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9dddbba4-1b6c-4d8e-b1fb-8fb7ab519165?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Daniel Turner**
The cult of climate change recently lost one of its high priests, Pope Francis I, and humanity and the planet itself are far better off.
That is not easy for me, a lifelong Catholic from devoutly Catholic Irish and Italian parents, to write about anyone recently deceased, let alone a Pope, but it is my moral imperative. Fossil fuels have reduced human misery, made people healthier and more prosperous, and any effort to eliminate them is a threat against humanity itself.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7Ay5Z23VUGfklxiCRjNI06sE2IinVGHQtKyq8vTHXWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162611210)
Pope Francis hated fossil fuels and said so often. Francis ignorantly **[proclaimed](https://substack.com/redirect/2f6db886-8c44-448f-b425-a71e16c8da5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "enough fossil fuels!" adding we must "end the era of fossil fuels".
Francis spoke about climate like a typical, boring, aged-hippie politician: soaring rhetoric indifferent to the dangerous applications. The result of ending the era of fossil fuels would be death, not life; disease, not health; misery, not well-being.
Intellectual leftists have long relished the ability to agitate in the world of pure thought and immunize themselves from the ugly reality of their ideas put into action. Marxists are the best example of this as they effortlessly distinguish between Marx in theory and Marx in application. They have no shame in dismissing 150 years of Marxist bloodshed flippantly as "that wasn't real Marxism" keeping their ideas pure.
Francis did this on climate, and it was cowardice born of privilege.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/9de666e8-c0f5-4fce-b8e2-486c3dc8ee3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9de666e8-c0f5-4fce-b8e2-486c3dc8ee3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/9de666e8-c0f5-4fce-b8e2-486c3dc8ee3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/9de666e8-c0f5-4fce-b8e2-486c3dc8ee3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/9de666e8-c0f5-4fce-b8e2-486c3dc8ee3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
Francis on climate reminded me of Ghandi on politics. In his masterpiece _Modern Times_ **[Paul Johnson](https://substack.com/redirect/bfbb1b25-9515-4be0-bf4f-ebd80ce42359?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** wrote Ghandi "could have flourished only in the protected environment provided by British liberalism." Without the British Empire, and all that it provided the impoverished Indian people, a figure like Ghandi with all the worldwide accolades and media fanfare, could not have emerged. It was not "despite" but "because of" the Empire, Ghandi could become Ghandi. The British structures made Ghandi but he was too arrogant to recognize it.
So, too, with Francis. He condemned fossil fuels as Ghandi condemned The Crown, but it is exactly those structures of a fossil fuel economy which allowed for his 68 worldwide papal **[visits](https://substack.com/redirect/434ffa9e-57f1-4263-b2cf-a6be0826506d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Where was Francis' notorious humility to recognize the millions of free market exchanges by free people which produced the energy for his Papacy? Pope Saint John Paul II wrote in his 1981 encyclical _**[Laborem Exercens](https://substack.com/redirect/badf9ce5-72a8-4048-8af6-239caf40646e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ of the dignity of work, especially the rigorous manual labor you find in oil, gas, and coal industries. Real work full of dignity and purpose.
Pope Francis **[linked](https://substack.com/redirect/67cb9827-4389-4bb5-8a05-a634cd5a5b0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the fossil fuel industry to pornography.
On Ghandi, Johnson said "His food policy would have led to mass starvation." So, too, with Francis. If Francis had the ability to enact climate policy, death would result.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7Ay5Z23VUGfklxiCRjNI06sE2IinVGHQtKyq8vTHXWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162611210)
Look at recent events on the Iberian Peninsula with **[complete blackouts](https://substack.com/redirect/3ee11563-307f-4af3-8356-a2d8f76bbeb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** just days after **[boasting](https://substack.com/redirect/aeff9c01-de01-4d06-b1aa-fb2c4ac48c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about their "100% green" grid. Thousands trapped in elevators and underground in subways. Thousands locked out of smart doors, stranded, unable to buy food because most stores use electronic payment and hardly anyone carries cash. We'll never know the death toll as it does not fit the renewables narrative required in modern Europe.
Even before the grid collapse, the cost of "going green" in Spain was painful. Electricity **[averages](https://substack.com/redirect/ff08d874-f167-4e92-ba26-9c5068719718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** $0.33 per kwh compared to **[America's](https://substack.com/redirect/a4602af6-c2a4-43d6-a12e-2a3a21bb5c16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** $0.15. Gas currently **[averages](https://substack.com/redirect/fac3db35-809f-41c1-a6b1-46f91404d93c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** $5.74 a gallon compared to **[America's](https://substack.com/redirect/cb7b1769-7930-4981-addc-ce6bc500606a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** $3.16. Spain has **[11%](https://substack.com/redirect/8615d796-37c5-4976-b126-9fe5b006be9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** unemployment partly because its industrial utility rates **[have risen](https://substack.com/redirect/4e4dec98-b1b8-46a9-8f4f-7f91e9ca8e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 22% in the past two years.
Spain is just one country but there is no country in the world, not one, that can point to "going green" as a success if success is honestly understood as grid reliability and consumer cost. If success is understood as a virtue signaling and political talking points, congrats, Spain, you're winning.
"Ole!" they shouted from the darkness as grandma's dialysis machine turned off. "Somos muy verdes".
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7Ay5Z23VUGfklxiCRjNI06sE2IinVGHQtKyq8vTHXWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162611210)
That is the green agenda's only metric of success: a political talking point. No one benefits from green, and the entire agenda sucks us dry of money with endless subsidies renamed "investments". A final observation of Johnson's criticism of Ghandi: "as one of his circle observed: 'It costs a great deal of money to keep Ghandi living in poverty'."
So, too, with Francis. The fossil fuel economy sustained him and his Papacy the way the British system sustained Ghandi, all so both could signal to the world how far above it and morally superior they were.
Virtue signaling is deadly.
Brazil is hosting the next worldwide climate love fest, and in preparation, it **[bulldozed](https://substack.com/redirect/ae42cbfa-6d86-4cbf-80f0-2abd0c2c2010?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tens of thousands of acres of the Amazon. For the earth! Or something. That is very much Francis' climate vision: political theater all to look apolitical. A fossil fuel powered papacy to using its powers to condemn fossil fuels.
There is more humility in Dolly Parton **[saying](https://substack.com/redirect/99f51539-6e19-4e0c-b16b-e4caaf98107a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "it costs a lot of money to look this cheap" than there was in the climate Pope. Dolly's observation was rooted in brutally honest, self-aware truth. Pope Francis' ignorance let him travel the world to condemn his means of transportation. Abject silliness if not downright insulting. If you really hate fossil fuels, Holy Father, you could have stayed home.
Ghandi was a larger than life figure whose persona was greater than his person. Francis was the same. Yet, in both men, the practical application of their beliefs, not as a reductio ad absurdum, but as policy implementation, show the hollowness of their political philosophy. Marxism has always failed. And green Marxism has always failed and is failing. Everywhere it is applied, everywhere it is tried, climate policies have been a disaster. Expensive. Unreliable. Intermittent. Indefensible.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7Ay5Z23VUGfklxiCRjNI06sE2IinVGHQtKyq8vTHXWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162611210)
Wind and solar are lousy substitutes for reliable electricity production, but fossil fuels are so much more. I would need all of Substack to list the millions of products made from petrochemicals like contact lenses and laundry detergent or provided to the masses more inexpensively because of fossil fuels like food, hot water, and utilities. All of that is on the line when the intellectual elite like Francis say "enough fossil fuels".
There is no dignity condemning people to die in pain "for the planet". There is nothing humanitarian in causing dysentery from rancid food or suffering from the bitter cold "for the planet". There is no praise of creation to foist misery on God's greatest creation - man - for the earth. That is misanthropy at best, neo-paganism at worst, and all of it guaranteed, as an inevitable result of the kind of climate prescriptions coming from the climate left, including the late Pope Francis.
Energy is everything. It is life. It is the economy, national security, geopolitical stability, world peace. It is human dignity and prosperity. It is so much greater than the lofty rhetoric of the aged, globalist elite. The sooner the ideas of the pagan, misanthropic, evil climate cult are dead, the better off all humanity will be. Until then, we keep fighting. Honor and courage.
* * *
_Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on X @DanielTurnerPTF_

clean_body: The cult of climate change recently lost one of its high priests, Pope Francis I, and humanity and the planet itself are far better off... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The cult of climate change recently lost one of its high priests, Pope Francis I, and humanity and the planet itself are far better off... May 1 | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Reader: Views expressed in featured op eds are not necessarily held by PolitiBrawl or PolitiBrawl's editorial staff. We aim to feature a wide spectrum of thought-provoking political perspectives to foster discourse. Thank you for your readership and support! | | ---|---|--- By Daniel Turner The cult of climate change recently lost one of its high priests, Pope Francis I, and humanity and the planet itself are far better off. That is not easy for me, a lifelong Catholic from devoutly Catholic Irish and Italian parents, to write about anyone recently deceased, let alone a Pope, but it is my moral imperative. Fossil fuels have reduced human misery, made people healthier and more prosperous, and any effort to eliminate them is a threat against humanity itself. Pope Francis hated fossil fuels and said so often. Francis ignorantly "enough fossil fuels!" adding we must "end the era of fossil fuels". Francis spoke about climate like a typical, boring, aged-hippie politician: soaring rhetoric indifferent to the dangerous applications. The result of ending the era of fossil fuels would be death, not life; disease, not health; misery, not well-being. Intellectual leftists have long relished the ability to agitate in the world of pure thought and immunize themselves from the ugly reality of their ideas put into action. Marxists are the best example of this as they effortlessly distinguish between Marx in theory and Marx in application. They have no shame in dismissing 150 years of Marxist bloodshed flippantly as "that wasn't real Marxism" keeping their ideas pure. Francis did this on climate, and it was cowardice born of privilege. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here, | | ---|---|--- I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds. And now it looks like history is repeating itself. Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including: • More than 2 million lost jobs • Stocks plummeting over 20% • IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it. That's why I've put together during this downturn. and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. (Continued) Francis on climate reminded me of Ghandi on politics. In his masterpiece Modern Times wrote Ghandi "could have flourished only in the protected environment provided by British liberalism." Without the British Empire, and all that it provided the impoverished Indian people, a figure like Ghandi with all the worldwide accolades and media fanfare, could not have emerged. It was not "despite" but "because of" the Empire, Ghandi could become Ghandi. The British structures made Ghandi but he was too arrogant to recognize it. So, too, with Francis. He condemned fossil fuels as Ghandi condemned The Crown, but it is exactly those structures of a fossil fuel economy which allowed for his 68 worldwide papal . Where was Francis' notorious humility to recognize the millions of free market exchanges by free people which produced the energy for his Papacy? Pope Saint John Paul II wrote in his 1981 encyclical of the dignity of work, especially the rigorous manual labor you find in oil, gas, and coal industries. Real work full of dignity and purpose. Pope Francis the fossil fuel industry to pornography. On Ghandi, Johnson said "His food policy would have led to mass starvation." So, too, with Francis. If Francis had the ability to enact climate policy, death would result. Look at recent events on the Iberian Peninsula with just days after about their "100% green" grid. Thousands trapped in elevators and underground in subways. Thousands locked out of smart doors, stranded, unable to buy food because most stores use electronic payment and hardly anyone carries cash. We'll never know the death toll as it does not fit the renewables narrative required in modern Europe. Even before the grid collapse, the cost of "going green" in Spain was painful. Electricity $0.33 per kwh compared to $0.15. Gas currently $5.74 a gallon compared to $3.16. Spain has unemployment partly because its industrial utility rates 22% in the past two years. Spain is just one country but there is no country in the world, not one, that can point to "going green" as a success if success is honestly understood as grid reliability and consumer cost. If success is understood as a virtue signaling and political talking points, congrats, Spain, you're winning. "Ole!" they shouted from the darkness as grandma's dialysis machine turned off. "Somos muy verdes". That is the green agenda's only metric of success: a political talking point. No one benefits from green, and the entire agenda sucks us dry of money with endless subsidies renamed "investments". A final observation of Johnson's criticism of Ghandi: "as one of his circle observed: 'It costs a great deal of money to keep Ghandi living in poverty'." So, too, with Francis. The fossil fuel economy sustained him and his Papacy the way the British system sustained Ghandi, all so both could signal to the world how far above it and morally superior they were. Virtue signaling is deadly. Brazil is hosting the next worldwide climate love fest, and in preparation, it tens of thousands of acres of the Amazon. For the earth! Or something. That is very much Francis' climate vision: political theater all to look apolitical. A fossil fuel powered papacy to using its powers to condemn fossil fuels. There is more humility in Dolly Parton "it costs a lot of money to look this cheap" than there was in the climate Pope. Dolly's observation was rooted in brutally honest, self-aware truth. Pope Francis' ignorance let him travel the world to condemn his means of transportation. Abject silliness if not downright insulting. If you really hate fossil fuels, Holy Father, you could have stayed home. Ghandi was a larger than life figure whose persona was greater than his person. Francis was the same. Yet, in both men, the practical application of their beliefs, not as a reductio ad absurdum, but as policy implementation, show the hollowness of their political philosophy. Marxism has always failed. And green Marxism has always failed and is failing. Everywhere it is applied, everywhere it is tried, climate policies have been a disaster. Expensive. Unreliable. Intermittent. Indefensible. Wind and solar are lousy substitutes for reliable electricity production, but fossil fuels are so much more. I would need all of Substack to list the millions of products made from petrochemicals like contact lenses and laundry detergent or provided to the masses more inexpensively because of fossil fuels like food, hot water, and utilities. All of that is on the line when the intellectual elite like Francis say "enough fossil fuels". There is no dignity condemning people to die in pain "for the planet". There is nothing humanitarian in causing dysentery from rancid food or suffering from the bitter cold "for the planet". There is no praise of creation to foist misery on God's greatest creation - man - for the earth. That is misanthropy at best, neo-paganism at worst, and all of it guaranteed, as an inevitable result of the kind of climate prescriptions coming from the climate left, including the late Pope Francis. Energy is everything. It is life. It is the economy, national security, geopolitical stability, world peace. It is human dignity and prosperity. It is so much greater than the lofty rhetoric of the aged, globalist elite. The sooner the ideas of the pagan, misanthropic, evil climate cult are dead, the better off all humanity will be. Until then, we keep fighting. Honor and courage. Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. name: PoliticsPA
subject: Game changer in Philly Politics
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into the Democratic Primary for Philadelphia’s District Attorney race, featuring candidate Judge **Pat Dugan** , who shares insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Judge Pat Dugan **cites one of his motivations for running for District Attorney as his belief that the current Philadelphia D.A. Larry Krasner has been ineffective, having “ruined businesses in the city” by “unilaterally changing the retail theft policy” and downgrading retail theft to merely a “ticketable offense or freebie,” a move he argues has led to increased theft and the closure of many businesses. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ca1502e216&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Judge Pat Dugan** emphasizes the importance of balancing “restorative and rehabilitative justice” with ensuring that “criminals running around with guns can be held accountable,” arguing that under Krasner’s administration, “79% of carjackings go completely unpunished, and in the remaining 21% of cases that proceed, the vast majority of defendants are found not guilty.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89e51611be&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Public Opinion_
* A poll released by the Krasner campaign shows Krasner leading Dugan by **37 points** , with **58%** overall support, including **51%** among White voters and a dominant **69%** among Black voters. [[DelawareValleyJournal](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=67e42bbc8f&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Regarding concerns about being mugged or robbed, Philadelphia residents report a high level of worry at **62.63** , while Pittsburgh residents have a much lower concern, with a score of **33.78**. [[Numero](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=320e7bddde&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* In 2024, the Philly D.A.’s office reported a **92%** trial-ready conviction rate for homicide shootings and an **82%** rate for non-fatal shootings, yet **46%** of firearm cases and **57%** of violent crime cases were withdrawn or dismissed, according to Krasner’s DAO’s data dashboard. [[ThePhiladelphiaCitizen](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=29562e0f42&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* In Philadelphia, homicides dropped by **52%** —from a peak of **562** in 2021 to **269** in 2024—while shootings fell by **54%** over the same period. [[PewCharitableTrusts](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=31c1f13a7e&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Participants in one of Krasner’s diversion programs were **4X** less likely to be arrested again compared to similar individuals who were convicted of illegal gun possession. [[WHYY](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb4a92443c&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Judge Pat Dugan in the Philadelphia D.A. Democratic Primary Race**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1894ccc2cd&e=b7b3eddce2 "Dugan challenges Krasner in Philly Dem's D.A. primary | Voices of Reason – feat. Judge Pat Dugan")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9e18db390b&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4bff0655b8&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=872086cc4e&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=71018d659b&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3737bde24d&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=869c95262a&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aa8df862a3&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d433da7acf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ea81d82cea&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._
You're getting _Voices of Reason_ updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=98ded9a9c8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=98ded9a9c8).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1)

I know you have a lot going on. I understand that everyone is pulled in many directions. Trust me, I get it. clean_body: This is not the email I wanted to send out this morning| | | Well, this is not the email I wanted to write to you this morning. Friend, we fell short of our monthly fundraising goal. It puts an even bigger target on our backs. I know you have a lot going on. I understand that everyone is pulled in many directions. Trust me, I get it. But if there is any way you can chip in just $7 right now, it would go a long way in helping us bounce back: No matter what, you have my word that I will continue fighting for New Jersey and for America. only strengthens my resolve to keep fighting. Thank you and be safe, Tom | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. name: Tom Fitton
subject: FWD These Are Unprecedented Times and We Need Your Help!
body:
Your support has never been more urgently needed than it is right now!

|
Dear Fellow American,

I want to be sure you saw my message from last week...because these really are unprecedented times and because we really _do_ need your help!

Conservatives are gaining ground, but the Left is fighting back with increasing ferocity every day on each of the battlegrounds that I mention in my email.

And that is why all of us at Judicial Watch are counting on you to stand with us today. **[Your gift at this time will mean so much to us!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**

Thank you very much for your commitment, and your help today.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President
Judicial Watch

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thur, April 24, 2025 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** These Are Unprecedented Times and We Need Your Help!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am [respectfully requesting your help today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) because these truly _are_ unprecedented times...and the financial demands upon your Judicial Watch are enormous!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**The fact is that the challenges facing us are greater today than they ever have been, because the Left is throwing _everything_ in their arsenal at us... _and every dollar counts_!**

We need your help so we can score _more_ victories in our legal fights to:

* _Keep our elections honest._
* _Keep uncovering government documents_ that expose Deep State efforts to sabotage President Trump's actions to end illegal immigration and reform the government.
* _Keep challenging the woke agenda_ ...like race-based "reparations" schemes.

Judicial Watch is leading on all these fronts...but _every investigation_ we launch and _every_ _lawsuit_ we file has very real expenses tied to them!

_**[And we cannot meet these expenseswithout the financial support of dedicated conservatives like you!_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Please help us today with your best gift. I thank you in advance for your support!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73698&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

| **Today marks 139 years since workers across the United States went on strike to demand a shorter workday.** _Chris Deluzio is continuing the fight to protect workers’ rights by urging Congress to pass the PRO Act!_ **Stand with Chris:[_**Sign the petition to pass the PRO Act →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106885240/542934294/-446767840?refcode=email_050125_mayday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjA5MDhlZS05ODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz73kivf-uvn7CUGiQjirCeb3sXRNHxhg8ZWHV8gQDI=&emci=e0e52ae7-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cf0908ee-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13185894)** | | **[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106885241/542934307/-446767840?refcode=email_050125_mayday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjA5MDhlZS05ODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz73kivf-uvn7CUGiQjirCeb3sXRNHxhg8ZWHV8gQDI=&emci=e0e52ae7-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cf0908ee-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13185894)**
---
Derek,
On May 1, 1886, hundreds of thousands of workers across the country walked off their jobs to protest unjust working conditions and demand an eight-hour workday. They knew that with collective action and perseverance, they could make life better for people everywhere.
That’s why on May 1st we celebrate the anniversary of their efforts on what is known as May Day, or International Workers’ Day.
**But the fight for workers’ rights is far from over, Derek.**
Anti-union 'Right-to-Work' laws in other states are undercutting Western PA workers and our region's growth. And as corporate power continues to grow unchecked, union-busting will continue to be all too common.

Chris is fighting in Congress for every American's right to form and join a union. He knows we need to pass the PRO Act to give workers and unions a fighting chance, because unions lift up all workers and strengthen our democracy.

The PRO Act would make it easier for workers to form unions and engage in collective bargaining, impose stronger penalties for companies that violate workers' rights to organize, repeal "right-to-work" laws that weaken unions, and so much more.
**Chris Deluzio is proud to co-sponsor the PRO Act, and he needs your support.**
[_**So before International Workers’ Day ends, will you sign Chris’s petition urging Congress to pass the PRO Act and protect workers’ rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106885244/542934321/-446767840?refcode=email_050125_mayday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjA5MDhlZS05ODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz73kivf-uvn7CUGiQjirCeb3sXRNHxhg8ZWHV8gQDI=&emci=e0e52ae7-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cf0908ee-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13185894)
| ****[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106885247/542934326/-446767840?refcode=email_050125_mayday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjA5MDhlZS05ODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oz73kivf-uvn7CUGiQjirCeb3sXRNHxhg8ZWHV8gQDI=&emci=e0e52ae7-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cf0908ee-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13185894)****
---
Thank you,

Team Deluzio

Peter,

In just 100 days in office, President Trump has taken unprecedented action to restrict access to reproductive health care in the U.S. and around the world. **We're sounding the alarm.**

[**Join us for an action call on May 7 at 2:00PM ET/11:00AM PT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106885249/542934328/-428426987?sourceid=1150623&utm_campaign=25emcus-0501aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=100days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM2YThhMi05ODI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQf82JXpLNDh_shgtWEjCAbBQyG34inbw75t6XHjAbQ=&emci=e8e7ee49-f325-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d0c6a8a2-9826-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=954237) to hear what's at stake and what the Center is doing to fight back. **The First 100 Days: What Trump's Second Term Means for Reproductive Rights**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Donald Trump’s plan is already backfiring
#

Team, this is incredible.
Late last week, Donald Trump launched partisan investigations against ActBlue. He then doubled down on social media, vaguely suggesting that officials at the company “should all be in jail.”
For years, ActBlue has helped organizations like ours raise money online. Those small-dollar donations are the reason why Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies can’t buy our elections.
They know that too — which is why they are trying to shut down the platform altogether.
**Unfortunately for them, their plan is already backfiring.** The energy we’ve seen since his announcement has been through the roof — _just look at how our donations have SPIKED:_
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250501-1-b&t=1&akid=10373%2E3935704%2EOoQ3uo)
Donald Trump and his friends are trying to silence you. We cannot let them take away our voices without a fight.
[**Help us continue raising a bullhorn against Donald Trump. Will you make your first grassroots donation to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250501-1-b&t=2&akid=10373%2E3935704%2EOoQ3uo)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| | Folks, it’s Jay Jones. I’m grateful for all the support that my campaign received throughout April. It’s clear that as this race heats up, so is the momentum for this campaign – and I’m so thankful that I have you in my corner. It’s becoming more clear every day that Virginia needs a change in leadership. Virginians deserve an Attorney General who is going to stand up to radical threats from Donald Trump. Instead, we have Jason Miyares, who consistently fails to protect the people of the Commonwealth. He has refused to speak up for Virginians – even as Trump’s actions hurt our commonwealth’s economy and job market. **Jason Miyares may have a big war chest and Donald Trump’s backing – but that’s nothing compared to the grassroots community I have on my team. Together, we can win this tough race and give Virginia the leadership it deserves. ** [**To keep our momentum going strong as we enter another month, can you make a special contribution to my campaign today? Every dollar makes a big difference, folks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106887903/542940971/1597324970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.01_EOM-TY_B1_F1_S1_C1_15DOxDC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkyNDNjZjUtOWMyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o98oZwkSkYK-1R_9CMUiQExykODteq6e2xCex3sCnp4=)

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: NJ DOGE, we really need you!
body:
Peter, New Jersey needs DOGE. For real. Consider these headlines...
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, New Jersey needs DOGE. For real. Consider these headlines...
---
|
---
Let’s dig deeper. Newark schools are _finally_ under official scrutiny for frivolous and obscene spending. Like a $33,000 “fun day” for staff that featured DJs and carnival games, but no training or professional development. Or millions in travel for board members to places like Vegas and Atlantic City. Like the 19-person trip to “a luxury waterfront hotel in San Diego, featuring a poolside bar with $20 cocktails, tuna niçoise and Wagyu beef” (Sources: [Here](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/adb2dce0fbb542be4bde03d77bdc88e7/eJyNkMFqwzAMht_F5zhOnBRGbqWUEtL1MLbzMIlY3DiysdV6Xcm7z91GTxvsKn36fn5dGQEqpHZgDXunDykrljEPvXYakDYWSfVfW7mqy6rMmNE47bw9OdZcfz2-A7fxqirqjNHFQUKen9abrj3sXvftoUukUz5l_M8jH4q7Z_u4bvdsWf4Uw6xpe07uwBryJ7g1GnRqRS_eJH4kcqERIsaY4zHv7Sys06gtClnIWpRSIETlJx760VoT-BsQD07hBAO3Z_A8qkDAk5Ws18rkI80mJSvnAIeft3Vw-c5fPgEaKXcG) and [here](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/a81fe0786bf7d40f5d2e6b8e18fc96cc/eJyNkEFvwjAMhf9Lzg0pKZ2m3hBCqCpwmLbzZBIPsrZplLh0Hep_X9gmTpvE0fbn5_d8YYQWLJWaFeyDPqXMWMI8KuMMWlp1lkB9T2W-mGfzhDXG1hvf9Y4Vlz-Xb8C1nWfpQ8JodBiR56flqir3m9dtua8i6cDHG_fpyMf0prPeLcstm6Z_hbE1tD5H7cAK8j1eE2kTU9GLbyJ_InKhEGIYhpk6QVMfEGjW-aOwOICvhUxlLtKFkJnQJpA3ivibiR4VBm4RNaeOH5BDrw3FKq7xd_QBR37sHG9gaKFGzzW2YHUQ0RM4h1b_PrTC8cfZ9AV83H_Z)). Assemblyman Alex Sauickie noted that “this frivolous $1 million spending alone could have restored all of the after-school busing lost in ALL school districts in Monmouth, Ocean, Middlesex, and Burlington Counties.” This kind of waste should be _infuriating_ to New Jerseyans, especially since only 17% of Newark students passed the state’s math exam and only 31% passed in literacy.
---
[ **I’m over it! Enough with the lunacy! I’ll give now →** ](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/785d05887c3ced9c5164194291d90843/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVNjcRbRIRoHfqA6hLL7lSLui7rFJn439s-6FTQdeZ5n-GdFggVU5QIiOFKN98PwAGDXGqJisaVIsafW38Q9oO-A4VU-dRUZw1x-zX8AR7jQeBFDlCj0SKrxWicJvPpPkvmqSU1M_bGfx4_8j6eyWyUZNB1P8VYSppcrLuGmMwZH42EtK1obQrLn4h0HbuuqBQj7NVkpMYer0r3sEPcRHy55eEwPM48L7c6pjUq8f5Fis1L2t0Bd5pmng==)
---
Then let’s look at the Transit Police. Yet another shoe dropping in what has been a total dumpster fire over at NJ Transit. Prosecutors are looking into a 2021 scheme to falsify overtime records by the NJ Transit Police and their supervisors (source [here](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/abeabe82f9aed94177edb1f82b46f315/eJyNkMFOwzAMht8l52bp0lYbvU3TNFUdOyA4o9BYJSNNosRrCVPfnQwQXEDian_-7N8XgmCEwUaSmrziG-cFyYiHTjkFBrfWoOg-urwql8UyI1qZl723Z0fqy6_D38C1XBXLPCMYHSTk_m6zbZvj_vHQHNtEOuHTjv95-PrHs7vdNAcyz3-KYVC4G5M7kBr9Ga6JpEqp8MHrxD8julAzNk3TYohdAr3QJ_AB4qKzAwtofWQGpsB4ziuWl4wXTGgNPUhqR_CoBqBOSKlMT58iNSeaHCYopM5q1QFVZoSAqhcIkq0Lzm9WRZnnK5buE86BkV_PbSF-Xjm_A8kLgz0=)). How have we not yet fully audited this bloated and FAILING department – that isn’t working well for almost _any_ New Jerseyans??
---
[ **We need a Common Sense voice now more than ever.
I’ll chip in! →** ](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/5961518100d383b2b8a1d59d3d5fab5c/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1qWPtKJ0V0SktLrwAepGQjpq0KYhHUUt_XdTFVcKbmfOPcOdBggVV5QWEMOV7oyF4IBBIbVERcNKERfPLetFQRg4cJLqODbVWUPcfA1_gG7cCwPmAN00WmQxS4ZZOh1v83SaWVJzY2_852ED_-MZTZI0h7b9KcZS0uhi3TXEZM7YNSqkbUVLc7L8gUjXsecVleKEbk1GanRFVXq7DeJqIOZrEfWj_cT3j1bHtUZVvH-R4e0lbR9zXmaZ)
---
This kind of crap just makes my blood boil. Our taxpayer dollars being wasted with impunity while our Leftist elected officials and bureaucrats chastise us for not letting them spend even MORE of our money! We’re already suffocating under unbearable taxes. But what they don’t see coming (but they should...) is the Common Sense Majority. We’re awake. We’re loud. 2025 is here. Let’s go. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

| Working people deserve better than Trump and his MAGA billionaire administration. With Trump's relentless attack on working people across the country, it's more important than ever that we stand with workers' rights. His billionaire buddies are doing everything to reap their profit while attacking working people and stripping away their rights. But Peter, workers have been first to fight for earning better wages, safer working conditions, and putting people first instead of profit. [In honor of May Day, will you add your name in support of working people's rights before midnight tonight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te950dbc4-24a5-4e89-aab2-817152f7ec95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td88bd257-2626-43a0-98cb-87cccf1f8ec8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

THE HEALING OF AMERICA

Now through May 27, 2025

Tuesdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET

In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and
take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week
webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our
freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels.

Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America
exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to
civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come.

Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild
America’s greatness from the ground up.

MONEY MINDSET MATTERS: Ditch the Rocks, Embrace the Feathers!

Monday, May 19, 2025

9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET

Being financially literate is important—but what about the emotions you carry around money?

Join HSM2M host Liz Ackerman herself for a powerful and eye-opening session on Financial Rocks and Feathers. Discover the hidden
emotional “rocks” that may be weighing you down and learn how to replace them with empowering financial “feathers”—so you can
build a healthier, more confident relationship with money.

💰 Are you unknowingly holding onto fear, guilt, or stress about finances?
💰 What mindset shifts can lighten the load for single-income homeschooling families—or anyone wanting more freedom in their
financial journey?
💰 How can you turn money into a tool for growth, not anxiety?

This session is a must for anyone looking to create a more peaceful, empowered financial future. Don’t miss it!

👉 Register now and start transforming your money mindset!

NEW WEBINAR SERIES: FIRESIDE CHAT WITH KIMBERLY AND DEBBIE

JOIN US THE LAST THURSDAY OF EVERY MONTH

5PmPT/ 6PmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET

We’ve come to expect the leaders in our lives, at every level, to be out of reach, out of touch, and out of contact, but Moms for
America is flipping the script.

Join Moms for America Founder and President Kimberly Fletcher and Vice-President Debbie Kraulidis for a brand-new monthly webinar
where you can ask questions about anything from your leadership role to ancient Moms for America history. Learn more about
Kimberly, Debbie, and Moms for America, why and how this movement was founded, and what it is that makes our dedicated leaders
tick.

VIRGINIA SUMMIT

FRIDAY, AUGUST 1, 2025
REGENT UNIVERSITY LIBRARY
1000 REGENT UNIVERSITY DRIVE
VIRGINIA BEACH, VA

Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August
1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president,
Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard
Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from
general attendance to running for office.

clean_body: 🇺🇸 Join us this May for empowering webinars designed to spark meaningful conversations and celebrate timeless American values—let’s stand strong together! ❤️💙 If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Don't miss ANY of our inspirational and equipping webinars or in-person events! [] [] THE HEALING OF AMERICA Now through May 27, 2025 Tuesdays at 5pmPT/ 6pmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET In the wake of the monumental 2024 election of Donald J. Trump, there’s no better time to embrace the principles of liberty and take action to safeguard the future of our nation. Join Al & Juleen Jackson for Healing of America, a transformative 16-week webinar series that explores the foundation of our republic, the structure of the Constitution, and the forces threatening our freedoms. Discover practical strategies to overcome these challenges and heal America from the grassroots to the highest levels. Through this series, you’ll gain a deeper understanding of the Constitution’s original intent, the ideals that make America exceptional, and the steps needed to restore unity and strength across the nation. Whether you’re a seasoned patriot or new to civic engagement, this is your opportunity to join a nationwide movement to preserve liberty for generations to come. Don’t wait—reserve your spot today and be part of the solution. Together, we can protect and preserve our freedoms and rebuild America’s greatness from the ground up. Register - HEALING OF AMERICA [] [] [] MONEY MINDSET MATTERS: Ditch the Rocks, Embrace the Feathers! Monday, May 19, 2025 9amPT/ 10amMT/ 11amCT/ 12pmET Being financially literate is important—but what about the emotions you carry around money? Join HSM2M host Liz Ackerman herself for a powerful and eye-opening session on Financial Rocks and Feathers. Discover the hidden emotional “rocks” that may be weighing you down and learn how to replace them with empowering financial “feathers”—so you can build a healthier, more confident relationship with money. 💰 Are you unknowingly holding onto fear, guilt, or stress about finances? 💰 What mindset shifts can lighten the load for single-income homeschooling families—or anyone wanting more freedom in their financial journey? 💰 How can you turn money into a tool for growth, not anxiety? This session is a must for anyone looking to create a more peaceful, empowered financial future. Don’t miss it! 👉 Register now and start transforming your money mindset! Register - MONEY MINDSET MATTERS [] [] [] NEW WEBINAR SERIES: FIRESIDE CHAT WITH KIMBERLY AND DEBBIE JOIN US THE LAST THURSDAY OF EVERY MONTH 5PmPT/ 6PmMT/ 7pmCT/ 8pmET We’ve come to expect the leaders in our lives, at every level, to be out of reach, out of touch, and out of contact, but Moms for America is flipping the script. Join Moms for America Founder and President Kimberly Fletcher and Vice-President Debbie Kraulidis for a brand-new monthly webinar where you can ask questions about anything from your leadership role to ancient Moms for America history. Learn more about Kimberly, Debbie, and Moms for America, why and how this movement was founded, and what it is that makes our dedicated leaders tick. REGISTER ONCE AND BE NOTIFIED FOR EACH SESSION. Register - FIRESIDE CHAT [] [] SEASON TWO OF THE MOM VIEW CATCH WEEKLY EPISODES AT 7AM PT | 8AM MT | 9AM CT | 10AM ET Empowering Conversations Start Here From parenting to public policy, we delve into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. The Mom View Show serves as a vital voice for conservative women across America. Every week, we dive into discussions that help strengthen our homes and communities, ensuring your voice is not only heard, but also valued. VIEW ON YOUTUBE [] VIEW ON RUMBLE [] [] [] VIRGINIA SUMMIT FRIDAY, AUGUST 1, 2025 REGENT UNIVERSITY LIBRARY 1000 REGENT UNIVERSITY DRIVE VIRGINIA BEACH, VA Virginia Moms for America is inviting you to attend their one-day summit at Regent University in Virginia Beach on Friday, August 1st. Come be encouraged and uplifted by messages of unity, light, and purpose offered by Moms for America’s founder and president, Kimberly Fletcher, and Lead Cottage Meeting Instructor, Juleen Jackson. Dr. Kelly Kohls, the founder of the National Schoolboard Leadership Council, will also attend to help concerned parents learn how to get involved with their local schoolboards from general attendance to running for office. REGISTER - VIRGINIA SUMMIT [] BOOKMARK THIS PAGE! 👇👇👇👇👇 [] [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A human face to Trump’s destructive tariffs - please watch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
About two weeks ago, I sent out an email asking people if their lives were personally impacted by Donald Trump's tariffs.

About two weeks ago, I sent out an email asking people if their lives were personally impacted by Donald Trump's tariffs.
Thousands of people responded.
Earlier this week, I invited a few of them onto my podcast to put a human face to the damage Trump is causing, and to show why California became the first state to sue the Trump administration to stop these tariffs.
**[Here's a bit of Beth's story. Please watch.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4159?t=1&akid=2331%2E4767699%2EWOxmFc)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4159?t=2&akid=2331%2E4767699%2EWOxmFc)
**[And here's the entire episode.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4160?t=3&akid=2331%2E4767699%2EWOxmFc)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4160?t=4&akid=2331%2E4767699%2EWOxmFc)
I'd love it if you took the time to see the impact Trump's tariff policy is having on families in California and across the country.
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
* * *

Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
At the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party, we know that every day is a great day to celebrate and lift up workers. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106890309/542945587/-2067906704?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2ZjNGVlZS05ZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxdHLjtSXjwM0wninrQPf5-hUcpDlVJyhfvBTWFOYHg=)**

Peter, Today is May Day, also known as International Workers’ Day. But at the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-_Labor_ Party, we know that every day is a great day to celebrate and lift up workers. Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies in Congress, on the other hand, couldn’t care less about working people. Their priorities and actions prove it every day — from opposing wage increases and union protections to doling out tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and powerful corporations. **We’re proud to be the party that’s fighting to expand paid family leave, protect organizing rights, raise wages, and make it easier — not harder — for workers to join together and demand the dignity they’ve earned.** But to keep moving forward and fighting for workers — and stop MAGA extremists from undoing the progress we’ve made on the back of the American Labor Movement — we need your help. [**If you believe in building a state where workers are respected, protected, and empowered, chip in today to help us keep Minnesota blue and moving forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106890310/542945588/23040837?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2ZjNGVlZS05ZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxdHLjtSXjwM0wninrQPf5-hUcpDlVJyhfvBTWFOYHg=)

clean_body: At the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party, we know that every day is a great day to celebrate and lift up workers. | | | = Peter, Today is May Day, also known as International Workers’ Day. But at the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party, we know that every day is a great day to celebrate and lift up workers. Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies in Congress, on the other hand, couldn’t care less about working people. Their priorities and actions prove it every day — from opposing wage increases and union protections to doling out tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and powerful corporations. We’re proud to be the party that’s fighting to expand paid family leave, protect organizing rights, raise wages, and make it easier — not harder — for workers to join together and demand the dignity they’ve earned. But to keep moving forward and fighting for workers — and stop MAGA extremists from undoing the progress we’ve made on the back of the American Labor Movement — we need your help. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | = | = | | = Thank you, Richard Carlbom Chair Minnesota DFL ** | = = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. name: Jena Griswold
subject: An incredible start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250501-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250501-email]
Peter -
I just want to take a moment to say thank you.
April was an incredible month for our campaign, and it’s all because of you. Your support, your encouragement, and your belief in this campaign fueled every success we had. Together, we showed just how strong and determined this team is.
Running for Attorney General isn’t just about one person — it’s about all of us standing up for Colorado’s future. Protecting our rights. Defending our freedoms. Fighting for fairness, justice, and opportunity for everyone who calls this state home.
I’m so grateful to have you on this journey with me. We’re building something powerful — a campaign rooted in values, courage, and the Colorado way of life.
There’s a lot of work ahead, but if the first month of this campaign showed us anything, it’s that together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thank you for being part of this team.
Onward,
Jena Griswold

name: Patty
subject: I hate to be the bearer of bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Here's how we prove that Democrats are fired up to fight back:
Here's how we prove that Democrats are fired up to fight back: / Our state is fed up with Trump's incompetence and cruelty – help me fight back.
| | |
---
First things first, Peter: If you chipped in any amount at all toward my April end-of-month fundraiser, I hope you know how truly grateful I am. Every cent makes an impact and means the world to me and my team.
**That being said, we did not close the last $1,038 gap to my $20,000 goal.**
Now, I spent the Senate Easter/Passover recess meeting with folks in every corner of Washington state. Across those many conversations, it was crystal clear that people in Washington state are already **sick and tired** of President Trump's corruption, incompetence, and cruelty:
* Small business owners are reeling from Trump's ham-fisted tariff wars.

* Working parents are scrambling to find affordable child care, and, even worse, this administration is threatening to zero out funding for Head Start programs.

* Seniors are worried that Elon Musk will "accidentally" disqualify them from collecting their hard-earned Social Security benefits.

And if we fall short of our fundraising goals now, MAGA Republicans **WILL** take it as a sign we don't have what it takes to protect working families from their pro-billionaire, anti-middle-class, and at times, wholly unconstitutional agenda.

_That's why I want our fundraising numbers to show that Democrats are fired up and ready to fight back. _
**If everyone reading this pitches in $5** ****(_if you can afford it)_** before midnight, we can prove them wrong – ****so I'm extending the deadline for one night only in a last-ditch effort to close the gap.**
[**Your contribution is one of the best ways we can show we've got the people power to _ _ save our safety nets, hard-earned benefits, and fundamental rights from MAGA Republicans' dangerous agenda. So if you're able, Peter, will you rush $5 right now to help me build the grassroots resources we need to fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106892769/542951206/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk502-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ2NDMyOS1hMTI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BNwjAi09y8Xj1WZf2TeVBmkiYePokpRsrm5rzqrfkAU=)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: A message from me after Trump's 100th day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team, it's Senator Schumer. We just passed Trump's 100th day back in office, and I want to talk to you about what that means.

**It's been 100 days of DOGE. 100 days of Elon Musk. 100 days of soaring prices. 100 days of threats to Social Security. 100 days of billionaires in total control of our government, ripping off the American people. And 100 days of costs, chaos, and corruption from Senate Republicans as they back Trump's every demand.**

**The DSCC has just launched ads to make sure voters know this, and I need your help to spread the message. [As Democratic Leader in the U.S. Senate, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 to flip the Senate blue? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)
---

If there's one thing my Republican colleagues in the Senate have proven over the last 100 days, it's that there's simply no line they won't let Donald Trump cross.

**The American people deserve better from their senators, and that's precisely why we've launched these ads: We need to remind voters that Trump's 100 days of costs, chaos, and corruption are only happening because Republicans are letting him get away with it.**

_This is how we win back the Senate majority._ By spreading our message to every American that Republican senators aren't fighting for them, but Democrats _always_ will.

**But here's the hard truth:** Reaching every voter -- and winning back the majority -- is a costly undertaking. It will take grassroots Democrats like you stepping up to help amplify our message and flip the Senate. With so much at stake and our $50,000 midnight fundraising deadline fast approaching, **I'm personally asking:**

**[Will you fund our fight to flip the Senate blue by pitching in $5 or more? It will take every Democrat standing up and using their voices to defeat Trump's Senate allies and take back the majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=9&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)
---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=10&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)
