Thank you. **[With your help, we'll hold Trump's enablers accountable by beating them at the ballot box.](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)**

\- Chuck Schumer

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250501-ChuckSchumer-Schumer100DaysAdsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20171%2E9716520%2EllEAhB)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Thank you. Here’s what’s next:
body:
---
Derek, **Thank you.** Supporters like you helped us not just reach our end-of-month fundraising goal — but surpass it. That’s money that we’ll be able to put toward...
* **Organizing everywhere, year-round.** We’ve recently announced a monthly transfer of more than $1 million from the DNC to state parties — _the committee’s largest investment into Democratic state parties in history._
* **Taking Trump and his allies to court.** Democrats continue to file lawsuits challenging Trump and Republicans’ attempts to make it harder for Americans to vote.
* **Holding town halls across the country.** Democrats are showing up everywhere — including in communities where Republican representatives won’t. We’re listening and giving people a chance to make their voices heard on what they’re seeing from the Trump administration.

There is a _lot_ of work ahead of us to not just mobilize and organize against Trump and his allies’ disastrous agenda but to strengthen our long-term infrastructure so we can win elections this year, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. Thank you for being a part of this, and we’ll have more updates to share soon. The Democrats **You might be surprised to hear this, but most of our grassroots donations come from emails just like this one.** [**If you’re invested in fighting back against Trump while helping elect more Democrats who will check his power, we hope you’ll consider making a $3 contribution today to support the DNC’s work:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250501_3317_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3317_22930333_tVbs3L&akid=3317%2E22930333%2EtVbs3L)

Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

name: Tim Walz
subject: Honoring workers this May Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
This May Day, we honor all of the working families who make our communities strong.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106897098/542962233/-112288765?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY5ZDJkMC1hNTI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRZpzvS7KdeRAm5S821MxjFcyaLSrsEGcBSraA9i1Is=)
---
Peter,
This May Day, we honor all of the working families who make our communities strong.
As a former union member, I know firsthand how the labor movement has changed lives for the better. In Minnesota, we’re proud to have one of the nation’s most generous paid family and medical leave policies. On top of that, we’ve ensured paid sick days, expanded the right to collectively bargain, and increased worker protections.
**But we can’t take our progress for granted. **
Donald Trump and his extremist allies want to roll back the clock, stripping away protections for workers, weakening labor unions, and tipping the scales back in favor of the powerful and ultrawealthy. We can’t let that happen on our watch.

clean_body: This May Day, we honor all of the working families who make our communities strong. | = Peter, This May Day, we honor all of the working families who make our communities strong. As a former union member, I know firsthand how the labor movement has changed lives for the better. In Minnesota, we’re proud to have one of the nation’s most generous paid family and medical leave policies. On top of that, we’ve ensured paid sick days, expanded the right to collectively bargain, and increased worker protections. But we can’t take our progress for granted. Donald Trump and his extremist allies want to roll back the clock, stripping away protections for workers, weakening labor unions, and tipping the scales back in favor of the powerful and ultrawealthy. We can’t let that happen on our watch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me and with workers, Tim Walz ********=******

body:
Here’s the situation

|
---
| | | **- FROM THE DESK OF SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON-**
The real battle has just begun, Friend.

**As your Speaker of the House, I'm officially sounding the alarm: We just missed our April 30th deadline. **

**This comes at the worst possible time because the Radical Left is more determined than ever to undermine our values, destroy our economy, and dismantle our constitutional freedoms.**

**Here's the situation:** Top Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Hakeem Jefferies have already raised a staggering amount of money to try and take back the House and impose their radical agenda on America. **We need to do everything in our power to stop them.**

That's why I'm turning to you today. We need your help to reach our goal and stay ahead of the Radical Left's money machine.

_This April goal is a one-time opportunity to supercharge our efforts and keep our House majority safe from liberal attacks as we charge into the summer._

I've seen firsthand the lengths to which the Radical Left will go to try and take control. They'll stop at nothing to:

❌Pack the Supreme Court with activist judges

❌Erode our values

| **_AN OFFICIAL MEMO FROM KELLYANNE CONWAY_**
---
Peter,
---
No one understands just how **_HORRIBLE_** the mainstream media’s polls are better than I do.
---
As President Trump’s 2016 campaign manager, I remember they touted phony poll after phony poll showing he didn’t stand a chance – **_only to be proven wrong on election night!_**
---
One of my most important takeaways from that experience was that we can NEVER rely on the media’s polls to tell us ANYTHING about how Americans really feel on an issue.
---
_We _ALWAYS_ need to verify by conducting our own polling! _
---
_That is why, with the media claiming that President Trump is LOSING the support of Americans, I helped commission this official April[Trump Approval Poll](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/NCNV9b57c3kqwTgw4x_RYZ61yQX80gJdhoIxf4F0tfCuK1CZGn0HTk8unl1eVeI7VcAevIsosxvwDr10ZwoA0ZzuLJBphwROi4oTkzn0yulOMOqM22ZA-MlM0xQUikwAWfRrfQqtw-YRFZrv_0vg8nisL_8pakzaCBzkU7KelI5alRJGP9DP5c25-Jqw5XFAJ-PtVqqtM3fyCOb8225NzbIZW4W2BzE4ORDWkJw-ZQwoti5LwPfV6vJkVaOzpKpR9BUY1BCgRpu84hrqbxljvUuKn_9A8ECavfzuXAX0-5KOreGe5psVhuE_eo32W0iilclGNay7DdVqThxI7UBktp-CPdow83vkrWJOsurofd9Jk38HPTOZfaiVctiAnyDotY2OIih4FJhz0e4YYI6dzAt2WttUu6CvfaFcEORExYNxV0-3qaOcQggXgb7J70Jit5VV7KZI5Ym8WZPouX_CpAiR__gwQaeN8L9zLBKRUf8mGJqy/3Awiw3IPk97jYut7YEbbT6urI0SzcDSh/8) to see how the American people _really_ feel about his presidency. _

Four Democratic Senators — Gary Peters in Michigan, Tina Smith in Minnesota, Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire, and Dick Durbin in Illinois — are all retiring next year.
That means Republicans have _four_ opportunities to expand their Senate majority.
Donald Trump’s allies know their majority is razor-thin (**4 seats, to be exact**), so you can bet they’ll pour millions to try and flip these seats. If we don’t act now, it could take us years to regain control of the Senate.
We can’t let that happen. We need to build our war chest early to defend must-win seats like these — and we’re counting on you.
**[Will you rush in $4 (or more) to help us fight back, defend Democratic seats, and Flip the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106897543/542963483/-739551076?amount=4&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmNjNWZlYi1hNTI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ven5apIeirnfyj3nQKcyRdXnP7KdanienvivW0AI6_o=)**

Fellow American,

This week, we celebrated **100 days** since President Trump took the oath of office and became the 47th President of the United States.

**While the achievements of President Trump, his administration, and our Republican Congress are numerous, I'm proud to highlight two key priorities that showcase President Trump's bold new leadership:**

_**Strong Border Security and Immigration Enforcement.**_

President Trump took swift action to stop the flow of mass illegal immigration into the United States. By declaring a national emergency at the U.S.-Mexico border, designating drug cartels as terrorist organizations, and enforcing tough consequences for illegal immigration, he has significantly reduced unauthorized border crossings. These important measures protect our communities and create a safer country.

_**Ending Woke Policies.**_

President Trump has taken a stand against divisive, woke ideologies, eliminating harmful DEI programs across federal agencies. His Executive Order banning biological males from competing in women's sports ensures fairness and protects opportunities for female athletes. These actions bring common sense back to America.

Fellow American, I am honored to work alongside President Trump and my Republican Senate colleagues in turning these priorities into lasting realities.

**[It goes without saying-- _America is back!_](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d73ff91b59634388aa0240d68d95181b&_e=AyHmT5nrem17DJ8uW5PB5RkyecUSj4GZMZG3dVAPLtdZhexl2TW9v7Xvrpv4hN3Nrs7W5cpIfEeXOjHFv3ugbQc_bR7__XwGdB-y6KgCHQOgKaDAgs17Errq281jjAs8KhgTly_OVz3QVEPeupgzbDJrc8xqtfnPZbcI4dIfabFlGsFRU8GDZ5rfD3e4RFbAC3q7qJT4S8u6nXKK6_hOusuBDkW1AlX-1yWrCHOiraavRcO8PN78_zQX8EYHQT4XlxS4H1VA9k1cs6HRvs0QyH91V3KGjmEOSmYmOZ4I6bqgTgSWK50svqAS_WDRTXhCFGASO3g6oOgpQ3-0VKZunN__OlHiC1rEZQkDV7zHLOf1_sd8A63yJpPGNGQzfdR7ZKWKS-03FxccJ0uefh8wrQ%3D%3D)**

**But Fellow American, to no surprise, these accomplishments have not gone without pushback and attacks from the Left every step of the way.**

The radical Washington Democrats are spending day and night fighting back against our Republican accomplishments.

clean_body: Fellow American, this week, we celebrated 100 days since President Trump took the oath of office and became the 47th President of the United States. | Fellow American, This week, we celebrated 100 days since President Trump took the oath of office and became the 47th President of the United States. While the achievements of President Trump, his administration, and our Republican Congress are numerous, I'm proud to highlight two key priorities that showcase President Trump's bold new leadership: Strong Border Security and Immigration Enforcement. President Trump took swift action to stop the flow of mass illegal immigration into the United States. By declaring a national emergency at the U.S.-Mexico border, designating drug cartels as terrorist organizations, and enforcing tough consequences for illegal immigration, he has significantly reduced unauthorized border crossings. These important measures protect our communities and create a safer country. Ending Woke Policies. President Trump has taken a stand against divisive, woke ideologies, eliminating harmful DEI programs across federal agencies. His Executive Order banning biological males from competing in women's sports ensures fairness and protects opportunities for female athletes. These actions bring common sense back to America. Fellow American, I am honored to work alongside President Trump and my Republican Senate colleagues in turning these priorities into lasting realities. But Fellow American, to no surprise, these accomplishments have not gone without pushback and attacks from the Left every step of the way. The radical Washington Democrats are spending day and night fighting back against our Republican accomplishments. | Thank you, Senator Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Happy May Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Happy May Day, everyone! May Day pays tribute to the labor movement's efforts to ensure safer and fairer workplaces for everyone. Here in Oregon, we’ve seen firsthand how unions can uplift our communities. I’ve always stood with unions — because when people have fair pay, good benefits, and safe working conditions, our entire state thrives. May Day is also a day when Oregon’s immigrant communities raise their collective voices at the State Capitol, advocating for fairness and shared prosperity. At a time when unions and immigrant communities are under threat, I’m proud to join them in fighting for a better, stronger nation in the face of unprecedented attacks. I took executive action to prioritize stability, good wages, and fair treatment in Oregon’s largest construction projects. I strongly support every worker’s right to organize a union, whether in the public or private sector. I’m also committed to upholding Oregon’s laws when it comes to immigration enforcement — because I know the important contributions hard-working immigrants make to our communities and economy. **[Will you join me by adding your name and standing with working Oregonians and immigrant communities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106897958/542965101/634881676?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjVhYWViYy1hNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmiqW9SYLfJemqRdgY-dGTkUvqqNCj2pLaM68LzQkuU=&emci=868b80c0-1625-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c65aaebc-a626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106897959/542965102/634881676?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjVhYWViYy1hNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmiqW9SYLfJemqRdgY-dGTkUvqqNCj2pLaM68LzQkuU=&emci=868b80c0-1625-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c65aaebc-a626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729)

Together, we can continue to build a brighter future for Oregon.
Thank you for standing with me,
Tina

clean_body: we heard NOTHING from you, Peter! | Peter, We reached out earlier about Jamie Raskin’s effort to impeach Donald Trump for executive overreach...and we heard NOTHING from you! We’re hoping that this is a system error, so we’re nudging you again to sign the “Impeach Trump” petition before our extended deadline at 11:59pm tonight! As Trump tries to throw democracy over the brink with his reckless executive orders, trade wars, and DOGE’s destructive policies – we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up! | Thank you for your support! Democracy On The Line \------------------------- FWD: GOOD NEWS: House Democrat Jamie Raskin is pushing to impeach Donald Trump for executive overreach! NEWS: As of 11:00am today, we don’t have enough grassroots support to impeach Trump according to our petition – we’re 5,403 signatures short! | Donald Trump is aggressively trying to overthrow democracy – dismantling agencies, firing federal workers and trying to impound congressionally appropriated funds! House Democrats like Jamie Raskin are fighting back Trump and Elon Musk’s efforts to rapidly reshape democracy! Hello Derek

The Young Democrats of America are gathering for our Spring Meeting from**May****9-11** in**Minneapolis****, Minnesota** , and we’re excited to welcome young leaders from across the country for a weekend of organizing, training, and building power together.

We want to remind you that the deadline to book your hotel room at the discounted rate has been extended to**May****2, 2025**. This provides attendees with extra time to finalize their travel plans and secure lodging.

To get the most out of the weekend, we encourage everyone to book their stay at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown, our official meeting hotel. name: Johnny O
subject: 100 Days of Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

Yesterday, we marked the 100th day of the Trump Administration, which has been defined by chaos, cruelty and corruption.
From threatening our rights to gutting the civil service and working to enrich the ultra-wealthy while crushing working families with the largest peacetime tax hike in history, President Trump is again dragging America backward.
It’s no surprise he has the lowest 100-day presidential approval rating in 80 years. The last record low? His own, from his first term in 2017.
We’re fighting this reckless Administration in Congress and the Courts – but we also need the help of the community. I need your help organizing, energizing and mobilizing like never before. Talk to your neighbors, knock on doors, make calls, volunteer, march, vote. Contribute to candidates like me who are committed to democracy and accountability. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
And, most importantly, show up with empathy. People are losing their jobs, their savings and their hope. Let’s be there for them.
We're not just fighting against Trump. We’re fighting for a country that works for all of us.

clean_body: [] Yesterday, we marked the 100th day of the Trump Administration, which has been defined by chaos, cruelty and corruption. From threatening our rights to gutting the civil service and working to enrich the ultra-wealthy while crushing working families with the largest peacetime tax hike in history, President Trump is again dragging America backward. It’s no surprise he has the lowest 100-day presidential approval rating in 80 years. The last record low? His own, from his first term in 2017. We’re fighting this reckless Administration in Congress and the Courts – but we also need the help of the community. I need your help organizing, energizing and mobilizing like never before. Talk to your neighbors, knock on doors, make calls, volunteer, march, vote. Contribute to candidates like me who are committed to democracy and accountability. [] And, most importantly, show up with empathy. People are losing their jobs, their savings and their hope. Let’s be there for them. We're not just fighting against Trump. We’re fighting for a country that works for all of us. CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] Paid for by Johnny O for Congress Johnny O for Congress 711 W. 40th Street, Ste 330 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States

body:
Thank you for standing with me as, together, we resist an authoritarian administration that seeks to create a government for the billionaires, not the people. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWE_oAyOBnOqT6IAIsRy2Me8MMnwiAROM3nd1DhPc2ayoH9d0nLRxFrc9aR6x3ygWrwdg0QU1HmoV8RnqigM0at2hwFgeIpW6mwGw0MtI12cInVWLcvfDEdiAWCJKnBlp4u-EOyeaj1wi1f-YBh-XniQwFcBCZDck7b8DdGrKX7NA/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h0/h001.6WyZzNrJcHs5Z07U6e87b7MmvJuYpVsNL7XPtiKZUwU)
---
Friend, Today is May Day, also known as International Workers’ Day. It’s a day to fight back against the billionaires who are stealing from working people—and people are rising up across the country. [**Find a May Day rally happening near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEzQqxEn0O1Vz-OybZoh40b7PQ78Mng6gAX0x-X-pwmX3IQt4FU4Kfm7jMMQ6uxY2BbyYb0yzl_XNdj3OhH1iUUZOo4rAQZPXugVsFpcIQ7eyAYdex8Kb79lHXcUgNY835VEg8zkV0a7-fuTS-V6O9Q6dwyH1DIEluvrzfGUycc8e07E9IBYsOkrdXjy38OUA20fVsvmpm3EapoLMkvASuqs07UD2poadRGsBIK5B-QTg/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h1/h001.gpVk8J7bkilp_Hayh4GByfvNaYKcQ5Lyu9nkvL58lMM) (If you can’t make an event today, that’s OK! Some are happening over the weekend, so it’s worth taking a look.) You can also check out [https://maydaystrong.org/](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVRA7TvHoN-iBBgbylyHKJaVB3gU0Of3-Xp96bvL9eqr5T7syjYulpA-IL2Ht2I9VemR_dvhee6MKdZHLkq8G0nlWScLNmF1QML1gDqbBD2Is6rezFoANNeFHYUrJ8v4ZDth2BU6gs0bllGVXfNquqtBgvltx1jJjRI7GpchEt4TE0Gcujf1qqB2on0IV9nHXlvWAypvAvy5uxRqoMwg0S-4M0P_YZXKcXnIvJi3GLIUoT9C0BMMABzOnR5y-t-SH0g/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h2/h001.a-nDKnzN7aId0poP2AeNdjl72FKzsckjbbKJta52tcM) to find out more about today’s National Day of Action, and about the coalition of organizations and unions promoting it. The website says:
> _“Trump and his billionaire profiteers are trying to create a race to the bottom—on wages, on benefits, on dignity itself. This May Day we are fighting back. We are demanding a country that puts our families over their fortunes—public schools over private profits, healthcare over hedge funds, prosperity over free market politics.”_
This past month’s Hands Off actions have been some of the largest protests in U.S. history, with millions of Americans showing up to fight for our future. Let’s continue that momentum today. [**Sign up for a May Day event near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEu2TP6avBJ6dPOuB0VynA6nu3gcZEEXDFRF2gKnlIuOHqerlJibRNVZ4kc_h8ph9cAIJdVpZ_t_e-F4NCLB_m_GLxpN5CT7ySL35OgWjEhe8gaD1RU3zpbAcKH_4YIShW7uPLg3x1rEUvtwqYwOBKnK33oN3SLz7-Pr4Fzo2RpKiBcNqzk7bqo45ilGMv0Gu0AJmOlHLntsXPZyIeaIZxsi0Kdl1335P5131NC_nQQL8/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h3/h001.dYJi5e0qNVL9UMVboJRUXdfkDGr0dRWVY4Tl-bMyYzg) May Day started here in the United States after 80,000 people showed up to rally and demand the 8-hour work day, in Chicago’s Haymarket Square in 1886. Police attacked and killed protesters, and then framed primarily immigrant workers for violence (who were later pardoned). These Haymarket events sparked yearly worldwide celebrations of the labor movement on May 1, beginning in the late 1800s. But because of the suppression of the labor movement in the U.S., it took until 1937 to pass a federal law protecting the 8-hour workday nationwide. Often our movements build cultural power before actual policy change, which can take a long time—especially when it comes to federal policy, which impacts the entire country. But our movements can have worldwide impacts right away. We are powerful, and our work can inspire more movements and more progress in places we’ll never even know about. We can shape the future. [**Join unions and grassroots progressive groups in speaking up for our rights: Click here to find a May Day event near you today, or events happening over the next few days.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEuZX7O_qMzT-dkd019hGQ_kYX-290t1zZSwszPjeA7RLjQDIBSUCMMp5dp3eBhkzsLSOqgdaVm9O-3LeHjGlDqC78sd2rlysUDIuBsnlRNjEmSd9oIMVXVI0FklFibloO3uvHWK5lPGKzkNLtvu-OTc9zLXlxZma7ElkU6drtpizgQaDK7Eg3xBzqgqQ6HW9YfsknLTfoV_U2w6Kuca0kykzPGhrGdfqXca2OGDvZR_Y/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h4/h001.0kEXcCcWuR2hH3pMOyJ9LYT4xRDHy_ZQIFlWjJ-SmL8) Thank you. Every day I’m resisting Trump and the right-wing agenda, including their cruel cuts to the social programs that millions of people rely on. But change has never started inside the halls of power. It starts on the outside, with the people—and elected officials follow the people’s lead. I’m grateful for the growing resistance movement, and I promise to continue fighting alongside you for a better future for us all. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, Apr 30, 2025
Subject: Find a May Day rally near you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, Donald Trump visited my home state of Michigan to celebrate his first 100 days in office. He promoted his attacks on our communities, including by sharing a video at his rally that highlighted his administration’s illegal deportations. He held his rally in a neighboring congressional district―**the same district where we and local activists held a community town hall last week** to hold their Republican member of Congress accountable and push him to vote against a right-wing agenda that attacks Medicaid, SNAP nutrition benefits, and more. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEurtxpMLzdK8bj7b58kOcRlkMIMa0XZPkatCVSOSuzple6PS-KQcHWT1e3jnJhFyvMonDItMiZeH-FZnMmC6Xy2VSf7K93eA0_GGEu083LCyKmFG6AKDPNQiH1QFDcHAVcnIqhV5jcic2GAwCaCshZsdJAqkKG1EjD0H0SuwY3E8iuWEw24QceRUooBMqZ54dxOw3iy6Ik2e95bCT4f_BP8jGg2oObMGpflavclW58nU/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h5/h001.7-0EPbg9UYGPpBWgXJL6wGkSZA1HJZxERoKYgJ7TWiw) Through Trump’s first 100 days, our communities have shown incredible strength and resilience, rallying in cities and towns in all 50 states, including outside of federal buildings like Veterans Hospitals and Social Security field offices. The resistance is growing and together we’re fighting back against fascism. **This Thursday May 1st is May Day―a day to celebrate workers and continue our shared struggle for workers’ rights and wages.** This is our next chance to make our voices heard and resist the anti-worker agenda of the Trump administration. [**Click here to find a May Day rally near you and sign up to attend.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEXhfXZ8YN9vhbDzJuRw4dFPs5xtUflxaFYfZ3l2Z3SnfwkKNnVC5k5s8Gd0-PEjp0vco-2uTBztV72i1YD85zErJpJ5CTLPQB0Qch2cLzsNnQ7jU-AKzsAboeuGeNkGU0fUk8ri22S_y3KARt5vfZUMXJToJkzc6BtBhoJyUWcS5K36SrvQavIatdwEHRrK-PaXMUsFUl3kShf__WsdbcPLhSWSQf5u8R4IfWDx-7tww/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h6/h001.aKzrxEjJ230tbMzzZzJOrsTlJ4-TaV7PJXoN6HB79ok) | [RSVP](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeExtvRoc8KspJA8vLotj3OKILHj3usvMhB9EC_WyscYs_s4bDoRHV8Wuw-pY-J9TK1RZAgXE3eXolzeegImm0a5-x38GyUrH0bCLlPlJnB6LPr9cdnWmZtDrrOhQFRWxuLgu2UK9plBgLztJPEyrazowITIQwJChyYacZaUVS8k-ljWiyOVAL93MvfVktJszdAHCc6F-bOULXstxj_8kerdWVe4EqkCVo0Jv4dsBfPDhA/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h7/h001.dJv8Vzml9UrBLKbahMfIFI1JacSZUAcQSr7zgvTLIwY)
---
Through these first 100 days, we have seen the power of our resistance movement.
This week, student movement leader Mohsen Mahdawi has been temporarily released from ICE custody, due in large part to our shared activism, demanding his due process rights.
At the same time, the Trump administration has restored the legal status of thousands of international students whose student visas had been revoked. This is thanks to public pressure.
The Trump administration is also consistently losing in court, losing 93% of the cases being heard. Trump and Elon Musk are also losing in the court of public opinion, with approval ratings in the negative. Their agenda is unpopular, and it’s on us to keep pushing for a future that works for working people, and all who call this country home.
[**Click here to keep up our momentum and find a May Day rally near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeERNoq9jJlC5jJCbBCTgYb227IHczGA3zzfSt-STm7o78tkxjE9Ja6k2p_uPdW83phRGjyTulfFCOe5blb1ZjR5Afv5tY4HEHZoAsmQTNuyngcMxjx7TFGuqukoi_YJuWSFrrdcy_frbEFB134uvc-VHfLQJvldVMPc47D8lkHEyrkaa588mlflKJyhfOTY_NNmGHsAj3r2QNxxCpEuYgusBM11FISjYgX5TfnZe1f4LE/4g4/CDxNNHWVRYiYNwWnWUEozQ/h8/h001.79iOZvgQbi1GG9pArKaOpcrGJsYZKOvH9trElxp6FBg)
The coalition of grassroots groups and unions putting on May Day events explains:
> _“This is a war on working people—and we will not stand down. They’re defunding our schools, privatizing public services, attacking unions, and targeting immigrant families with fear and violence. Working people built this nation and we know how to take care of each other. We won’t back down—we will never stop fighting for our families and the rights and freedoms that propel opportunity and a better life for all Americans. Their time is up.”_
Thank you for standing with me as, together, we resist an authoritarian administration and reclaim our government for the people, not the billionaires.
With you in this fight for a better future,
Rashida

name: Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna
subject: GIVE TRUMP THE GOLD!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please sign my petition to honor his FIRST 100 DAYS

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbu3tfnqjo5qsvqmpj62igtqfr0e5ce690rb688_rp22sh2s8i6eob3chj68ob6cth2bs)
---

It’s Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna—and I will ALWAYS fight for President Donald J. Trump.

That’s why I’m going ALL IN to award President Trump the **Congressional Gold Medal** in honor of his **_historic first 100 days in office_** —the highest honor from Congress.
But the **woke, deranged mob is LOSING THEIR MINDS.**

They’re already doing everything they can to smear this effort, block the petition, and make sure President Trump NEVER receives the recognition he deserves.

| | Dear Peter,
---
Today is the National Day of Prayer, and it's a time to reflect on all the prayers that the Lord has answered over the years. To us Believers in Christ, answered prayers are not the exception, they're the standard. 2 Chronicles 7:14 says, _"if my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin and will heal their land."_ The Lord gives four simple but profound commands—humble, pray, seek and turn. The reward for obedience? The Lord will hear, forgive and heal. America is a land that needs the Lord to _hear_ , _forgive_ and _heal_ , but it starts with us. So today, on the National Day of Prayer, I am praying 2 Chronicles 7:14 over America. _Lord, let us be a nation that humbles ourselves before Your throne. We pray that we may seek Your face with a renewed fervor. Apart from You, our ways are wicked, turn us from wickedness and restore us to You. In Jesus name. _ Below is a prayer over America from last year's revival on the National Mall.
---

| | Peter,
---
| | For the first time in 30 years, we have a president who is putting working people first. I talked with Laura Ingraham about Donald Trump’s first 100 days in office, how his rally speech lasted over 90 minutes—when Joe Biden couldn’t stand for 90 seconds—and the Republican Party’s long-overdue shift toward a working-class, pro-worker agenda. _Watch the whole interview below!_

subject: Tell Trump: “Stop blaming Biden for your failures. It’s not his fault you’re a terrible president”
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump: “Stop blaming Biden for your failures. It’s not his fault you’re a terrible president”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ad40c04-d610-4e1e-98e6-7276b7e66d2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0d9fec9-782e-4904-9757-3d2f1ee324d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump has crashed the stock market, pushed the US into a recession, and reignited inflation. And bizarrely, he's blaming Joe Biden — even though Biden hasn't been president for months. Trump has been a disaster, and he can't pass the buck for his failures when he's the one sitting in the Oval Office. [**Add your name, and tell Tell Trump: "Stop blaming Biden for your failures. It's not his fault you're a terrible president**"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7484c0b2-44db-460a-8c75-037cfdd92624/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

This year for [OLCV’s Annual Celebration](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106901603/542977823/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYTZmNWJiLWFkMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OOwQ1TaRT07rCtwLEC6zl3Biyn4f9MYOeYe3Hsw290M=&emci=f78cf265-3626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1a6f5bb-ad26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230) on May 2nd we're giving away this unforgettable glamping trip! Even if you're not attending, this raffle is open to everyone online **until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** — so, **[get your tick](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106901608/542977827/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYTZmNWJiLWFkMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OOwQ1TaRT07rCtwLEC6zl3Biyn4f9MYOeYe3Hsw290M=&emci=f78cf265-3626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1a6f5bb-ad26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)[ets](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106901614/542977833/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYTZmNWJiLWFkMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OOwQ1TaRT07rCtwLEC6zl3Biyn4f9MYOeYe3Hsw290M=&emci=f78cf265-3626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1a6f5bb-ad26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)[ now and support our work!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106901618/542977837/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxYTZmNWJiLWFkMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OOwQ1TaRT07rCtwLEC6zl3Biyn4f9MYOeYe3Hsw290M=&emci=f78cf265-3626-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c1a6f5bb-ad26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)** What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience! By buying a raffle ticket today, you're not only entering to win a once in a lifetime trip, but you are supporting our work of protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. You don't have to attend the event to win, but tickets are limited so get yours now!

Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. For questions about the raffle or OLCV’s Annual Celebration [email](mailto:april@olcv.org "april@olcv.org") OLCV Development Director April Christenson.

For questions about the raffle or OLCV’s Annual Celebration mailto:april@olcv.org "april@olcv.org" OLCV Development Director April Christenson. | | Good luck! Thank you to our generous sponsors! | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

null, I wanted to reach out and personally thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Last week, I officially launched my campaign to become Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I always knew that it would take a massive grassroots team behind me to win this race, but I never anticipated an outpouring of support quite like this. **Already, this team is more than any candidate could hope for, and I can’t express how deeply grateful I am.**
Together, I know we can handle whatever Trump and the GOP throws our way. Together, I know we can keep Michigan blue.
But there’s a long, tough road ahead of us. We have _a lot_ of volunteers to mobilize, voters to register, people to persuade, doors to knock, and ads to get on the air. And all of this is going to take _a lot_ of resources.
**In a race that’s already shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive Senate race this cycle, winning is going to come down to every last grassroots dollar. That’s why I have to ask:[Will you chip in $5 or more to help us continue building a campaign strong enough to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106901901/542978444/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE2ZjViYi1hZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nQhCc1JSB0IAcrCwcHS38Y3KktbTrmxrt0gLo9uuDQ=)**

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. name: Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke
subject: At least we’re not getting shot at
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c757ef9c1f3644698ad2fba19ddca2b8&_e=rmTUlHVvfRAES1__hFCtJeJX0N3X2PBpMEVTzoTzaPk5cd7gdpJxkXfrbnj80dNS56WDsPTRPp9DQ9bou_XLOgCKgWcbaIOCpxsKVK3tf6Hskn2cF3GWSKDinoUMTI_VZVKSov0SWxY7ghj1z8Pwm-TmSpFNm9bpngjEwaoO8PvMtcOQ1K6F6yS1ttN7yDvH-clTqIuneHZPlQX67Z0gCNwU8FHWgula1fbcc_8YxAPy5rT5AqH_jfhtETJsL2jEO8Y6AM0WPrBV4DaAfsRRC89WTigz8acpyNReMtX1XkJNw3DmI1yZQq_ROGIKn5RzvfB2UVf-IyByDM3Oo5IlFJ60QmixKeoyoKV3FeUMZYQ62VbdQ8et_nYgh_igTt1NSuBMZW8tURzlRWxWxGUBNQ%3D%3D)

---

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c757ef9c1f3644698ad2fba19ddca2b8&_e=rmTUlHVvfRAES1__hFCtJeJX0N3X2PBpMEVTzoTzaPk5cd7gdpJxkXfrbnj80dNS56WDsPTRPp9DQ9bou_XLOgCKgWcbaIOCpxsKVK3tf6Hskn2cF3GWSKDinoUMTI_VZVKSov0SWxY7ghj1z8Pwm-TmSpFNm9bpngjEwaoO8PvMtcOQ1K6F6yS1ttN7yDvH-clTqIuneHZPlQX67Z0gCNwU8FHWgula1fbcc_8YxAPy5rT5AqH_jfhtETJsL2jEs4-5eFAW6SiIZvj5LqA4CYp9hYq1K9ONVNCvxybUQkT5-Re7VtZHgXPQYhlSbv8YIzNHu-4MMhLgvEFWT5KuhjYo4SLgJcZaam7goTgrJg8FJUNgiO5e0QIrSoUZfnrf5ichMMN4b5sgKUdJKe9x0A%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. name: SOUNDING THE ALARMS via FFR
subject: judges in PRISON?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0) **[Trump and his MAGA cronies are ARRESTING judges now ↘︎↘︎](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=3&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=4&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)
| [STAND WITH JUDGES >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=5&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)
---
Trump is on an all-out ASSAULT on America’s judicial system.

**FIRST** Trump openly defied a 9-0 Supreme Court ruling.

**SECOND** He arrested a judge last week who didn’t follow his far-right agenda.

**AND NOW** Trump has signaled he’s willing even to arrest Supreme Court Justices if they obstruct his agenda!!
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=6&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)
If he follows through on his threats, you KNOW he will go after the three liberal Supreme Court Justices first.

**This is TERRIBLE : **The judicial branch of the government is meant to be a CHECK on the executive’s power, and now Trump is threatening to take action against judges.

**If we don’t stand with our judges and take action now, there won’t be any more checks and balances on Trump’s power.**
[**_We need 2,500 signatures by midnight to back our judges and the judicial branch. Will you sign our petition to show your support?**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=7&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)
[STAND WITH JUDGES >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60838?t=8&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)
---
We need to stand up for what’s right!

Fight For Reform
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=9&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=10&akid=23029%2E4449941%2EEuu_U0)

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f769936981454f3f83d3ad09984f8181&_e=1d1Yl10FxdXno8ly_iBzFNz7mW1phKP3pL9zyQOkf2GpHU6jrWzfPbdyHDpREGmULx47HOEqgjHT0p-Q3rWSWpOQMLwA1jROyNM6kbeYtqQAgHBgc71EfNoSRcm4q4uuxuaSoNt2Vixs7B5caPxi9f8DZhAIfXjCP415SvnqMrnO99kWYaSIPwwnn8rn36pEDA4OXld6YPvDFlwES1ndE2qg5jbTwXZROWcvMhfHQYPhm3KuesGo_S9xKXhIf-8Ov8DMKEbqnB4p21NQrpjzKHm8SLzSwt59ptDryJ8to8kF_wwHCuxjDcTeIr1wRMTUifNa6XRXDUuYqlZUJbaErKzN04LAJtfySgmaBMEVtIrA0wWGG_biMlihwt6Fv13Nkcnv1mosFWFnxeB3ZE5oMQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f769936981454f3f83d3ad09984f8181&_e=1d1Yl10FxdXno8ly_iBzFNz7mW1phKP3pL9zyQOkf2GpHU6jrWzfPbdyHDpREGmULx47HOEqgjHT0p-Q3rWSWpOQMLwA1jROyNM6kbeYtqQAgHBgc71EfNoSRcm4q4uuxuaSoNt2Vixs7B5caPxi9f8DZhAIfXjCP415SvnqMrnO99kWYaSIPwwnn8rn36pEDA4OXld6YPvDFlwES1ndE2qg5jbTwXZROWcvMhfHQYMK3kraQ6Rw0Fp7SnFADNKuB-wcHjx9EWwPW-4Sp7NLnP0YidwvAb1ICnjO3mn1-wvmji1D7BeStMVCt5BMtmtfTOGhnrOSG5niO_fFJwg9sMNGfEZLLki9iBIDBP3I63gyV-r3c7QuB19AEZYJGcOo_YJ6gtvGxHzduQ-x_Ui5rw%3D%3D)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, Fellow American.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f769936981454f3f83d3ad09984f8181&_e=1d1Yl10FxdXno8ly_iBzFNz7mW1phKP3pL9zyQOkf2GpHU6jrWzfPbdyHDpREGmULx47HOEqgjHT0p-Q3rWSWpOQMLwA1jROyNM6kbeYtqQAgHBgc71EfNoSRcm4q4uuxuaSoNt2Vixs7B5caPxi9f8DZhAIfXjCP415SvnqMrnO99kWYaSIPwwnn8rn36pEDA4OXld6YPvDFlwES1ndE2qg5jbTwXZROWcvMhfHQYM2wwS5h6K0oJttdOgqtiREg7bF3kDiKgRY0EjqMqD-oFAQMom9TcoIp-F--zkwOMxrFQ4TFnE0lyu6KGHnxvFhmiDqhlTj9Bh6P7QHFRu3kl5PxxbNLHhvaLnMkIPD-5zU2ryIvMHbnTPuoUISjAjTAIqdaPQauvYfYyBgiI1lFg%3D%3D)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f769936981454f3f83d3ad09984f8181&_e=1d1Yl10FxdXno8ly_iBzFNz7mW1phKP3pL9zyQOkf2GpHU6jrWzfPbdyHDpREGmULx47HOEqgjHT0p-Q3rWSWpOQMLwA1jROyNM6kbeYtqQAgHBgc71EfNoSRcm4q4uuxuaSoNt2Vixs7B5caPxi9f8DZhAIfXjCP415SvnqMrnO99kWYaSIPwwnn8rn36pEDA4OXld6YPvDFlwES1ndE2qg5jbTwXZROWcvMhfHQYPobr8iKEVzs9ALppBQTzpObW1M1abbJr4bOKZo-Izwg8q4FRoy-mABOMH1scMWDnwvHogRw0GSxILU1C6O3ez4IBtSB-UAWPu29y-2NwmOd-0UnSUyxl2pEiiUP7E4vD56hLOiK-PZxxjwFxbXNFQKQzw1pPblkhEmFZWfRzxLWA%3D%3D)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.

clean_body: We needed it. | | | | Fellow American - this is Vice President JD Vance. . As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, and how different our country would be if the result were different. I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare. Just think - Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life. President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem. Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border. President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country. Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs. President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world. Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades. Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC. That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, Fellow American. But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026. Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country. Here’s the long and short of it - . That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it. . I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country. In Freedom, Vice President JD Vance | | | | | | | | | | | | %unsubscribeurl%

name: Sallie Alcorn, Houston City Council Member
subject: Why I am supporting Amanda Edwards for Congressional District 18
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_april25?refcode=0428_E [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_april25?refcode=0428_E]
Friend,
I am thrilled to announce that I am endorsing Amanda Edwards for Congressional District 18. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement&refcode2=b62c6cc5-b326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca]
Our community needs a strong voice in Washington and I know firsthand Amanda Edwards is that person. Having worked closely with her for many years, I’ve been able to see her incredible work ethic, passion for public service, and effectiveness in getting things done for our community. Amanda has the skills that will enable her to hit the ground running in Congress.
Amanda has extensive public finance law experience spearheading publicly funded deals to build schools, hospitals, and housing which have strengthened our community’s infrastructure; and she will continue to bring the necessary capital back to our area for these critical projects when she is in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement]
Additionally, while on Council, Amanda served on the Transportation, Technology, and Infrastructure Committee and she was instrumental in driving the growth of Houston’s Innovation District, known as The Ion. Our city was able to create a new hub for entrepreneurship and increase venture capital investment in the region from just over $200 million to more than $2 billion over five years. Building that ecosystem has created real opportunities for the next generation of innovators and job creators.
I am supporting Amanda because she has delivered for Houston time and time again. From lifting up community members after Hurricane Harvey to making sure we invest in critical infrastructure now to build a more resilient city tomorrow.
I hope you will join me in supporting Amanda Edwards! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement&refcode2=b62c6cc5-b326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca]
Please support her by contributing here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement&refcode2=b62c6cc5-b326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca] or by visiting edwardsforhouston.com [https://www.edwardsforhouston.com/] !
Thank you,
Sallie Alcorn
Houston City Council Member
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_may25?refcode=0501_AlcornEndorsement]
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. subject: Generations For America Foundation Publishes Transformative Book & Holds Empowering Conference
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MAY 1, 2025 | Contact: James Voymas info@generationsforamerica.com (843) 330-3610 | MT PLEASANT, South Carolina - May 1, 2025 - Generations For America Foundation, a 501(C)(3) non-profit, publishes transformative book and holds empowering conference. We are thrilled to announce
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://generationsforamerica.com/so/10PQCnhr_/c?w=D5DzLCYZT6G0NKP8FpjtFMiI6_myxMaFJC9mhVTz6Zc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9nZW5lcmF0aW9uc2ZvcmFtZXJpY2EuY29tL3NvLzEwUFFDbmhyXz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjAzNzJiMzE5LWMzYWYtNGUxNS1hMjE2LTQ5MDFjYTVhZDUzZCJ9)_**

| | |

| | Generations For America Foundation Publishes Transformative Book & Holds Empowering Conference
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEMAY 1, 2025
---
| Contact: James Voymasinfo@generationsforamerica.com(843) 330-3610
---
| | MT PLEASANT, South Carolina - May 1, 2025 - Generations For America Foundation, a 501(C)(3) non-profit, publishes transformative book and holds empowering conference. We are thrilled to announce the official May 1, 2025 launch of Name It, Change It, Do It: Master Your Habits, Achieve Your Goals, a new book by Ingrid Centurion and Carrie Pasquarello. This book is designed to help you unlock the power of habit and drive meaningful change in your personal and professional life. It is now available on all major platforms including [Lulu.com](https://generationsforamerica.com/so/10PQCnhr_/c?w=rhQKmVlH6TGf7qe1DEDNIjkGxgd40bjLOFgKYi7vU70.). Find out more at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com/post/exciting-book-launch-conference-event](https://generationsforamerica.com/so/10PQCnhr_/c?w=tk7o8zvk2-uzAA7_6WEmTLCTcPy4OK9F1yTauAmRVfg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhZm91bmRhdGlvbi5jb20vcG9zdC9leGNpdGluZy1ib29rLWxhdW5jaC1jb25mZXJlbmNlLWV2ZW50IiwiciI6IjJmMzE4MWMwLTc1ZWQtNDBmNi1hMzI2LWJmZTEwYTI5NDQ1NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjAzNzJiMzE5LWMzYWYtNGUxNS1hMjE2LTQ5MDFjYTVhZDUzZCJ9) Conference: Accelerate & Activate a Change
Join us for an exclusive, full-day event where Ingrid and Carrie will guide you through powerful strategies to identify, create, and activate positive change. This immersive experience will provide the tools, inspiration, and accountability you need to make your goals a reality.
Date: May 31, 2025
Time: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Location: Dignity Room Event Center, 7113 Rivers Ave., North Charleston, SC 29406
What to Expect:
* Inspirational talks from the authors
* Interactive workshops on values, public speaking, book launches
* Planning sessions to map out your future
* Networking with like-minded individuals
* A unique opportunity to ask the authors your most pressing questions

Tickets can be purchased at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com/events-1/conference-accelerate-activate-a-change.](https://generationsforamerica.com/so/10PQCnhr_/c?w=F2usWWbyHb5IeISNK0CK33LuBIiZzVva66MLD8UrDzY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhZm91bmRhdGlvbi5jb20vZXZlbnRzLTEvY29uZmVyZW5jZS1hY2NlbGVyYXRlLWFjdGl2YXRlLWEtY2hhbmdlIiwiciI6IjJmMzE4MWMwLTc1ZWQtNDBmNi1hMzI2LWJmZTEwYTI5NDQ1NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjAzNzJiMzE5LWMzYWYtNGUxNS1hMjE2LTQ5MDFjYTVhZDUzZCJ9) Ingrid Centurion and Carrie Pasquarello are experts in helping individuals and organizations unlock their full potential. Their collective wisdom will empower you to name, change, and do what is necessary to achieve lasting transformation.
###
---
| | [**1985 Riviera Dr Ste 103 PMB 263 Mt Pleasant,SC 29464**](https://generationsforamerica.com/so/10PQCnhr_/c?w=jz2mMZ1Uq8E9dO1W5-3vHf0uGjmQT-bqhDM4OCBZen0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYXBzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vP3E9MTk4NStSaXZpZXJhK0RyK1N0ZSsxMDMrUE1CKzI2MytNdCtQbGVhc2FudCUyQ1NDKzI5NDY0IiwiciI6IjI2Nzg0MTA1LTVjZjMtNDc0Yy05YjBmLWQzYTBkN2NmN2Q0NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjAzNzJiMzE5LWMzYWYtNGUxNS1hMjE2LTQ5MDFjYTVhZDUzZCJ9)

# [Fentanyl Awareness Day rife with absurd claims, lies, and budget cuts](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162626596&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjI2NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYxMjE4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0ODcxMzgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.0yee3x6-58pYLKgm4ahKmS_TaGo26uFbhfh_WSpBIGQ)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162626596&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjI2NTk2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjEyMTgwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4NzEzODA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ZBlhs-HPCemRe2qOweG8Zmguf5ryfdiOclszYz2_5b0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162626596&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjI2NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYxMjE4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0ODcxMzgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.0yee3x6-58pYLKgm4ahKmS_TaGo26uFbhfh_WSpBIGQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=162626596&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNjI2NTk2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDYxMjE4MDYsImV4cCI6MTc0ODcxMzgwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.0yee3x6-58pYLKgm4ahKmS_TaGo26uFbhfh_WSpBIGQ)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcmViZWthaGpvbmVzL3AvZmVudGFueWwtYXdhcmVuZXNzLWRheS1yaWZlLXdpdGg_.oN5N_xp4SwlHurqW0F20ZHLfG-phiT5uKUJNPvFBdB0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/fentanyl-awareness-day-rife-with?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This fact check and analysis is free for everyone. Please consider becoming a paid subscriber to access more content like this.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Lq1v_Dt4GMXL7t7I3BkIx-vS5ucsKgbTSSk_ZTD5n5U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162626596)
A few minutes after RFK Jr walked off the stage at the National Opioid Summit in Nashville[ last week](https://substack.com/redirect/b1972a0d-417c-4157-80ef-f94a9dfea519?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a draft budget report leaked showing Trump's plans to cut about a dozen programs designed to help people with opioid addictions.
The draft budget proposal for HHS, which can be downloaded [in its entirety here](https://substack.com/redirect/4ad06bb1-d923-4677-ab02-5d088312b993?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), clearly lays out plans to eliminate key programs, including the life-saving Narcan program.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/873e6918-f4e2-4929-9651-de4029d74d15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
RFK Jr. [signaled his support for cutting the program](https://substack.com/redirect/a8c84c1e-6321-46da-9fce-da4f7a171689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), despite [immediate backlash ](https://substack.com/redirect/ccb4e4e6-1300-4299-a60f-a3b5f71589e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)from medical professionals.
The proposed cuts don't just undermine progress made in the last four years, but they undermine Trump's own agenda.
Trump declared a[ public health emergency ](https://substack.com/redirect/a8ddb730-2a52-4bb5-92ed-c2623cbb270c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for the opioid epidemic in 2017 - and got bipartisan praise for it.
The Narcan program, in particular, is one of the most successful public health interventions of the last few decades.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/446d4686-2e9d-4ca7-be2e-bd3d9c878509?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There was a 24% drop in opioid overdose deaths last year, thanks in no small part to the $56 million Narcan program.
In 2024, nearly 300,000 Narcan kits were distributed across the country. Nearly 70,000 first responders have been trained under the program.
The [CDC data](https://substack.com/redirect/4d93100d-d4ac-4662-85d2-13488c8b8058?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that 27,000 lives were saved by this program last year.
And it costs all of 0.000008% of the federal budget.
Despite the resounding success and relatively low price tag, opioid deaths are still a major public health concern.
Drug overdose is the leading cause of death for Americans aged 18-44, and the downward trajectory of overdose deaths may reverse if the program is eliminated.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/040f6c3a-e852-43d0-9b6f-a090035aa9b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But Trump -- at least publicly -- has hardly abandoned the opioid-fighting agenda.
Just a month ago, on April 1, the Trump administration released [a summary ](https://substack.com/redirect/24599219-1101-4e81-a26b-09071b4e704e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of their priorities in combatting opioid addiction and deaths, which included promises to not only maintain the programs but to consider expanding them.
And Trump is using his [disastrous tariffs ](https://substack.com/redirect/037ece13-234a-458e-beab-a4f040b3814f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to make it seem like he's accomplishing his goals on this front.
Trump during his [address to Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/15f3fc16-1795-4429-9a25-93d175f8cd45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in March said that Canada and Mexico "have allowed fentanyl to come into our country at levels never seen before."
That's not true. And even if it were true, tariffs are applied to products sold legally -- not illegal drugs.
In 2024, all of 43 pounds of fentanyl were[ seized](https://substack.com/redirect/400f795d-1df5-464e-a419-067a26e85e60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the northern border (0.19% of all fentanyl seized that year) according to [Customs and Border Protection data](https://substack.com/redirect/400f795d-1df5-464e-a419-067a26e85e60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); And most of the people trafficking fentanyl in the US are [US Citizens](https://substack.com/redirect/0db2b666-0403-4868-9653-fb8245fb7cfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And the lies keep getting worse from there.
On Fentanyl Awareness Day (Tuesday, April 29), Pam Bondi made [absurd and false claims ](https://substack.com/redirect/2f103dd1-ca0f-423c-94b1-361df83a4cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that Donald Trump had saved "hundreds of millions of lives" through seizures of fentanyl DOJ allegedly intercepted in the last three months.
She claimed 3,400 kilos of fentanyl had been seized -- and that [75% of Americans would be dead](https://substack.com/redirect/1da1a9a6-31d3-4649-ade3-f1d6722a393e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if they had not stopped the drugs.
"In President Trump's first 100 days we've seized over 22 million fentanyl laced pills, saving over 119 Million lives," [she lied in a Xitter post.](https://substack.com/redirect/3161f49f-54ab-48df-a3c1-3559b71a81f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
For that math to work, that means each pill would have to be split 5.4 ways.
That also means that 119 million people would have to take one of those fractions of a pill, even though research shows t[hat less than 3 million people have an opioid use disorder](https://substack.com/redirect/b5bf780a-ae80-4d1e-9768-600af2f0f4f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And the trace amount of fentanyl in each would have to be a minimum of 2 milligrams per person to be deadly enough to kill each person who takes one-sixth of a pill, meaning 12 milligrams per pill.
The DEA puts the range of all fentanyl concentrations in pills they've seized to be between 0.02 mg and 5.1 mg.
The [DEA says that only two-fifths (42%)](https://substack.com/redirect/be3173c7-1c4a-43ff-a2ec-d2147c700eaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of all fentanyl-laced whole pills seized have even 2 mg of fentanyl each.
So the math isn't mathing, the numbers changed throughout Bondi's presentation, and there's [no credibility to any of those claims](https://substack.com/redirect/2f7a2d94-62bf-42f1-8752-2c0ab2c297d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
She Floriduh'd the data.
Like a crowd of [250,000 ballooning into 1.5 million,](https://substack.com/redirect/8f1255f5-3861-4055-9c29-a8fabe4c7a1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the administration keeps lying about data, while cutting the programs that have made a real difference in helping the people they claim to be helping.

Instead of lowering costs for working families, he’s driven up prices with costly trade wars and wants to waste $90 million on a self-glorifying military parade.

**Trump isn’t governing for us, he’s governing for himself and his billionaire buddies like Elon Musk.**

Now is the time to channel this momentum into action. name: Val Hoyle
subject: Call it what it is: union busting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106905718/542990944/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgyOGNmZC1iNDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmLPAzZvgPmyT1EN6MW0MNmwUl2_af32CG9D5syDYQ=&emci=70c154af-a526-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=74828cfd-b426-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – On this May Day, I'm letting President Trump know this: Peeling back the rights of workers to organize and bargain has nothing to do with "efficiency" or "national security" – it's union busting! President Trump recently issued an unconstitutional executive order that would effectively ban all public sector unions and leave them with no way to exercise their collective bargaining rights. **Last week, a federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration's anti-union efforts.** The fight is far from over, though. Critical workers from flight attendants and VA nurses to postal workers and air traffic controllers could still be stripped of their rights and have their union contracts ripped up. That's because the rights and protections that come from a strong union get in the way of Trump and Musk steamrolling over federal agencies and doing whatever they want to them. But this isn't my first time defending union rights – **I know that when they pull stunts like this, it's because they're scared of how much power workers hold.** [**When they come for one of us, they come for all of us, which means that we must be more united than ever right now. Consider making a donation of $8 and help turn the tide toward workers and restore rights to public sector unions everywhere.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106905719/542990945/-1599294071?refcode=2025-05-01-mayday&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=74828cfd-b426-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgyOGNmZC1iNDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmLPAzZvgPmyT1EN6MW0MNmwUl2_af32CG9D5syDYQ=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106905720/542990946/-1599294071?refcode=2025-05-01-mayday&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=74828cfd-b426-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgyOGNmZC1iNDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7AmLPAzZvgPmyT1EN6MW0MNmwUl2_af32CG9D5syDYQ=) Strong unions mean a strong middle class – and the opportunity to live the American dream that generations of people in the labor movement fought for. **We won't let them take it from us.** Standing together is the only way to win – and I will stay in this fight no matter how long it takes. Happy May Day! In solidarity, _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Peter – On this May Day, I'm letting President Trump know this: Peeling back the rights of workers to organize and bargain has nothing to do with "efficiency" or "national security" – it's union busting! President Trump recently issued an unconstitutional executive order that would effectively ban all public sector unions and leave them with no way to exercise their collective bargaining rights. Last week, a federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration's anti-union efforts. The fight is far from over, though. Critical workers from flight attendants and VA nurses to postal workers and air traffic controllers could still be stripped of their rights and have their union contracts ripped up. That's because the rights and protections that come from a strong union get in the way of Trump and Musk steamrolling over federal agencies and doing whatever they want to them. But this isn't my first time defending union rights – I know that when they pull stunts like this, it's because they're scared of how much power workers hold. = = Strong unions mean a strong middle class – and the opportunity to live the American dream that generations of people in the labor movement fought for. We won't let them take it from us. Standing together is the only way to win – and I will stay in this fight no matter how long it takes. Happy May Day! In solidarity, Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Bernie just called out the elephant in the room:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25622?source=email-20230501&t=1061&akid=8381%2E5885482%2EYKhNPF ]Sanders:'What Democrats lack now is a vision for the future'

of thousands around bold ideas like Medicare for All and real campaign
finance reform that stops billionaires from buying our elections. And Our
Revolution is working every day to build the political power we need to
turn that vision into action.

without your support: donate now, and every dollar will help us stand up

Bernie has issued a clear challenge to party leadership to do better: be
bolder, fight harder, and deliver for working people. And the way to do it
is clear: LISTEN TO THE WORKING CLASS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25622?source=email-20230501&t=1060&akid=8381%2E5885482%2EYKhNPF ]Headline: Bernie Sanders says Democrats have 'paid a political price'
for not listening to the working class

To do it, we need specific, bold plans that speak directly to the lives
and struggles of everyday working families. Trumpism feeds on fear and
division, and establishment politics thrive on timid incrementalism. But
our vision offers clarity, urgency, and real solutions that inspire action
and mobilize voters in towns and cities across America.

That's what Our Revolution is built for, because we know real change
doesn't come overnight, or through compromise with corporate interests.
Change is won through powerful organizing, vocal activism, and unshakable

We wanted to reach out to say one thing —THANK YOU!

By helping us reach our fundraising targets, you are saying that you have Michael’s back as he campaigns to bring his experience, values, and grit to the Governor’s office.
We know we’ve got a long campaign ahead of us, but with you on our side, it will be a blast every step of the way.

subject: 100 Days of Trump Ls
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106908017/542998007/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODgxOTU4MC1iNzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJTHm0MFjYKPY1k_QebGeh88Od7dwW7M2U47m7itgRc=&emci=59ee272c-e725-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f8819580-b726-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)
---
Folks, we know the last 100 days have been rough.
Trump has already done more damage to this country in just 100 days than he did during his entire first term.
But out of the chaos of Trump’s second term, a powerful resistance is blooming. Trump’s plans to overhaul our democracy have faced obstacles from federal judges, dedicated members of Congress, and people just like us who refuse to sit by and let Trump become a dictator.
So just to give you a little bit of hope, here are some of the Ls Trump took over the last 100 days:
⚖️ **Trump’s been sued 186 times** in his first 100 days in office. To put that into perspective, President Biden was only sued 50 times in his first 100 days in office, while President Obama was only sued 30 times.
🧑⚖️ Liberal and conservative judges alike have **blocked dozens of Trump’s executive orders**. Some of the orders blocked include anti-voter measures, an order to keep federal workers from unionizing, an order to deport people using the Alien Enemies Act, and anti-DEI measures for the Department of Education.
🪖 Instead of ending the war in Ukraine on day one like he promised, **Trump’s been forced to admit that Russia has been stringing him along** (surprise, surprise...).
🐶 DOGE has had to walk back its claim of how much money they’ve “saved” the government to $160 billion **while costing taxpayers $135 billion**.
✊ **_Millions_ of people marched** in all 50 states, rejecting Trump’s authoritarian agenda.
📉 All of this (and much more!) has resulted in Trump having **the lowest 100-day approval rating in 80 years.**
None of this would have been possible without people just like you fighting for our democracy. But we’re not done yet.
[Our rights and democracy are worth fighting for. So we’re going to keep applying pressure. Take action TODAY against Trump’s dangerous agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106908018/542998008/1685897564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODgxOTU4MC1iNzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJTHm0MFjYKPY1k_QebGeh88Od7dwW7M2U47m7itgRc=&emci=59ee272c-e725-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f8819580-b726-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)
