clean_body: | Folks, we know the last 100 days have been rough. Trump has already done more damage to this country in just 100 days than he did during his entire first term. But out of the chaos of Trump’s second term, a powerful resistance is blooming. Trump’s plans to overhaul our democracy have faced obstacles from federal judges, dedicated members of Congress, and people just like us who refuse to sit by and let Trump become a dictator. So just to give you a little bit of hope, here are some of the Ls Trump took over the last 100 days: ⚖️ Trump’s been sued 186 times in his first 100 days in office. To put that into perspective, President Biden was only sued 50 times in his first 100 days in office, while President Obama was only sued 30 times. 🧑⚖️ Liberal and conservative judges alike have blocked dozens of Trump’s executive orders. Some of the orders blocked include anti-voter measures, an order to keep federal workers from unionizing, an order to deport people using the Alien Enemies Act, and anti-DEI measures for the Department of Education. 🪖 Instead of ending the war in Ukraine on day one like he promised, Trump’s been forced to admit that Russia has been stringing him along (surprise, surprise...). 🐶 DOGE has had to walk back its claim of how much money they’ve “saved” the government to $160 billion while costing taxpayers $135 billion. ✊ Millions of people marched in all 50 states, rejecting Trump’s authoritarian agenda. 📉 All of this (and much more!) has resulted in Trump having the lowest 100-day approval rating in 80 years. None of this would have been possible without people just like you fighting for our democracy. But we’re not done yet. | | | | | Let's do this, NextGen America | | = |

body:
Every single contribution—whether it is $5, $50, or more—helps build the kind of campaign we need to win.

| Peter, thanks to you, we hit our April fundraising goal.

It’s humbling to know how many folks are stepping up to help us meet this moment. I don’t take any of it for granted.

Every single contribution—whether it is $5, $50, or more—helps build the kind of campaign we need to win. More importantly, it sends a message that Virginians are ready for new leadership. We’re tired of chaos and division, and we’re ready to move forward together.

Thank you for believing in me—and in what we’re building together.

We’ve got a long road ahead, but this team gives me so much hope. I’m so grateful to have you with me in this race.

With all my appreciation,

Abigail

She voted against lowering the cost of prescription drugs, against access to contraception and reproductive health care, and against improving our roads, bridges, and local infrastructure — all while accepting over $150,000 from Big Oil. She says she’s a moderate. But in Washington, she supported MAGA extremists like Jim Jordan and Mike Johnson, voting to advance their dangerous agenda and refusing to stand up to the far right. That’s not leadership — that’s cowardice. I’m running to be the exact opposite of that. If you’re tired of representatives who put party over people, help us flip this seat and deliver real results for Orange County. [▶️ PLEASE CONSIDER RUSHING $10 TO A SPLIT WITH BLUE AMP ACTION AND MYSELF TO SAFEGUARD DEMOCRACY ◀️](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38d999d3-5a48-4721-9630-c9b8cdd0a322/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m a mom, a small business owner, and the daughter of Korean immigrants. I’ve spent my life solving problems, not creating them. And in Congress, I’ll fight for you. Where Young Kim has failed to protect us, I’ll lead with integrity and courage. I’ll show up — not for headlines or lobbyists, but for the people of Orange County. Right now, national Republicans are circling the wagons to protect Young Kim’s seat. But this district is flippable — and we’ve already gained major ground. We need to keep up the pressure, build our momentum, and make sure voters know the truth. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, it’s Esther. Time and again, Young Kim has chosen politics over people. She voted against lowering the cost of prescription drugs, against access to contraception and reproductive health care, and against improving our roads, bridges, and local infrastructure — all while accepting over $150,000 from Big Oil. She says she’s a moderate. But in Washington, she supported MAGA extremists like Jim Jordan and Mike Johnson, voting to advance their dangerous agenda and refusing to stand up to the far right. That’s not leadership — that’s cowardice. I’m running to be the exact opposite of that. If you’re tired of representatives who put party over people, help us flip this seat and deliver real results for Orange County. I’m a mom, a small business owner, and the daughter of Korean immigrants. I’ve spent my life solving problems, not creating them. And in Congress, I’ll fight for you. Where Young Kim has failed to protect us, I’ll lead with integrity and courage. I’ll show up — not for headlines or lobbyists, but for the people of Orange County. Right now, national Republicans are circling the wagons to protect Young Kim’s seat. But this district is flippable — and we’ve already gained major ground. We need to keep up the pressure, build our momentum, and make sure voters know the truth. If you're ready to replace politics-as-usual with leadership that actually serves the people, chip in today to help us take back CA-40: | | | | | | | | | | | | Let’s win this — together. With you in the fight, Esther Kim Varet Candidate for Congress, CA-40 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

Peter, it's Valerie Foushee.

This isn’t a fundraising email — I just want to say thank you for helping us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal last night.

In spite of Trump’s attack on ActBlue this past week, this team stood strong and pitched in whatever they could to fuel our mission of building a better future for families, communities, NC-04, and our country.

You showed Trump and the GOP that you will NOT be intimidated from participating in our democracy, and I’m so inspired by your unwavering commitment, Peter.

Thanks to the dedication of this grassroots team, we’re starting May with a strong surge of support and I’m continuing my work in Congress to defend our fundamental rights, freedoms, and the progress we’re fighting for.

Thank you again for having my back — I promise to always have yours. With gratitude,

Valerie

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Will you take my strategy survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We have big decisions ahead.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106910357/543004797/1328794144?refcode=ea.7e46bc62-bd26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.7e46bc62-bd26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNDZiYzYyLWJkMjYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F5uo2tncPASUiRRE2v11AL55C4MjsnuIXNSMj5kLFB4=&emci=6ea0a25c-bd26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=7e46bc62-bd26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
Over the years, I’ve learned to slow down every now and then — to listen and check in with the people who keep me going. You’re one of those people. Your support doesn’t go unnoticed. I know you have a hundred things pulling at your time and attention, but the fact that you still choose to support this work means everything. I’m so grateful to have you on this team, and I’d love to bring you into this next chapter of our grassroots movement. Right now, my team and I are making some big decisions about how we move forward. We’re taking a hard look at what’s working, what needs to shift, and how JanePAC can rise to meet this political moment with the strength and clarity it demands. **Before we take that next step, I want to hear from you.** **[We’ve created a brief Strategy Survey to get input from the people who’ve been with us on this journey — folks like you. This grassroots movement is the backbone of everything we do, and your perspective will help shape the decisions we make in the weeks and months ahead. clean_body: We have big decisions ahead. | Over the years, I’ve learned to slow down every now and then — to listen and check in with the people who keep me going. You’re one of those people. Your support doesn’t go unnoticed. I know you have a hundred things pulling at your time and attention, but the fact that you still choose to support this work means everything. I’m so grateful to have you on this team, and I’d love to bring you into this next chapter of our grassroots movement. Right now, my team and I are making some big decisions about how we move forward. We’re taking a hard look at what’s working, what needs to shift, and how JanePAC can rise to meet this political moment with the strength and clarity it demands. Before we take that next step, I want to hear from you. | This work has never been about a single voice. It’s a chorus. And your voice belongs in it. Thanks for being here. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Ohio Democrats
subject: 100 days of Senator Jon Husted screwing over Ohioans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
we know it’s hard to believe...
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106910483/543005240/-1132003082?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGM2M2JjZC1iZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ba127rAYSXjLf5av8G3Lo1MLvwQFTu6KxcVkFPZ-E0=) Team,

As Jon Husted marks his 100th day in the Senate this week, we have a simple request: join us in our fight to defeat Husted so we can flip the Senate blue next year.

If that’s all you need to hear, you can donate here: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/odp-email-250501-husted**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106910484/543005241/-1132003082?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGM2M2JjZC1iZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ba127rAYSXjLf5av8G3Lo1MLvwQFTu6KxcVkFPZ-E0=)

If you need a breakdown of all the damage Husted has done in just 100 days, we’ve got you covered:
* He cozied up to Elon Musk while DOGE laid off hundreds of public servants in Ohio
* He advocated for Medicaid work requirements that could result in 61,000 Ohioans losing access to healthcare
* He went on the news and said he’ll do WHATEVER Donald Trump wants
* He supported Trump’s tax on working families by rubber stamping his tariffs
* He voted to put corporate donors and special interests above the needs of Ohio’s working families
* AND despite claiming otherwise, he still largely refuses to listen or meet with constituents that are upset with him only working for the wealthy

That’s just the tip of the iceberg. Whether you’re a senior on social security, a veteran who relies on the VA for care, or a family trying to give their children a good life, Jon Husted has spent the past 100 days leaving you behind while helping out-of-control billionaires get rich off the chaos.

**Now here’s the good news: if we beat Husted in the midterms next year, not only do we send him a message that we refuse to let him keep screwing Ohioans over, but we could flip the Senate, too.**

It won’t be an easy feat, considering he’s got Elon Musk on his side, who spent over $300 million in recent elections to help his right-wing allies.

But we’re confident that with you on our team, we can get it done. [_**So we’re asking: will you donate today to fuel our fight to defeat Husted so Democrats can take back the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106910485/543005242/-1132003082?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGM2M2JjZC1iZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ba127rAYSXjLf5av8G3Lo1MLvwQFTu6KxcVkFPZ-E0=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106910486/543005243/-1132003082?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Husted_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGM2M2JjZC1iZDI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ba127rAYSXjLf5av8G3Lo1MLvwQFTu6KxcVkFPZ-E0=)**

Peter — Thank you for helping us reach our April fundraising goals. With your help, we got where we need to be to keep up the fight for Democratic candidates who will undo Trump’s extremist agenda. We have a lot of work ahead of us — but we know it’s possible with your support. Thanks, Peter! We also wanted to take a moment to acknowledge **May Day.** Working people across the country have worked persistently to earn better wages, benefits, and working conditions — not just for themselves, but for _everyone. _ We acknowledge our shared history and stand in solidarity with labor unions across the country. Now, more than ever before, we must recognize that the hard-working people of this country have more in common with each other, regardless of our zip codes, and less in common with a corrupt administration that seeks to undermine American values and our way of life. **After all, we all want and deserve a Fair Shot at success. body:
Senate Dems need you in this fight!
| **FIRST: Bernie Sanders launched his Fighting Oligarchy tour!

THEN: Cory Booker made HISTORY with his 25 hour speech on the Senate floor!

_NOW: Adam Schiff is SLAMMING Trump and his MAGA mob for putting billionaires over the American people! ⬇️_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89681?t=6&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e) [**We need 2,000 supporters reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats like Sanders, Booker, and Schiff for always having our backs! You’ve been hand-selected »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89682?t=7&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89682?t=8&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e)
---
TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Senate Democrats,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge against Donald Trump and his MAGA minions as they attack our democracy!**

I know that Trump has put a huge target on your backs — so it means the world that you aren’t backing down even a little bit.

**_Our work is far from over:_ Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING.**

As a proud Democrat, you have my word that I will join your fight and do _everything_ I can to help take back the Senate and stop this dangerous administration.

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89682?t=9&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89682?t=10&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19719%2E878179%2ErXul7e)

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8a56013466b642a7bb950e7d28c15274&_e=mmjLtM_N_5csbctMs1p8xFnhDmNsKKHh50M_FFDz5CtRkhLMSd6tWJ7tv84IOxktOO13dUg6bBm3GK5ler1mUFq2z4ABhaT3Pr5aG6wvdumsq0pO9pSzoooD8-cpOAYij6vYAnTVILHLQGmRBjmTwiP0JObAe6AadZZNy0hsdGVJih5fgRnrFxZuWaZ0B_-aeB7rSOXSXbZnRCNeNjSPg-aYH58oVTMcJK80S2jk_SxmM1joDN-RwQIxG6Xc0JvzNdPCYftLS13wgLOF-7_bTLLrSfxxvk88i8fUcEKOK6lXTS3sMOQak0PItrlQ8cYio73PrpOwK49CTEDmyWVGle7f1H3VDqqbIQmVr6XTLiGVqzhOPzFr2gJ2Vk_uOjgNZ9k8jgzP07apBq29hi3WyTB41Yml90X9-9-79jADhXs%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8a56013466b642a7bb950e7d28c15274&_e=mmjLtM_N_5csbctMs1p8xFnhDmNsKKHh50M_FFDz5CtRkhLMSd6tWJ7tv84IOxktu6XSq90cbgFfo3IkCIKbG_ITvbFmRILlnhP0rmmAQFjFdhOajmkfNAWPxK04yA-_m84YcWxIj7ciA5_iy8aPpRfyEv5PjIFXwj2hnkZ_rE1dUJ7GAOGKcIJz2aUZSouVy-2zTH4UFSyE7stPlZ6zuLt70sJtnVXkeBxGGusQ9VZPEhOMJia5UFJBFPCkeywrfYBJQWWpWREA_uXbjBVpgz0rBvZeluj8JMkQMHyYs_lqJ7Pymfu776_E3We-yn34x5X-Y0wIKaMBQB-ZnIgraHPk3Mh83pw5dn7FhDxcOaVsjxBFqr7RO1PDXDQD4Wcc2V26fwtDNv4Wp1K-xWIokg%3D%3D)

→ If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission...

→ If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great...

→ If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department...

_**...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected!**_

As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: **This hit piece was horsesh*t and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us.**

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: AOC
subject: I feel more like squaring up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This administration is much more prepared and planned this time around, in terms of the kinds of chaos that they're trying to unleash.
More than legal programs, more than policy, **they are trying to invoke _fear_**.
That is how authoritarianism works. These are the tools to get us to sacrifice and surrender our civil liberties, more than they take them.
Trump pardoned virtually all the January 6th insurrectionists, including specifically people who were arrested with threats against my life.
**I'm not going to give them my fear**. I feel more like squaring up than anything else.
When I was running in 2018, people would say, “Why should we vote for a waitress instead of this 20-year incumbent?” — understandably, right? I didn't have experience. They did. And I often talked about the story of _The Wizard of Oz_.
This was my mom's favorite movie. I know it's in the zeitgeist now because _Wicked_ is out, but genuinely: all of these big, scary things, it reminds me of the end of _The Wizard of Oz_ , where you yank back the curtain — and _it's a little guy_.
**It's a small, scared, incompetent little man**.
I think we need to remain focused. Yes, they are capable of immense amounts of damage.
It can be scary. It's not something we ignore. It's not something we check out from.
But we register it. We say, “OK.” **Then we figure out what our options are and we do the best we can, day by day**.
They're relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250501.rhixns&refcode=em20250501-8743-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250501.rhixns&refcode=em20250501-8743-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250501?refcode=em20250501-8743-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8743_2526796_6evmhc&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250501-8743-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8743%2E2526796%2E6evmhc)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Lexy Doherty
subject: He wants to throw migrants out of helicopters
body:
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://owrlpjx.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0OTAwMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUzMjI0Nzg3OTAzMTIwNzIyLFwiclwiOjE1MzIyNDgwMzY1NDgyOTUxNX0iLCJzIjoiNjI4NTAzYjM2YWRjZTY4MyJ9)
---
|
Friend,

Today marks the 101st day of Trump's second term.

So far we've seen green card holders deported to foreign torture prisons, the termination of 100k+ nonpartisan civil servants, and the elevation of white supremacists to the highest levels of power. Sadly, even bleaker stories await.

They seek to flood the zone hoping to shock us into submission with the sheer magnitude of their attack. How do we stand against such overwhelming odds?

Our only option is to fight fire with fire.**We need to flood** _**_their_** _**zone.

** If every single one of us does our part, everything in our power, we can throw sand into their gears and stop the machine. Imagine it, the power of hundreds of millions of Americans overwhelming _them_ _-_ documenting illegal ICE raids, whistleblowing, marching, voting, anything and everything in our power.

My contribution towards flooding the zone - running for Congress **against a real life devil:**

---
| | [ ](https://owrlpjx.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0OTAwMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUzMjI0Nzg3OTA5NDEyMTc5LFwiclwiOjE1MzIyNDgwMzY1NDgyOTUxNX0iLCJzIjoiMjNmYWI1MzU2NTZjOTk4ZCJ9)
---
|
Alluding to Chilean Fascist Dictator Augusto Pinochet’s notorious _‘death flights’_ where leftist dissidents would be thrown into the ocean from military helicopters, Congressman Collins, my opponent, suggested a migrant accused of a crime (not convicted) be killed in this fashion stating:
_“We could buy him a ticket on Pinochet Air for a free helicopter ride back.”

_ And that's only the tip of the iceberg, he’s callously doubled down on pro-gun legislation in the aftermath of an in-district school shooting, calls out journalists for their Jewish heritage online, and works against his female, minority, and working class constituents every single day.

**What makes me suited to take on and win against this vile man?

** Georgia’s 10th congressional district, a massive swath of urban and rural land between Atlanta and Augusta,_is my entire life,_ and **I am ready to give everything I have towards fighting for the hard working decent people of Georgia’s 10th.

** When I ran in 2024, we broke every Democratic fundraising and voter turnout record in Georgia’s 10th Congressional District. And we proved that our historically red district isn’t so red after all — and now, we’re back to finish what we started.

[If we all start our own individual battles against MAGA, with whatever means are available to us, we overwhelm them, _flood their zone_ , and paralyze their program. The people of GA-10 are opening up a front of our own in this fight - can we count on a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us launch this campaign with momentum and some real firepower?](https://owrlpjx.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0OTAwMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUzMjI0Nzg3OTEzNjA2NDg0LFwiclwiOjE1MzIyNDgwMzY1NDgyOTUxNX0iLCJzIjoiMGMyNThiZTA4OWUxNDgzOSJ9)

---
|
---
| | [ Donate $50 ](https://owrlpjx.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0OTAwMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUzMjI0Nzg3OTE4ODQ5MzY1LFwiclwiOjE1MzIyNDgwMzY1NDgyOTUxNX0iLCJzIjoiNjQ4MmM5Y2VjYzI4MGFhMiJ9)

We have strength in numbers. Do your part. Flood the zone.

| | | [ ](https://owrlpjx.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0OTAwMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUzMjI0Nzg3OTI3MjM3OTc1LFwiclwiOjE1MzIyNDgwMzY1NDgyOTUxNX0iLCJzIjoiY2Q4OTFkZGMzMzc2N2I4MyJ9)

**Lexy Doherty** Democrat for Congress GA-10

# BIG SKY REPORT:
An Update from Senator Daines
---
| Fellow American,

I hope this message finds you well. As your Senator, I'm dedicated to representing Montana's values and delivering results that matter to you. April was a very busy month, and I want to share with you some of the key initiatives I've been working on to keep Montana and our nation strong.

I hope you enjoy this first edition of the _**Big Sky Report**_.
---
|
### Policy Achievements: Advancing Montana’s Priorities
#### Saving Montana’s Coal Jobs
On April 9th, my bill to keep the Bull Mountains Mine near Roundup, Montana open passed the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee with bipartisan support. This mine is the lifeblood of Musselshell County, supporting over 250 jobs and powering America with reliable, Made-in-Montana energy. I also thanked President Trump for his leadership in signing executive orders to boost our coal industry, ensuring our workers and communities thrive. [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPD-p0dQ-COIzf9TGa21ZAzkC58-qUXzu17aRRz3jjs0UdJplmgJGODBqVUcYSRV4WW4K7x3ojY5t9mw4eHNjrxC-jZNf4Oylh2SaZSC7NR3VT-KlWZkxhbA36bXBgLiBeIuykJG7hIVmCGYA_0IKzX-5C_-Q3egX9biwjaEcYZH58PaHJmfQ3Q0j0hECu_HKlLvhBQ-qReNQjS28jlvrl-s%3D) Unleashing American Energy Independence
#### Supporting Our Farmers and Ranchers
I met with U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer to push for expanded market access for Montana’s agricultural producers. Our farmers and ranchers feed the world, and I’m working to secure fair trade deals that protect their livelihoods and keep our rural economy strong.
#### Backing America First Policies
On April 5th, I proudly supported the Senate budget resolution, paving the way for President Trump’s agenda to secure our borders, cut wasteful spending, and reduce taxes. This is a critical step to putting Montana families and businesses first.
---
|
### Community Engagement: Listening to Montanans
#### Inspiring the Next Generation
**I consider it a great duty and privilege to educate and inspire our nation's future leaders**. On April 2nd, I visited with students from St. Ignatius and Centreville High Schools, discussing their dreams and Montana’s future. On April 9th, I welcomed Sidney High School students to a Senate Energy Committee meeting, where they saw firsthand how we’re fighting for our state’s energy jobs. Meeting with Students from Sidney High School
#### Saluting Montana’s Spirit
On April 6th, I joined Montanans in celebrating 406 Day, honoring the grit and pride of our state. From our wide-open spaces to our tight-knit communities, Montana is the greatest state in the nation, and I’m reminded of that every day.
#### Celebrating a Victory for Montana's Small Businesses
On April 25th, I was proud to join local community and business leaders at the opening of Amazon's newest facility in Belgrade, Montana. This new facility means new jobs and improved service for Montana's small businesses! [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPD-p0dQ-COIzf9TGa21ZAzkHGZEWtctNdoHboDQ33D1whJyOGfqIWnTX1wH-ahEDOUNzKoSQKIz7hWpgVnkPjjZPDHBQq7s464Mvnrnzn-kfeOodpuZtgzk_17DKUmKRyn1P-MPkEjdSBuYpZktYhvFvu-ipa3qYDsxi3odVKq7vb9bkzCQCTFazd6LtAPzdbhH6BUhdmrPchiw57pA_Ayo%3D) A victory for Montana's workers and small businesses
---
|
### A Huge Endorsement from President Trump
On April 21st, President Trump officially announced his endorsement of my re-election campaign for Montana's MUST-WIN Senate seat. His support underscores how important this seat is to maintaining our Republican Senate Majority. [**Click here to read his full endorsement and join the fight to keep this seat in Republican hands.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPLDL2f6yg30b_VRHJ0Shg_1Y8sEs3FIFSlzt4luWyM86FaKdh4cjqYj1kg6ZcO_zqt1mHV5ZZaB9-z9Ma9HNZZCmnTEy5Qbn3utY5HD_bfTsxQvJgzUipclGzxS9pqb-OLV0BTNsCnaYbYWGkvRzkixfpTzqzgdfMVMDKt_j0WZGZ1FR4y84rWebzg-aHbMMCqSzprXsZB-JfL5jOYujxHg9YI6sEWqgFK4LNl_nadKncowM8VTb_P8viIGVIG7ScH9fdeSd9Ixa6am7srgbFuRLR0amL-VReFP5KZ9kzeOivN-x3r6pWqiaOwUM3DNwWWERXNGw0pm4DbIusWcWv1OGVw7qksBPkN9liUoJfSVQJ_GX-no38lqFYazru6gpsRlTz3NP9GWXw5dqpdBEa1e0yVXG0laJZTcJ9UcxF0R4fLEqdn2UTpxB-INbB6rFJndhlDztcNAz8uAHqWQ8vYM%3D)
---
|
### Looking Ahead
Your support makes all of this possible, and I’m committed to keeping Montana’s voice strong in D.C. As we face new challenges, I’ll continue fighting for our jobs, our values, and our way of life. If you’re able, please consider making a contribution to help sustain our efforts. Every dollar helps us keep America first.

[**Support Our Fight for Montana!**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPLDL2f6yg30b_VRHJ0Shg_1Y8sEs3FIFSlzt4luWyM86kgy3hPJmHJSeezK7zYxD_-pNIq4m1aQAA6IP22dkxN-Kg3hPsy0czDntsdUoYMhwgSaIF0LWR68e1NmIejgIUf6lu2kca838QSSQxNvD7osv54ribb-KtvAC1W9bGu6B1Ix0ys0BBJWMWRijzt3RPP-zXZ9cSoYQHaWySsSMM4KXqN9A1wqRcKfuuNFlbafjrD5iuj5RRNwRyJcquE_lNpnvJ_EJBt96GKkIEYR75ImcqlpR_QSCLYT_Clbi7JhAqLwr-5WNf05T3bCYPIP_jYvhB7fWWCRR7LvQVKuVAym4qWuhdhZD5p3ulSSphBjqb91NONqk5LdTJlEKXqPCZEejp1--natQWI-AX-F-KXEWfAYT0Fj0_AYl_KKANOHB)

For Montana,
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPLDL2f6yg30b_VRHJ0Shg_1Y8sEs3FIFSlzt4luWyM86kgy3hPJmHJSeezK7zYxD_-pNIq4m1aQAA6IP22dkxN-Kg3hPsy0czDntsdUoYMhwgSaIF0LWR68e1NmIejgIUf6lu2kca838QSSQxNvD7osv54ribb-KtvAC1W9bGu6B1Ix0ys0BBJWMWRijzt3RPP-zXZ9cSoYQHaWySsSMM4KXqN9A1wqRcKfuuNFlbafjrD5iuj5RRNwRyJcquE_lNgQav_QIQ0dNUmsaavwiSsE-qvxUI3t-ReZgfRSvbsIit6udyFNTx_Qgl0oODv1ZFUhu5kVxoj209CECo9siwkOlAL-r6Fj-B0EIQul0IC6pQEKfGKLdhYVykLSdIzLIsF3L4FLdFQHMD7ATr6sAhfUI8VAZujmeJRU025a9ZY4S)
_**Senator Steve Daines**_

[**DONATE NOW » **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c3db09bbdbf94480af6f903b790f8ff6&_e=55VF5lCq9qMBaKt4WKBIPLDL2f6yg30b_VRHJ0Shg_1Y8sEs3FIFSlzt4luWyM86kgy3hPJmHJSeezK7zYxD_-pNIq4m1aQAA6IP22dkxN-Kg3hPsy0czDntsdUoYMhwgSaIF0LWR68e1NmIejgIUf6lu2kca838QSSQxNvD7osv54ribb-KtvAC1W9bGu6B1Ix0ys0BBJWMWRijzt3RPP-zXZ9cSoYQHaWySsSMM4KXqN9A1wqRcKfuuNFlbafjrD5iuj5RRNwRyJcquE_lNjy4IZpLhV2QeP7YxvNMizIO4BVahiPRkLHzPdzzKl_9ZplvAak0veDzkrquqTGRgWDCBbgW7tQ6PhJdAj6E35jp9elSIcENjtydFnseAtB5Oip245cGgZVeEy0zxak2SlNa0C5SX5FClziq3EeHMwH4BoOolbi7lKd5r5AZwSQr)

---
|
#### ABOUT SENATOR STEVE DAINES
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track._

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Saluting Our Service Members and Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
This Month, We Honor Those Who Serve

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, This May, we proudly recognize Military Appreciation Month – a time to honor the men and women who have answered the call to defend our nation.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/g8Y9hrbLpDM8/bjBneVJLcEJwNGtVUCt2NmNBSXZad1dpRDRnMzZPS0VzRmt0RytvbTRKampCMWR6c25WNW1QT3VhOUZGS1R6MWNtSmFubVNVSmJ4TXdwL245cVNiYXIydU94UTV6dDNvekVOZ2NuN3d1bHc9S0/)
---
| | To the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Space Force, and Coast Guard, and to the families who support them as they serve, we are forever grateful for your courage, sacrifice, and devotion to the cause of our freedom. Oregon Republicans stand firmly with our service members and veterans, not just this month, but every day. We are committed to upholding the values they protect: liberty, duty, and American pride. Please join us in taking a moment this month to thank a service member, honor a veteran, and remember the sacrifices they make to keep America strong and free. Thank you,
Oregon Republican Party
---
---

| | Dear Fellow American,

As President of The Heritage Foundation, I launched my book _Dawn 's Early Light: Taking Back Washington to Save America_ as a rallying cry for the fight against the Deep State.

**And I 'd like to give you the first chapter of my book as a free eBook today! **

In this free eBook, you will learn about The Heritage Foundation's plans to (metaphorically) burn down the Deep State and rebuild a renewed America from the ashes.

These are the same plans that we're working with the Trump-Vance administration to implement right now.

**You can get your free digital copy of _Dawn 's Early Light: Chapter One_ using the secure link below. **

[**https://secured.heritage.org/dawns-early-light-ebook/**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuekldIteknop5I6ITma603fgy&s=GPNLOHJHIKPFDEEH)

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

name: TRUMP PRESIDENTIAL SURVEY
subject: Hey, got 100 seconds?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: John Fetterman
subject: some not great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10070%2E434096%2EcUGfHh ]John Fetterman

Hey folks, it’s John.

Hate to be the bearer of bad news, but we fell short of our big April end-of-month fundraising goal.

It’s not great timing. The Senate is back in session this week, and if the GOP sees our low numbers, they'll think we don't have what it takes to stop their plan to gut Social Security and hand out even *more* tax cuts to their rich buddies. 🙄

I say this all the time cuz it's true: Social Security is *sacred*. YOU paid into it. YOU earned it. And I’ll always fight to protect it.

But the truth is, I need your help to protect your Social Security and other programs for working families. I don't have tech bros bankrolling this campaign. It’s just us – regular folks, giving a few bucks at a time to keep this grassroots team rolling.

So I’ve gotta ask: Can you toss in $5 (or whatever you can afford) to help us bounce back? Let’s stand together and tell these rich dudes: Do NOT f*ck with working families. >>

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51041?t=1002&akid=10070%2E434096%2EcUGfHh

This team has had my back from the beginning, and I’ll always have yours. Grateful for yinz.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=10070%2E434096%2EcUGfHh

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=10070%2E434096%2EcUGfHh

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hi Peter, **Last night, Senator Thom Tillis cast the deciding vote in favor of continuing Trump's disastrous tariffs, despite their damaging impact on North Carolina families and businesses._Even when given the chance to do the right thing, Tillis turned his back on us._** Wiley has spoken out fiercely against this, because it’s clear that these tariffs are crippling our economy — costing American families an average of $3,500 per year and hitting our agriculture industry hard. Local businesses are struggling, shelves are emptying, and retirees are watching their investments dwindle. **Yet, Tillis chooses to follow Trump’s orders rather than defend the people of North Carolina.** North Carolina deserves bold leadership that prioritizes working families and stands up against harmful policies. That’s what Wiley is committed to bringing to the U.S. Senate. But he needs your help to get there. _Peter — This moment demands a grassroots movement powered by people who refuse to accept the status quo._ Together, we can show them that North Carolina demands more than empty promises and harmful votes. **[Will you pitch in today to fight back against Tillis’ harmful decisions and support Wiley’s campaign for meaningful change? clean_body: | = Hi Peter, Last night, Senator Thom Tillis cast the deciding vote in favor of continuing Trump's disastrous tariffs, despite their damaging impact on North Carolina families and businesses.Even when given the chance to do the right thing, Tillis turned his back on us. Wiley has spoken out fiercely against this, because it’s clear that these tariffs are crippling our economy — costing American families an average of $3,500 per year and hitting our agriculture industry hard. Local businesses are struggling, shelves are emptying, and retirees are watching their investments dwindle. Yet, Tillis chooses to follow Trump’s orders rather than defend the people of North Carolina. North Carolina deserves bold leadership that prioritizes working families and stands up against harmful policies. That’s what Wiley is committed to bringing to the U.S. Senate. But he needs your help to get there. Peter — This moment demands a grassroots movement powered by people who refuse to accept the status quo. Together, we can show them that North Carolina demands more than empty promises and harmful votes. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = — Wiley Nickel HQ Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States ** | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

The fact is, we’re facing a MAGA onslaught of measures that add up to a widespread power grab. The SAVE Act could stop millions of Americans from voting. The effort to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat would defy over 2.7 million voters who re-elected Justice Allison Riggs. And the Florida Legislature’s effort to virtually end the state’s ballot initiative process would take a critical policymaking tool away from the public.
This is the extreme GOP playbook: Rip away voting rights and go state by state to dismantle our democracy and silence the will of the people. Now, we must continue to do everything we can to stop them.

If the MAGA GOP’s blatant disregard for our democracy outrages you, here’s what you can do about it: = Thanks for your support, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: People are angry, and they should be.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s May Day, otherwise known as International Workers’ Day, and thousands
of working-class people are protesting and taking action to send a clear
message: we’re sick and tired of an economy that only works for the rich
and powerful.

People are angry, and they should be. In the wealthiest country in the
world, 1 in 4 Americans are using buy-now, pay-later financing services
just to afford groceries.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250501-dm?refcode=em20250501-36634&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36634_1203867_d-NwS4&akid=36634%2E1203867%2Ed-NwS4 ]Headline from Fortune magazine, reading "A quarter of U.S. consumers
are now financing groceries with buy-now, pay-later as economic pressures
mount, survey says." Subhead reads "More than 40% of buy-now, pay-later
users made a late payment in the past year, according to data from Lending
Tree." The headline is accompanied with an image of a man in a Frozen Food
aisle of a grocery store, looking at the freezer shelves.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump, his billionaire backers like Elon Musk, and the
far-right majority in Congress are trying to rip away our Social Security,
Medicare, and Medicaid, cutting federal funding for critical public
services like education and food assistance, letting corporate
price-gouging run rampant, and rolling back workers’ rights — all to serve
the rich and keep corporate tax breaks flowing.

And we know why. Millionaires, billionaires, and corporate super PACs have
hijacked our democracy. Ever since the Supreme Court’s Citizens United
ruling in 2010, our elections have been flooded with corporate cash.

In 2024 alone, just 150 billionaire families spent nearly $2 billion on
our elections, trying to buy influence, push corporate Democrats into
power, and secure a Republican trifecta in Washington.

It’s happening on BOTH sides of the aisle: corporate donors are buying
seats in Congress, and working-class communities are paying the price.
That’s exactly what’s happened in Michigan’s 13th district, and we’re
trying to fix it.

In 2026, it’s the working class vs. the billionaires, and it starts in
Michigan’s 13th congressional district.

Working-class progressive Donavan McKinney is taking on out-of-touch,
self-funded multimillionaire Rep. Shri Thanedar, who’s backed by the
Crypto lobby and other corporate PACs.

This is the first 2026 primary race to test the strength of our
working-class, progressive movement. If Donavan and other JD candidates
are going to stand a chance against these powerful opponents and their war
chests, we need people like you in our corner NOW.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250501-dm?refcode=em20250501-36634&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36634_1203867_d-NwS4&akid=36634%2E1203867%2Ed-NwS4 ]On this May Day, pitch in a split contribution of $5 to
Justice Democrats and Donavan’s campaign to fuel our fight for more
working-class representation in Congress →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250501-dm?refcode=em20250501-36634&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36634_1203867_d-NwS4&akid=36634%2E1203867%2Ed-NwS4 ]Contribute $5

Justice Democrats has proven time and time again that organized people can
beat organized money, but we honestly can’t do it without your support.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250501-36634-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36634_1203867_d-NwS4&akid=36634%2E1203867%2Ed-NwS4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36634%2E1203867%2Ed-NwS4

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Katie Porter
subject: Couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We hit our April fundraising goal, and we aren’t slowing down.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39691%2E3422442%2ETK4RIs)
Dear Derek,
As a professor, I teach my students that the only way to finish a big project like a research paper is to hit smaller milestones along the way.
Political campaigns are no different. Under our current system, we need to raise millions to dollars to win. To get there, my team and I set monthly goals to keep us on track.
**In April, we set a target of raising $75,000 over email. I’m delighted to tell you that thanks to the donations of Porter Supporters like you, we were able to hit our goal!**
I don’t take these contributions for granted. I manage the budget for my family, so I know what it means for everyday folks to chip in. Because I reject money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, I literally could not do this without you.
_Thank you._
Our campaign is heading into May energized by the outpouring of grassroots support and ready to keep doing the work.
In this moment, Californians need strong leadership, and I’m eager to continue listening to their stories and amplifying their voices.
**[If you have a few dollars to spare, I would so appreciate a donation to give us a head start on making our May fundraising goal. Now that we’ve hit one milestone, we have to keep up the momentum for victory in 2026.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250501_1_ak?refcode=em20250501-39691&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39691_3422442_TK4RIs&akid=39691%2E3422442%2ETK4RIs)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250501_1_ak?refcode=em20250501-39691&refcode2=39691_3422442_TK4RIs&akid=39691%2E3422442%2ETK4RIs)
Thanks again, and more soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250501-39691&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39691_3422442_TK4RIs&akid=39691%2E3422442%2ETK4RIs)**

clean_body: We hit our April fundraising goal, and we aren’t slowing down. Dear Derek, As a professor, I teach my students that the only way to finish a big project like a research paper is to hit smaller milestones along the way. Political campaigns are no different. Under our current system, we need to raise millions to dollars to win. To get there, my team and I set monthly goals to keep us on track. In April, we set a target of raising $75,000 over email. I’m delighted to tell you that thanks to the donations of Porter Supporters like you, we were able to hit our goal! I don’t take these contributions for granted. I manage the budget for my family, so I know what it means for everyday folks to chip in. Because I reject money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, I literally could not do this without you. Thank you. Our campaign is heading into May energized by the outpouring of grassroots support and ready to keep doing the work. In this moment, Californians need strong leadership, and I’m eager to continue listening to their stories and amplifying their voices. Thanks again, and more soon, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: This is a high-velocity event
body:
She talked about how the checks and balances that we have historically relied on have begun to buckle
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)

Last night, Vice President Harris gave a powerful call to action for solidarity in the face of fear and division, and she reminded listeners that our country belongs to the people — not those in power.
She spoke about how what we are seeing right now is not simply chaos -- it is a high-velocity event, a swift-implementation of an agenda that has been decades in the making.
**[Watch the clip.](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2961?t=2&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)**
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2961?t=3&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)
She talked about how the checks and balances that we have historically relied on have begun to buckle and when that happens, the one final check, balance, and power that must not fail is the voice of the people.
**[Watch the clip.](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2962?t=4&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)**
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2962?t=5&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)
**[Or you can watch the full speech here.](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2963?t=6&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)**
Thank you for reading, watching, and staying in the fight.
\- Team Kamala
* * *

🇺🇸 **Wait... Before you click away!** 🙏
The Democratic National Committee is leading the fight to stop Trump's agenda and elect a Democratic Congress that will hold him accountable.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
If everyone reading this donated $20 to the DNC today, they'd have the resources to get it done. Unfortunately, not everyone gives.
[**If you understand how important a strong Democratic Party is at this moment, we're asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250501&refcode2=554_2563979_MGXlK0&akid=554%2E2563979%2EMGXlK0)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: May Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8529%2E5257348%2Eza1sTR)
Hi Derek,
This May Day, I’m celebrating workers across the country, their struggles, and their progress by pledging that I’ll always be a staunch ally of the labor movement.
I’ve been a strong supporter of workers for a long time.
I launched my Senate campaign at the IATSE union hall in Burbank. I’ve marched alongside countless workers fighting for better wages and protections, including janitors and health care workers, Teamsters and carpenters, striking actors and writers, SEIU members, and many more. And I’ve fought in Congress to pass legislation to protect workers’ rights to organize their workplace. That’s what I want to talk about today.
You see, a few years ago, the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ (or _PRO Act_ for short) passed with bipartisan support in the House of Representatives.
But because of Republican intransigence in the U.S. Senate, the bill never stood a chance of passing.
The _PRO Act_ would begin to turn the tide against a decades-long assault on workers’ rights, from so-called “right to work” laws passed by Republican states to the union-busting efforts of major corporations.
We need to support the workers fighting for better wages and conditions — and it starts with passing the _PRO Act_.
**[Will you stand with workers across California and this country today by adding your name alongside mine, calling on Congress to pass the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act?_](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250501-may-day-pro-act.vUovvl&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8529%2E5257348%2Eza1sTR)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250501-may-day-pro-act.vUovvl&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8529%2E5257348%2Eza1sTR)
---
Thanks for adding your name to stand with the millions of working people across our country. I’m grateful for your support.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5245?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8529%2E5257348%2Eza1sTR)

name: Warner HQ
subject: NYT: “Trump Says a Recession Might Be Worth the Cost”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
didn’t he campaign on affordability?

|
---

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106915470/543022378/-177109505?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TrumpRecession_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTI2YzQzZC1jYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Oyj9_1uXCPi6i3ANm20hjxL1oxnbQJy-9LbM1lwoHE=) Derek,

Donald Trump is actively taking a chainsaw to our economy.

His administration has illegally fired _thousands_ of federal workers, including many folks right here in Virginia. Trump and Elon have gutted essential services that Virginians rely on to give billion dollar tax cuts to the wealthiest few in America. And Americans are paying the price for his reckless tariffs and unnecessary trade wars.

Inflation is up. Your retirement account is worth less. The stock market is tumbling. And more and more economists are warning us that a recession could be inevitable if Trump’s policies remain.

**Yet Trump’s message to Americans is that _a recession is worth it._**

Didn’t he center his campaign around lowering costs and making things more affordable? So much for delivering on his promises on Day 1 – we’re over 100 days into Trump’s presidency and our economy is only getting worse.

Senator Warner won’t rest until he can end these sloppy policies that hurt Virginians and all Americans. But that makes him a top Republican target next year.

Trump, Elon Musk, and their army of special interests – the ones who pose to benefit at the expense of working Virginians – could spend millions to defeat Mark and protect their tax cuts. We need to be ready to fight back against the onslaught of spending coming our way.

[_**So we’re asking: if you're not impacted yet by Trump's economic disaster, chip in to Senator Warner’s reelection campaign so he can keep fighting to help folks who are.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106915471/543022400/-177109505?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TrumpRecession_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTI2YzQzZC1jYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Oyj9_1uXCPi6i3ANm20hjxL1oxnbQJy-9LbM1lwoHE=)

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Warner [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106915472/543022421/-177109505?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TrumpRecession_250501_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTI2YzQzZC1jYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Oyj9_1uXCPi6i3ANm20hjxL1oxnbQJy-9LbM1lwoHE=)

name: The Squad
subject: The meaning of May Day
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250501-1337-foote&t=1001&akid=1337%2E342411%2ESGY04T ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Unions are proof that when we stick up for each other we are unstoppable.
Together, we have the power to stop injustice — in our workplace and our
government — and create the world we deserve.

In these dangerous times, we need the spirit of solidarity more than ever.
[ https://aflcio.org/formaunion?akid=1337%2E342411%2ESGY04T ]So this May Day, we’re asking you to start building a union at your
workplace. [Learn how and connect with an AFL-CIO organizer here.]

Workers have won victories like the minimum wage, the 8-hour day, and an
end to child labor. May Day celebrates these achievements — but our wins
aren't permanent unless we defend them.

And workers have so much more to achieve — like Medicare for All, student
debt cancellation, a Green New Deal, peace, and living wages for all! None
of that is possible without worker organizing.

You may have donated to Our Squad in the past; you may have signed
petitions and called your legislators. We’re grateful for everything
you’ve done.

[ https://aflcio.org/formaunion?akid=1337%2E342411%2ESGY04T ]This May Day, we’re asking you to take the next big step by building
power in your workplace by learning more about forming a union!

In Solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1337%2E342411%2ESGY04T

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge Announces Major Endorsements in Re-Election Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leslie Rutledge for Lt
body:
Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge Announces Major Endorsements in Re-Election Campaign

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/leslierutledge.com/lt-governor-leslie-rutledge-announces-major-endorsements-in-re-election-campaign-10349975?e=624a44d946)
---
|
---
| | | | | **May 1, 2025****FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:****Christie Chism****Christie@LeslieRutledge.com**
---
|
# **Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge Announces Major Endorsements**
# **in Re-Election Campaign**
---
| **LITTLE ROCK, AR —** Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge today announced a strong wave of endorsements in her re-election campaign, including support from Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders, U.S. Senators John Boozman and Tom Cotton, U.S. Representatives French Hill, Steve Womack, Bruce Westerman, and Rick Crawford, as well as state legislative leaders Senate President Pro Tempore Bart Hester and House Speaker Brian Evans."I am honored and deeply grateful to have the support of so many strong conservative leaders from across Arkansas," said**Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge.** "Working alongside Governor Sanders and our legislative and congressional delegations, we’ve delivered real results for Arkansas families — from protecting our freedoms to growing our economy. I’m excited to continue this work and fight every day for the people of our great state."**Governor Sanders praised Rutledge’s record and her leadership:** "Leslie has been a strong ally in advancing my bold, conservative agenda for Arkansas," said **Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders**. "She leads with strength, stands up for our values, and delivers real results for the people of our state. I’m proud to endorse her re-election and look forward to continuing our work together to keep Arkansas the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family."**Senator Tom Cotton echoed that sentiment:** “I proudly endorse Lieutenant Governor Leslie Rutledge for reelection. Leslie has been a fearless fighter for Arkansas values. She has never backed down from a fight to protect our constitutional rights, defend the unborn, and push back against federal overreach, and we need her to keep serving Arkansas.”**— Senator Tom Cotton****Senator John Boozman also voiced strong support for Rutledge’s continued leadership:** "Leslie Rutledge is serious, battle-tested, and alongside Governor Sanders, she is making Arkansas stronger every day. Leslie’s record of fighting for farmers, families, and freedoms speaks for itself, and I’m proud to endorse her for another term as Lieutenant Governor." **— Senator John Boozman****Congressional leaders continued the praise, saying:** "I am proud to endorse Leslie Rutledge for another term as Lieutenant Governor because she has worked tirelessly and faithfully to strengthen the Arkansas economy, support and protect Arkansas families, and deliver on a bold conservative agenda while fairly presiding over the Senate during the Legislative Session. Leslie and Boyce have chosen to raise their daughter in the Second District, and I am proud to represent them and honored to call her my friend.” **— Congressman French Hill** "I am proud to endorse Leslie Rutledge for re-election as Lieutenant Governor. She shows up every day to fight for Arkansans, and Arkansas is stronger because of her service.”**— Congressman Bruce Westerman** "Leslie Rutledge is a true conservative who champions personal freedoms and pro-business policies, strengthening Arkansas communities and driving economic growth in our state. I proudly endorse Leslie for Lieutenant Governor because I am confident she will continue to put Arkansans first.”**— Congressman Steve Womack** "I am proud to endorse Lieutenant Governor Leslie Rutledge for re-election. Leslie is a proven conservative fighter who understands the values and needs of Arkansas families, farmers, and small businesses. She and her husband, Boyce, operate a row crop and timber farm right here in my district, so she knows firsthand the challenges our rural communities face. I know she will continue working tirelessly to support Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders’ bold, commonsense agenda.”**— Congressman Rick Crawford****Support also poured in from state legislative leaders:** "Leslie Rutledge knows how to move conservative priorities forward, and she’s committed to making Arkansas stronger for every family. Working alongside Lieutenant Governor Rutledge, I was proud to help advance Governor Sanders’ bold conservative agenda. I am excited to endorse her re-election as Lieutenant Governor."**— President Pro Tempore Bart Hester, Arkansas State Senate** "Leslie Rutledge is a proven leader. As former Attorney General and now Lieutenant Governor, she has consistently championed the values that matter most to Arkansans. I've seen her unwavering commitment to faith, families, and freedoms. I’m proud to support her re-election so she and Governor Sanders can continue to keep Arkansas moving in the right direction."**— Speaker Brian S. Evans, Arkansas House of Representatives** Lt. Governor Leslie Rutledge made history as Arkansas’s first female Attorney General and currently serves as the state’s first female Lieutenant Governor. She is running for re-election in 2026.
---

I want to take a moment today to share my journey with you.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916244/543025209/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=&emci=16c06ee0-0026-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9cc08a40-cf26-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)

Derek: Eight years ago, Donald Trump’s election drove me into the 2018 race for a U.S. House seat. I was one of the first Congressional candidates to run that year and winning was a long shot. With the help of you and so many others, I won, but, probably like you, I can’t believe we’re here again. Eight years later, I'm still doing everything I can in Congress to fight against President Trump’s reckless and dangerous actions.

**So I want to take a moment today to share my journey with you._[But before I do, will you rush a donation ahead of our midnight deadline to help us reach our $5,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916246/543025210/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)_**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916248/543025213/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)
My father came to the United States as a refugee fleeing war-torn Poland during WWII. It was his experience that led me to want to serve. I wanted to give back to my community and the country that has given my family and me so much. So I served in the Air Force and in Teach for America.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916249/543025215/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)
I earned my engineering degree from Stanford with an ROTC scholarship and received my M.S. in Technology and Policy from MIT. It was at Stanford that I met Bart, my husband. Together, we raised our beautiful daughters in the suburbs of Philadelphia - the cradle of this great nation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916250/543025216/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)
I got involved in public service because I believe there's work to be done all across the United States, but especially here in Chester and Berks Counties – from greater opportunities for workers and increased profits for businesses to making high-quality health care more affordable and accessible.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916251/543025217/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)
As a longtime resident of Southeastern Pennsylvania, I am dedicated to solving real problems for the people and communities of Pennsylvania. And today, I am here as your representative in Congress because the United States welcomed refugees and gave me a chance at the American dream. It's not an opportunity I take lightly.

**But we're watching in real time as Trump and his GOP allies in Congress are attacking our communities and our democracy, Derek — _again_. I stepped up for this role to fight for hardworking Pennsylvanians many years ago, and I'm committed to continuing the fight to stop the GOP from threatening our most vulnerable and selling out the middle class. But I can't do it alone.**
**_[Will you please give $5 now to help me reach my critical $5,000 goal so I can take on the Trump administration's backward agenda and deliver on the issues that matter to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106916252/543025218/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2MwOGE0MC1jZjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9mhng8TNmbtKx3EGnfYsNidjF-EVXBslqE5vkbeK7cI=)_**
