name: Voter Action Project
subject: A sacred promise to the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=QEPNcEYYi3k30vxKLw/w7da1LXQmWVqXpWlWvj6sUOrzmc7olP05vBPe63nMeVZrzMeSOxuEVez7zhfdTWKxgodwCGu2LUc+WpHWRqxLj7Q=]
Folks,
President Trump and his allies have spent the past 100 days attacking our rights, undermining our democracy, and enriching the ultra-wealthy, while driving up the cost of living for working-class Americans. It’s a deliberate strategy to distract and divide us while they seize power and wealth.
We see through their games. It’s time to join together and demand something different — not just by resisting their agenda, but by offering our own that guarantees justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL.
That’s why we’re calling on every elected official—from Congress to city hall—to deliver on what we’re calling The People’s Promise .
Learn more and sign on to The People's Promise today >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Here are the key points:
* An Economy That Works for Everyone: All workers earn a livable wage and have the right to unionize. Americans can afford essentials like quality healthcare, housing, and childcare.
* A Government for the People: The wealthiest among us pay their fair share in taxes. Every child can count on the quality education they deserve, and every person has access to a strong safety net they can count on when they need it.
* Equal Rights & Opportunity for All: Nobody’s freedom can be taken without due process. Our votes are protected and counted. And our neighborhoods are free from hate and discrimination.
These aren’t radical demands—they’re the bare minimum. It’s time for our elected leaders to deliver.
Add your name right now and demand a return of government for the people and by the people immediately >> [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://peoplespromise.us/add-your-name-2/?source=043025swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QEPNcEYYi3k30vxKLw/w7da1LXQmWVqXpWlWvj6sUOrzmc7olP05vBPe63nMeVZrzMeSOxuEVez7zhfdTWKxgodwCGu2LUc+WpHWRqxLj7Q= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QEPNcEYYi3k30vxKLw/w7da1LXQmWVqXpWlWvj6sUOrzmc7olP05vBPe63nMeVZrzMeSOxuEVez7zhfdTWKxgodwCGu2LUc+WpHWRqxLj7Q=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QEPNcEYYi3k30vxKLw/w7da1LXQmWVqXpWlWvj6sUOrzmc7olP05vBPe63nMeVZrzMeSOxuEVez7zhfdTWKxgodwCGu2LUc+WpHWRqxLj7Q=]

name: Team McBride
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Thank you.
#
We’re so proud to share this news:
**Thanks to hundreds of grassroots supporters like you, we reached our $20,000 goal for April.**
Your support means more than a number on a budget spreadsheet. It means we can keep running a people-powered campaign year-round – not just in the final stretch of an election.
It means we can keep organizing, communicating with voters up and down the First State, and building the kind of coalition that can meet this moment.
And it means that Sarah can stay focused on what really matters: holding Donald Trump and the majority party in the House accountable, and delivering for the people of Delaware.
Whether it's lowering costs and protecting consumers, or defending our democracy and our health care, your donations give Sarah the resources to do the work.
_We’re so grateful to have you on Team McBride._
Thank you,
– Team McBride
[**P.S. If you’d like to give Sarah the resources she needs to take on the big fights in May and beyond, please pitch in now – but know that just being part of this grassroots movement makes all the difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250501-1?refcode=em20250501-1958&refcode2=1958_21716_rIE4Dp&akid=1958%2E21716%2ErIE4Dp)

### It's the difference between a first and second rate schmooze
May 1
---

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b7ef984-6e4c-4443-97df-ede3b7cb76a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I recently attended the "new media" White House correspondents' dinner. It was "black tie," so naturally I wore a Hawaiian shirt and a black bowtie that I acquired morning of for ten dollars from a thrift store up the street. Of the hundreds of males in there, by my eyes I was the only one not wearing a tux. _"New Media" my tookas!_ I thought. I conversed with OLD media regulars like Molly Jong Fast and Mehdi Hasan, and I noticed that while we were talking they were looking around the room to see if there were any social opportunities better than this quack wearing a Hawaiian shirt and a bowtie.
I have been hosting and attending parties in DC for the better part of two decades. I bartended thousands of shifts across the city. And what I learned is that there are two kinds of schmoozers in this world: Those who look you in the eye when they meet you at a party, and those who look around the room for more important people than you.
President Donald Trump falls into the former category. A guy like former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy falls into the latter category.
Senator Bernie Sanders falls into the former category. A gal like former DNC Chair Debbie Wasserman-Shchultz falls into the latter category.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/201250a2-eedf-44b5-b9d1-a3cda59622b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/201250a2-eedf-44b5-b9d1-a3cda59622b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/201250a2-eedf-44b5-b9d1-a3cda59622b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/201250a2-eedf-44b5-b9d1-a3cda59622b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/201250a2-eedf-44b5-b9d1-a3cda59622b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
I know because I have met all these people. And I met them while I was slaving away behind the camera in Washington, so their general perception was that I was a lowly camera man who could give them nothing other than conversation and a shake of the hand. In a world where populism and prevailing over PC, it's the politicians that actually engage in conversation that are winning the day.
One can say what they want about Trump or Bernie, but both of them look you in the eye and, and when they talk to you they make you feel like the most important guy in the room.
Meanwhile, McCarthy and Wasserman-Schultz look around your head, biding their time nodding along to your conversation while they plan the more important person that they should talk to instead.
I have partied with people from across the political spectrum, and in DC a general rule of thumb is that the more power they wield, the less attention they pay to the little guy toiling in the field.
If you haven't been seeking refuge under a rock for the last four months, voters no longer want leaders or newscasters who talk like robots, flashing smiles in public then loathing the common man behind closed doors.
As the digitized discourse brings forth a demand for constant content, it is becoming increasingly apparent who is pandering to powerful special interests and who is paying attention to the people behind the cameras, those who work with their hands and go to work wearing blue collars rather than starched white shirts and pressed suits.
In this brave new world, politicians can no longer hide behind press flacks and podiums. Their success is not measured by polls, but by whether they speak plainly rather than fakely. The era of the canned, corporate BS is over.
That's not to say that MAGA world isn't still rife with grifters and schmoozers of the second class. But when you're at a party, it's easy to tell who's paying attention and a who's not. Now, with this thing called the internet, our leaders are presented up close and personal. I recommend you start paying attention to who's paying attention to you while they're schmoozing and who's not.
* * *

It's the difference between a first and second rate schmooze May 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I recently attended the "new media" White House correspondents' dinner. It was "black tie," so naturally I wore a Hawaiian shirt and a black bowtie that I acquired morning of for ten dollars from a thrift store up the street. Of the hundreds of males in there, by my eyes I was the only one not wearing a tux. "New Media" my tookas! I thought. I conversed with OLD media regulars like Molly Jong Fast and Mehdi Hasan, and I noticed that while we were talking they were looking around the room to see if there were any social opportunities better than this quack wearing a Hawaiian shirt and a bowtie. I have been hosting and attending parties in DC for the better part of two decades. I bartended thousands of shifts across the city. And what I learned is that there are two kinds of schmoozers in this world: Those who look you in the eye when they meet you at a party, and those who look around the room for more important people than you. President Donald Trump falls into the former category. A guy like former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy falls into the latter category. Senator Bernie Sanders falls into the former category. A gal like former DNC Chair Debbie Wasserman-Shchultz falls into the latter category. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here, | | ---|---|--- I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds. And now it looks like history is repeating itself. Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including: • More than 2 million lost jobs • Stocks plummeting over 20% • IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it. That's why I've put together during this downturn. and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. (Continued) I know because I have met all these people. And I met them while I was slaving away behind the camera in Washington, so their general perception was that I was a lowly camera man who could give them nothing other than conversation and a shake of the hand. In a world where populism and prevailing over PC, it's the politicians that actually engage in conversation that are winning the day. One can say what they want about Trump or Bernie, but both of them look you in the eye and, and when they talk to you they make you feel like the most important guy in the room. Meanwhile, McCarthy and Wasserman-Schultz look around your head, biding their time nodding along to your conversation while they plan the more important person that they should talk to instead. I have partied with people from across the political spectrum, and in DC a general rule of thumb is that the more power they wield, the less attention they pay to the little guy toiling in the field. If you haven't been seeking refuge under a rock for the last four months, voters no longer want leaders or newscasters who talk like robots, flashing smiles in public then loathing the common man behind closed doors. As the digitized discourse brings forth a demand for constant content, it is becoming increasingly apparent who is pandering to powerful special interests and who is paying attention to the people behind the cameras, those who work with their hands and go to work wearing blue collars rather than starched white shirts and pressed suits. In this brave new world, politicians can no longer hide behind press flacks and podiums. Their success is not measured by polls, but by whether they speak plainly rather than fakely. The era of the canned, corporate BS is over. That's not to say that MAGA world isn't still rife with grifters and schmoozers of the second class. But when you're at a party, it's easy to tell who's paying attention and a who's not. Now, with this thing called the internet, our leaders are presented up close and personal. I recommend you start paying attention to who's paying attention to you while they're schmoozing and who's not. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Pro-worker, pro-union, pro-Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=270%2E181023%2EtAvBmS)
Team — Unions built the middle class here in Michigan, and as governor, I’ll always defend your right to organize and be heard.
This May Day, I am especially proud to have been endorsed by unions including the Association of Flight Attendants and United Food & Commercial Workers Union Local 951.
I’m committed to making sure every Michigander is safe in the workplace and that every worker — whether in retail, manufacturing, or health care — has their voice heard, earns fair wages and benefits, and is respected.
**_After all, Michigan’s economy should work for the people who power it._**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2505-prounion?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=270%2E181023%2EtAvBmS)
Now more than ever, we need to be empowering workers. In the face of recent tariff announcements, inflation, and rising costs, we need to make sure the hard-working families of Michigan can make ends meet.
I will always be pro-labor, especially as governor of Michigan. **[Show you support the labor movement too by adding your name alongside mine today.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2505-prounion?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=270%2E181023%2EtAvBmS)**

Thank you, and be sure to thank the union members in your life for fighting for better working conditions!
— Jocelyn

**[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/1872?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250501_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=2&akid=270%2E181023%2EtAvBmS)**

name: Sherrod
subject: Help me fight for the people who make this country work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend, every May 1, working folks across the globe come together to mark International Workers’ Day – what we call May Day.
It’s a day to celebrate and honor the labor movement and the folks who fought – and continue to fight – for safer workplaces, fair wages and a thriving middle class.
And this year, it couldn’t come at a more urgent time: Donald Trump, Elon Musk and their billionaire friends are doing everything they can to dismantle unions, strip workers’ rights and prop up a system that only helps the wealthy and well-connected, not hard-working folks.
But I’ve got news for them: American workers built this country and we’re not backing down.
**That’s why I’m reaching out today, friend:[Will you take a moment and add your name to my critical new petition supporting workers’ rights in honor of May Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917345/543028803/-1093264726?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q5MTdjMS1kMjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UzyWltBS6JejrVkDxtxTOK2JfHl0cPe0mBxwSnlcYyM=&emci=eb1e1bc6-0926-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=37d917c1-d226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=18332626)**
| | [Sign To Support Workers' Rights >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917346/543028804/-1093264726?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q5MTdjMS1kMjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UzyWltBS6JejrVkDxtxTOK2JfHl0cPe0mBxwSnlcYyM=&emci=eb1e1bc6-0926-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=37d917c1-d226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=18332626)
---
I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the simple idea that **hard work should pay off for everyone.** That working people should have the power to care for their families, plan for the future, and retire with dignity.
But that’s not the reality for many American workers today. Folks are working harder than ever and still falling behind. That’s why we created the Dignity of Work PAC – to elect candidates who will build an economy where workers have a real voice and aren’t tossed aside because some billionaire wants to buy another yacht.
This May Day, let’s show the world that workers matter. **[Will you stand with me right now and add your voice to the fight for the folks who make this country work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917347/543028805/-1093264726?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q5MTdjMS1kMjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UzyWltBS6JejrVkDxtxTOK2JfHl0cPe0mBxwSnlcYyM=&emci=eb1e1bc6-0926-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=37d917c1-d226-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=18332626)**
In solidarity,

Sherrod
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=8zUwMGwxTTYyMxPOrgjR%2Fv1BISZW96Z48W1MwEnbPizvy5xUwK0ImGTmlLatciuYArYFm%2Bc1BlM24xPYwuvlCf6H%2B1cw65S22uB5zbVoZ15aYiec22n%2BrtL5HyLkXOix4ZjpJ9LIyD6akRUmPXuW7okW8AX%2BBzTdptMu2PmbP0OTGR1EHRN%2FdfRSLYQrzg%2FPrGNpTV2WChXcebiMPYZCnUc%2FDbI4qsXFMkfx9EjKGfoF9DBiu6Qzw%2FhpeqMgO1D9fninnVko2FIqjt0Tc3eCvW1j6QlIHGn3k2Cl%2B8%2FSXKR4sf2KU8WI8hIGL87sPBG%2Bnbm9rzWomNY2T5K9U1qYwkv2ffZyj97uyFm6Cnd7yCOr6ixVyy3b%2F8gIJM9cCQ%2FmsxBR%2BAZEvTzjBcJIhAvWypugrmJXc8q%2FiEf2xK5Yz2uN8Uk7Uvt8NDlNbtoJXQf0) Dignity of Work PAC

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TN003/1/114865/images/Carnegie%20Endorsement.png]
Peter , Since the Dobbs decision, Virginia has become a haven for women seeking abortions from other Southern states. Republicans have attempted to restrict abortion access, but the one-vote Democratic majorities in both houses since 2023 have prevented that.
The primary for the Virginia House of Delegates is on June 17, but early voting begins tomorrow, May 2. There are several critical primary races where Get Out the Vote PAC is actively working to elect the strongest Democrat for the fall.
Peter, GOTV is thrilled to announce Kacey Carnegie as our first primary endorsee for the Virginia House of Delegates. Kacey will represent District 89, which was lost in 2023 by just 521 votes. The incumbent Republican opted not to run, making this a rare open seat that Kamala Harris carried by 3%.
Kacey is a tax lawyer and litigator who presents herself particularly well. She is a wife and parent of two kids and, at 41, has considerable life experience. Her primary opponent is 21.
GOTV has interviewed Kacey and assisted her in hiring her Finance Director, covering his first month's salary.
In addition to GOTV, Kacey is endorsed by the campaign arm of Democrats in the Virginia House because she is the choice most likely to prevail in November.
Peter, can you contribute $25 or more today so GOTV can continue helping Kacey Carnegie ensure that Democrats maintain or expand our current one-vote majority in the Virginia House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05012025&amount=25]

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS) [**BREAKING FROM _THE WALL STREET JOURNAL:_

“Americans Are Claiming Social Security Early, Fearful of Its Future”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=3&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)** **15O,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[Sign now to demand Congress SAVE Social Security →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=4&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)** | [SIGN THE PETITION → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=5&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=6&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)
* * *
It’s with a very heavy heart that we’re reaching out right now.

After just 100 days in office, Donald Trump and Elon Musk have taken a sledgehammer to Americans’ hard-earned Social Security benefits.

Offices are closing. People are fearing when their next check will come. And Elon Musk and Donald Trump DON’T CARE.

**And to make things worse, Congress is working on their updated budget RIGHT NOW ... and Congressional Republicans are planning to GUT Social Security even more to cut Elon a tax break. **

So Senator Bernie Sanders is sounding the alarm...
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=7&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)
He’s SO RIGHT!! But the only chance we have of saving Social Security from Trump’s vicious cuts is if we DEMAND Congress do the right thing and SAVE Social Security...millions of Americans are relying on them!!
**15O,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[Sign now to demand Congress SAVE Social Security →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=8&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)**
[SIGN THE PETITION → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60954?t=9&akid=23031%2E4449941%2ETeCygS)
---
Counting on you,

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, 15O,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED: | It’s with a very heavy heart that we’re reaching out right now. After just 100 days in office, Donald Trump and Elon Musk have taken a sledgehammer to Americans’ hard-earned Social Security benefits. Offices are closing. People are fearing when their next check will come. And Elon Musk and Donald Trump DON’T CARE. And to make things worse, Congress is working on their updated budget RIGHT NOW ... and Congressional Republicans are planning to GUT Social Security even more to cut Elon a tax break. So Senator Bernie Sanders is sounding the alarm... He’s SO RIGHT!! But the only chance we have of saving Social Security from Trump’s vicious cuts is if we DEMAND Congress do the right thing and SAVE Social Security...millions of Americans are relying on them!! 15O,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED: Counting on you, Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. This attack on our fundraising is resounding proof that our movement is resonating with the millions of Americans fed up with the Republican Party’s ineffective and anti-democratic leadership.
We’re committed to driving meaningful change in places like your community by electing Democrats who will fight for working families and against authoritarianism. Our grassroots supporters remain the driving force behind our work, cycle after cycle – we’re relying on this team now more than ever.
**One of the most impactful ways to make your voice heard and stand up to Trumpism in communities like yours is by donating to elect state Democrats nationwide.**

name: Cory Booker
subject: For every Musk, there’s a Martin.
body:
The power of the people is greater than the people in power.

| |
---
Family, For every Musk, there’s a Martin, a Medgar, a Malcolm — and millions of others who will stand for America even when they try to tear it down. I believe we are at another turning point in our country. This is not a partisan moment. This is not a left or right moment. This is a right or wrong moment. It’s time for everyone to stand up, even if your voice shakes. It’s time to stand up, even if your legs are weary. We achieved every great thing in this country because average citizens stood up and said _enough is enough._ They banded together and bonded together — across gender, race, and even party — and said it’s time we unite to bend the arc of the moral universe towards justice. So for all of those people who are weary and tired and worried, who’ve been standing and feel like they can’t stand anymore, it’s time for us to stand up and stand with them. That's what Congresswoman Nellie Pou and I are doing. Standing for health care. Standing for Social Security. Standing for our values. **[Nellie Pou and I need you in this fight with us, friend. If you can, will you split $10 between our campaigns so that we can take on all the fights ahead and elect more Democrats to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917952/543030771/-2129499104?amp;refcode=250502_cb_split_l1&ms=250502_cb_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjg5OGFlMjAtZDUyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MNZRncOcYcwqUh2u247IvrFODI5PaAgVgEhCeC7RKOk=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917964/543030783/-2129499104?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250502_cb_split&ms=250502_cb_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjg5OGFlMjAtZDUyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MNZRncOcYcwqUh2u247IvrFODI5PaAgVgEhCeC7RKOk=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106917966/543030785/-2129499104?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250502_cb_split&ms=250502_cb_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjg5OGFlMjAtZDUyNi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MNZRncOcYcwqUh2u247IvrFODI5PaAgVgEhCeC7RKOk=)

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: some disappointing news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
For the past week we’ve been working toward a very ambitious goal.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)
We have some disappointing news:
For the past week we’ve been working toward a very ambitious goal of bringing in 20,000 grassroots donations in the month of April.
**As of this morning, it looks like we fell *just* short of our goal. 😢**
**[If you’re in a position to contribute, will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us make up that gap and get a head start on our new goal for the month of May?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250501_1_missedgoal?amount=5&refcode=em20250501-1680&refcode2=1680_400544_scBqDU&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)**
Missing one fundraising goal isn’t the end of the world. And with Trump’s chaotic trade policies throwing the whole economy into turmoil, campaign fundraising is down across the board right now.
But if we’re going to build the kind of grassroots movement that can overcome MAGA’s billions and defeat our Republican opponent, **we can’t make a habit of missing our monthly goals.**
And we really do count on your support to meet every goal we set. Deb’s running a grassroots campaign because she’s fighting to make the system work better for New Mexico families – not wealthy insiders and special interests.
**[So if you can, please make a grassroots donation of $5 or any amount to Deb’s campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250501_1_missedgoal?amount=5&refcode=em20250501-1680&refcode2=1680_400544_scBqDU&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250501_1_missedgoal?amount=5&refcode=em20250501-1680&refcode2=1680_400544_scBqDU&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)**
Thank you. Together we can defeat our Republican opponent and change the game for New Mexico.
Be fierce,
Team Deb Haaland
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250501-1&t=2&refcode2=1680_400544_scBqDU&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1680%2E400544%2EscBqDU)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

body:
Help us FLIP Jon Ossoff’s Senate seat and STOP the Left’s impeachment witch hunt. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=406820a56afc49a581c85f94c57a1172&_e=_DtGys5SbXCWy5mnNIfvK9S1CLjX79A2M_PkqOtwslO8RzRmsT-DjUD4nb6nPv0aCyB4YSRAtVAlZ-QvMsph9v3-mTU7lpOqudpHXjCbHiwy-AGs3FISVB91G4od-uWh6_MpUxZsywUf5ueaXDIjUGAyJoOCesOEsk7KcnvJGwJ8rtOj2yPLB13PfCICrRbOvQ5Ii7c6wZwSICeIvRvaa5vvkEoi3BCTw6ZOX5rptQXRzyh-NkBzGh04qIn6fYUIoNhJ-rCl0VMqrX61Vc6ILtkyKOQM2QxhfP-eePCxU2Eb6KQ6A2_fRzOfuF_j-OwxlK5MjvuFvLI_-lByP4z60B4djf3MlATplvjOYsqHRB6l6QAPhxDqMztZ3JEmwoeFxcv414YaqqIri7EnGcCOaldsJ0pLY3qMlI4rAnFG-uDsw1-SCK2SRC6cqH5N3xAGuGIZqLqKU0wwNOI6oOSANw6akcvSlUWzuJcTrATr4Mg%3D)
Fellow American - Jon Ossoff doesn't care anymore:

❌ He voted to keep men in women's sports.
❌ He voted to shut down the government.
❌ Now, he's calling for a THIRD impeachment of President Trump.

His "moderate" act is OVER.

**Jon Ossoff is a full -blown liberal extremist -- and he's one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for re-election.**

subject: Kamala Harris just gave her first major remarks since Trump took office. Here's what she said:
body:
Did you see VP Harris's speech last night? |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106918103/543031444/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE502_20250501_EmergeRR_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWY2NmU3ZS1kNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykLvVMo3YM_K6spBtfp9Azy_KUBvAqrOwnF661sHNOM=) Peter,

Last night, former **Vice President Kamala Harris** shared her first major public remarks since Trump took office — delivering a powerful message of _courage in the face of chaos and fearmongering_. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106918108/543031453/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE502_20250501_EmergeRR_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWY2NmU3ZS1kNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykLvVMo3YM_K6spBtfp9Azy_KUBvAqrOwnF661sHNOM=) **"President Trump and his administration and their allies are counting on the notion that fear can be contagious. They are counting on the notion that if they make some people afraid, it will have a chilling effect on others. But what they're overlooking — what they have overlooked — is that fear is not the only thing that's contagious. Courage is contagious."** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106918109/543031454/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE502_20250501_EmergeRR_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWY2NmU3ZS1kNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykLvVMo3YM_K6spBtfp9Azy_KUBvAqrOwnF661sHNOM=)

clean_body: Did you see VP Harris's speech last night? | = Peter, Last night, former Vice President Kamala Harris shared her first major public remarks since Trump took office — delivering a powerful message of courage in the face of chaos and fearmongering. = "President Trump and his administration and their allies are counting on the notion that fear can be contagious. They are counting on the notion that if they make some people afraid, it will have a chilling effect on others. But what they're overlooking — what they have overlooked — is that fear is not the only thing that's contagious. Courage is contagious." | = Trump and his extremist cronies are trying to scare us into not fighting back. But that's because they're the ones who are afraid. They're afraid of the momentum Democrats are building. They're afraid of the women we’re helping to elect. And they’re afraid of you — because YOU are what’s fueling this fight. ## **MESSAGE FOR Friend:******

President Trump: I’m on Air Force One, just minutes from landing — but I need to ask you something before I touch down.

|
---
| NOW THAT DEMOCRATS HAVE INTRODUCED 7 ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT AGAINST ME, DO YOU STILL STAND WITH TRUMP?
---
|
---
If not, tell me why.
But you’ve always stood by my side, so I know you won’t let me down now!

It was an all-star showcase at President Trump's cabinet meeting yesterday. The 2 hour open meeting shined a light for American people all that has been accomplished within 100 days. President Trump is proving he may have the most transparent cabinet in history especially considering the underreporting the mainstream media with provide on all the Trump wins. Speaking of a huge win that got little reporting, President Trump signed a minerals deal with Ukraine. The deal gives the U.S. access to the lithium, beryllium, manganese, gallium, zirconium, graphite, apatite, fluorite and nickel all found in Ukraine. The agreement signals to Russia that the U.S. is committed to a long-term free, sovereign and prosperous Ukraine. Mike Waltz will be stepping down from his position as National Security Advisor, fallout from leaked Signal messages and Jeffrey Goldberg's sensationalized article in The Atlantic. Kamala Harris is doing speaking engagements again she found inspiration from elephants in an earthquake. Her former running mate, Tim Walz, thinks he's the "white guy code talker," news flash Tim, not a lot of white guys relate to you... at all. It was an incredible week as we celebrated President Trump's first 100 days in office, but like every week, there were some winners and some losers!

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106918695/543033476/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250501thankyou_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjMwYWFhMi1kNzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GM68XpClAKwMWy9YH-3kavA5tIN1MkWQ7ANT5djBSao=) Peter,

I wanted to reach out and thank you for helping me hit my critical April fundraising goal and for your ongoing support. We are fighting in Congress, the courts, and the community to put guardrails on this administration, and I couldn’t do it without you.

Trump has now been in office for just over 100 days, and the impact has been devastating. He is working to tear down our institutions and slash critical programs, destroy our economy, and dismantle our democracy at every turn. We cannot stand for it.

We deserve better, and with you by my side, I promise to continue using my voice, my vote, and my position to protect our nation. Thank you again for your support. In this together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/gnGtc2chzzXMtxtkPdXsuPLf7izdgUdyP0fjyvLqf_v38q5VXfA_N3egMRi1KajmZeRxHJxRhPlPsD594vd2fU3wOjMu88ilfp1Q5O--e97Cf4rF50FBdWmMnJ1QIbp99yWm6LcctcxlhSaLbvBdplPWKKl2pH6eHrX_2r4bthfVdmkpCqixfv3gg-WD7J4JCWB1itefALzT66HyiGTKnxv8GuO75VnPL9HZQJ9KzkmcdbIa3sYDKqIdgN7q7-hmA6Sxc3DbBPrU6yDuBk3yo7I75g1lLHISIrdY-c3RDe1CVYfPAVIW7U6qrMRrWrSYqmXIbGM42XEQLiesgphXUBuouNH_7d8iUBCvIdIr_lhpSWd601cV_WmlncLwzmRXxdeOxCkHRnBR3h6r3NqDKzBlrVq1GJXYWOrmlEQYBjbShNlq5TQRrzQ5on06z24uGkRRhNEDlisWviZlLws/wWTbQQPtwjsRtpdJsAuM4Qxjg0-85v1N/8) Friend, It’s been less than two weeks since we launched this campaign — and I want to take a moment to say **thank you.** Thank you for stepping up. Thank you for believing that Colorado’s 4th District deserves real leadership. Thank you for helping us build something powerful from Day One. In just ten days, we’ve begun laying the groundwork to flip this district and defeat Lauren Boebert. Because of you, we’re already reaching voters in all 21 counties, signing up volunteers, and building the kind of grassroots momentum that Boebert’s money machine can’t match. As a manufacturing engineer, I know progress doesn’t happen overnight. It takes steady effort, a clear plan, and a committed team. That’s exactly what we have — thanks to your support. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/fGi_q3HMY1ALUr702Af72UBgJcBoCILmPYSRzPTUP4TDpTvkIRDO59TNezFHAgATLDbrIroIPWyC_8PYrRv-bW6ePtE1skf90yTz8APtrDT1LyDc1CQMZ6LjtBFMRY2qCT6wSmkU1Mq__AAat8OmKahf_zbWUpw9SzYDHfpz6lcAlsdPu65mTLMNL13c-eS7OWter1KET8JYH1jhWO8xYe5Qw6zN2MHHYstv2IweQYSrVxN-jl4KMOdxgt5MxrF8Um2tMLQSoO9nU-NfM4H7Ud6UWQX_fYkmrl0kfkisSQTJPCnt36ChpPixALAfSU75Wmdpp_HC8bySiLT4a7X8IjcTAa5PyxOT-Rcyjqahy7jezWy7Ik4fgIeIvvh1Zl1_e4z3uafGZrUlhJlmzSUsM9krbq6lZ3g7ukNuwzqg7dz4Yw6n1CZBcd1Ht2dRMmOYbstrtg015eolBASCgs4/O8_6kVwn84RiBwvhrXiBGyj2TLJ4Rsnd/8) There’s a long road ahead, but we’re off to a strong start. And with you in this fight, I know we can win. I’m grateful to have you on my team. John Padora

subject: Trump to waste $92 million on WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Defunding Social Security, Funding a Military Parade...
| **BREAKING: Trump spending MILLIONS on Military Parade...** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m) Look, Congress can STOP this RIDICULOUS waste of money and time — _but not without a lot of pressure from engaged taxpayers like you:_ | [**Let us know: Should Trump be allowed to spend federal and local taxpayer dollars on a military parade in honor of himself while gutting Social Security and other critical social safety nets? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m) | [NO WAY, HE’S NOT A DICTATOR! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m)
---
[YES, HE CAN DO WHAT HE WANTS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-poll/?source=VPP_20250501_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=19717%2E878179%2EfAfx7m)
**We need 500 responses by midnight.**
_We’re appalled._

Saving Social Security? _Too expensive._ ❌
Funding the Department of Education? _Can’t swing it._ ❌
Protecting Medicare and Medicaid? _Not worth it._ ❌
**Spending $92 MILLION on a Military Parade for Trump?_No biggie!_** ✅

Trump can spend nearly 100 MILLION dollars on a tacky, self-righteous military parade, but wants to __defund__ Social Security or Medicare?

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: Outrageous jury misconduct
body:
My police officer husband was convicted by a BLM jury foreman | | | My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.That's my husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, with our boys in this photo.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnOZ2Sr8LPgE47_l8NWQy_zCLcPCshZroG49J9NAAed8w_e8tcOEpEK579QZ5JxSsbDpa27h1zMrL82qPirZgedUEBVRmXst1qqwYJVZ0Oyv9yUaJBypN4CT5824oqfa5TqHCvRt1Nn2y1vtLkypezvZ2Ar0oz4bGDZZHZ8Qs4EwYmQ%3D%3D)
---
Right now the New Mexico anti-cop Attorney General and a BLM activist are doing everything they can to put him behind bars. And since I'm told you're a patriotic American who respects our men and women in blue, **[**I'm swallowing my pride and asking you for help to save my husband.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnObU9IGJI_SznzgF5zeym-DA-OnkrfJUchmG6hnV6wTN8kOhuhKSPMXcWVCSgvC1PEaUugJ67ewBo_nzHk_9jP-_mgIX5MRXFh-nldmFv_zuuDIeW-oV3p5yP8vZvsaRpCIlicuvG4GkqLHTTqhiW-gcviXwQPvFpD4O5MfWCGKbhw%3D%3D)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, identified the armed suspect they moved to detain him.But the suspect became violent and tried to disarm his partner, eventually grabbing a taser and pointing it at the prone officer.Brad's training immediately kicked in. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect, and saving his partner's life. Maybe even his own. My husband did nothing wrong. After the episode, his department's internal investigation cleared him.AND the local district attorney was finishing the investigation to do so as well, but the Attorney General of New Mexico -- a woke, anti-cop politician funded by George Soros -- took matters into his own hands and charged Brad with Voluntary Manslaughter. Friend, I was so scared and didn't know who to turn to......the fight for my husband's freedom was going to be costly and I knew we didn't have the necessary funds.But as an answer to our prayers, we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but when he was WRONGFULLY CONVICTED by a jury and sent to prison, they committed to doing whatever it takes to clear Brad's good name.But they can't do it alone. **[**That's why I'm humbly asking you to help LELDF fight for Brad by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or any amount.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnOb2cYpBevQlbwnyD9fZXSecayrYuuW8OSgFUkwPz1ShOB0ipwQ0L9DDef_znpdIcGHgTzdI8EWv7XvCnJbsteSUChGjORDlh9ja8-M500y2tV5zjV5zMjFolgjGkY88_pPU2OJDyyeP9JR7qCUQkYoIQxAug9Gb67BSXYqnmRI3qg%3D%3D)** And thanks to LELDF and Brad's attorney we've discovered the outrageous jury misconduct that occurred behind the scenes.The court not only made a mistake by dismissing and replacing two jurors without reason...But a Black Lives Matter activist neglected to disclose her anti-police bias to get on the jury. Worse, she became the jury foreperson, leading the deliberations and steering the case against Brad. My husband was denied a fair trial and spent 5 weeks in jail before the judge even heard his motion for a new trial!And we're still waiting to learn if there will be a new trial or if we'll have to file an appeal.I'd be lying if I said this entire situation wasn't overwhelming and terrifying. But I know it could be a whole lot worse. I've been to a few police officer funerals. My husband is alive. We can fight this and win.But the battle isn't finished and with six years in prison and no paycheck still hanging over Brad's head...I pray we raise the funds necessary to fight this to the end. **[**Will you please help LELDF fight for my husband -- for my family -- by donating $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnObSVP9kMGyxZhNURinRsbZefbWWHIXwvtl48VOl27rd3wcctfKFpVZYxjyM4nY_VxXWnd8lJeHe3Ty2Vev_9TbkLcaGOfMRjsAXs1Hx8UWF0zPtPUN2ppbH6Ke6gRx82oSDttRrxqLcl_bvvLnLH8qR52ApoiArAMlRohGalcCL8w%3D%3D)** Your generous gift will be put to immediate use helping Brad and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men.If you're able to make a larger contribution, that would be an incredible blessing to our family and so many others.No matter what, please pray for Brad and our family. Our boys are little, and they need their dad. I need my husband.Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. After Brad left the Army and became a cop, he made me one promise -- he would always come home to me. To think he may spend the next six years in prison because he followed his training so that his partner could make it home to his newborn baby. **[**Please help the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund fight for my husband and other wrongly accused officers by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnOaSKjgwXU1CODIeHC0KG66fV-GwKHsyId-ZeiLJ5PQNs2rnjtRE2I7_hjj1hie16djwQnMU8vhvn94qh0y8Wd9etLRS_EtJh1udui4SXMWEcMzbB9az3G1W6427djR7GX2SqPkvaCU9pGdVQP2BE1sO9FuPxdkVXAA15TrMmfYSDw%3D%3D)** Thank you!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4270fe891a7549989465e0f036db043d&_e=-upZDIpWQgVQTjGzRW_AxTbXOC-YfD6mTk24qi-uPKUs-B85wTtBr68opdwLFtUVYA1JO7_3O-dGEbM0ZsPY-kEL8DsPfpdXKZYy3eUkyhzpXI8YvwFYOjj3rdvt9mobmcfDSIItWf_7lFsfULJO3QuHghadhgXQnIMtQXtLcdSom8di_JMMlzgGgTHPsjRTQwcv5C4N9WhgJDWp1m7nyBSIbFqGBJ92SP7WHUkhnOax8ji_bFFfr2YP2ACwWoszzKtEH04iXfWlpZTdD8UqTjra4_pFvhaxrizvQVh2d7gHQ0QuzgURpw1waxZCSZYdJH00f_pUdgM1I3keU_FAUuxDiApBl1MfWjPg-6FA14OHlGotA5unOteRRNFZtdOe6rloL34oUuiqIKiACh8kcQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: Students deserve to be able to focus on their education without worrying about where they will sleep at night.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
Eleni Kounalakis for Governor Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ekg-logomark-min.png]

Peter - Last week, I was honored to join San Francisco State University to celebrate their newest student housing project, adding 700 new affordable beds for students.

Since I joined the CSU Board of Trustees and UC Board of Regents, we have approved almost 50,000 new student housing beds across our state, including this one, which I am proud to have supported from the beginning.

We secured $116 million in state funds and $63 million in CSU systemwide revenue bonds.

We know that housing is the number one issue in California — including for our students. One in 10 students in the CSU system experiences homelessness or housing insecurity. San Francisco is uniquely expensive. In a city as expensive as San Francisco, where building new housing has been notoriously difficult, this project will not only help house more students, but also reduce demand for housing in the city.

Students who receive a Cal Grant can live here at 25% below the market rate. That’s critical for our students who need affordable housing most.

Students deserve to be able to focus on their education without worrying about where they will sleep at night. It’s why projects like this are so important.

It’s also proof that California’s government can work together to do remarkable things. The dorms were finished and open to students in 16 months after the start of construction, with the full project, including a new student health center and dining hall, completed just nine months later.

Let’s be clear, a project like this likely wouldn’t have been possible under the Trump administration’s reckless tariff scheme.

As the world’s fourth-largest economy, California is deeply integrated into the economies of the world. We need to be able to stand up and make sure our state and nation can afford the materials that go into critical projects like this one. I’m running for governor to lead this fight, to stand up for California’s working families and protect affordability.

Best,

Eleni Kounalakis

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eleni-em-apr25

Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
2443 Fillmore Street #300
San Francisco, CA 94115

This email was sent to .
Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vm1adzX1UkmdxnshGX5o5A2?unsubscribedata=8MGq6GTHyhjROulmMHKaZlyDQb8%2FHCJAkCkYR8z2MH3k3c%2FmR59oQ%2FfqoAEu46yWtdVrm2Aq%2B6jR34%2FvoUqMPZPV7uwIFlRlTatEugXNbdDnXGDVuyDjFTtfmpTIXBTc%2FSIxOVTWHeXyUNoSsT247Flq67qxtGLx4p615jH4DP5Rf%2Bl9E098mnm2kVCZ3C992Hggs%2B1fbAGzORvdfNibDewAvg2SV4OabMqXhXXCFQH143%2FHzseGxaVdLTOdy%2B2nxMPWxjYtrCSJsmq1xYPG233AEMIqxun%2B1KCzVgQLwZaAAqvIy9V4%2Baup6Aiz9uSFfClqOP5hWwTpWNNNur%2Bnx4QG60iAWrGlQS%2BapDLIKgMQ3DELrfjRvUEljTa1t%2B6fYz6BLlpB5CYL%2FuIfGyMtjnoXPXEJKFjrXJSfGt12Iadvrzu20eP%2FbE0L%2FtxoYfGS] to unsubscribe.

name: David Hogg
subject: Big news about our future plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Will you help us rebuild the Democratic Party with younger leaders?
| Peter, we have some big news to share:

**Leaders We Deserve is launching a $20 million investment to usher in the next generation of Democrats** who will go to the mat every day for the American people and use every tactic and tool to stop Trump’s radical right-wing, economically illiterate agenda.

[_**Will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight For Progress to help us primary out-of-touch, ineffective Democrats and rebuild the party with the next generation of leaders?**_](https://fight4progress.org/lwd?t=7Bt0C5lUWYRS&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-30_1&amount=25)

Today’s party politics has an unwritten rule on both sides: **If you win a seat, it’s yours for life.** No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture that we have to break.

And while we need to continue to pressure our current leaders to do more, part of the pathway forward requires us to start mounting primary challenges to Democrats in solidly blue districts who are failing to deliver for the people.

Too many elected leaders in the Democratic Party are either unwilling or unable to meet the moment and are asleep at the wheel while Trump is demolishing the economy, challenging the foundations of our democracy, and creating new existential crises for our country by the day.

**Younger leaders simply bring a different level of urgency that we just aren’t seeing in our politics right now.** We grew up with the existential threat of climate change bearing down on us. Adolescence today means active shooter drills and wondering if you’re going to survive math class. And we are told every election is the most important of our lifetime – that we must protect democracy at all costs – all while democracy continues to fail us.

It’s not because democracy can’t work, but because our politicians have failed to make it work for the people, and instead made it work for the special interests destroying our future.

**We can do something about it, Peter. We can ensure that Democrats are fighting for us – or we can replace them with younger leaders who will.**

[_**Can you pitch in $25 now, split between our organizations, to help us power this game-changing fight?**_](https://fight4progress.org/lwd?t=SWHdCqijHPik&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-30_1&amount=25)

Like so many, I care deeply about this party. I want this party to be strong. It’s personal to me. When my father was diagnosed with Parkinson’s almost 15 years ago, the only reason my family stayed afloat was Social Security. And the only reason we were able to get Social Security was because the Democratic Party fought for it.

With all its flaws, the Democratic Party has played a critical role for progress in this country. Revitalizing and rebuilding it is important work. **This party is worth fighting for, and not just for the sake of opposing Trump. What that looks like right now is electing younger leaders who have the energy, passion, and vision to meet this moment with the urgency our country deserves.**

Through all of this, some incumbents will rise to the challenge and emerge stronger. Others will demonstrate why they should be replaced.

**Either way, we all win.**

[_**If you're ready to jumpstart the next generation of Democratic leadership, please donate $25 right now to be split between Leaders We Deserve and Fight For Progress and stand with us in this important fight.**_](https://fight4progress.org/lwd?t=ZiS6o81PxMBo&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-30_1&amount=25)

Thank you for your support,

David Hogg
---
* * *
| | [

](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=3VurLsE3RGSO&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-30_1&amount=25)
---

name: Bryan
subject: Radicals Obstruct ICE; Hundreds Released!
body:
This week we learned that while a Judge was suspended for obstructing ICE, Biden released 600 potential terrorists into the U.S.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a367c4f91e&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 1, 2025**
---
| | | | |
# Our nation is facing a serious challenge and radicals are making it worse.
---
| Just this week, a Milwaukee County judge was [_suspended indefinitely_ ](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=267ff46f58&e=e907534017) after being charged for helping an illegal immigrant — **in court for battery and domestic assault** — evade ICE agents. But this isn’t an isolated case.
Across America, far-left activists and liberal politicians are **obstructing the enforcement of our immigration laws** , even interfering with the arrest of****[**potential gang members**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ce97b6cc7a&e=e907534017). And the consequences are becoming more apparent by the day.
---
| [FIGHT BACK!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=fd96dd2326&e=e907534017)
---
| We just learned just hours ago that the **Biden administration** previously **released**[**600 individuals**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=c1642d8b73&e=e907534017)**with suspected ties to terrorism** into the United States — a betrayal of public safety.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=87253874e0&e=e907534017)
| I’m working with **President Trump** to secure our border and deport violent criminal aliens, but we need to keep WI-01 **Red** to ensure lasting safety!
---
| [SECURE OUR BORDER](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e1b86f3cbb&e=e907534017)
---
| But the Left, funded by**corporate special interests** and **out-of-state dark money** , is trying to buy OUR seat in Congress and take back control. _We’ve seen what they did under**Biden** and we cannot allow them to win!!!_
Together we can ensure the Left never again releases potential terrorists or criminals onto our streets and into our communities.
[_**Can I count on you to stand with me and donate $5 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f9baddb52f&e=e907534017)
---
| [STAND WITH STEIL!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8038c5a13f&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

Did you see Beto on MSNBC?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250501.cPRuQW&refcode=ema20250501-240094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=240094%2E444211%2EdHZ1mc ]MSNBC clip with Trump on and Hegsesth on the left, with a split screen
of Beto on the right. The chyron reads "Now: Trump speaks at cabinet
meeting, blames Biden for GDP decline."

Beto went on the air to explain how Democrats have a choice to make in the
face of this administration’s far-right attacks: We can be the party to
stand and fight, or we can be the party that surrenders.

At Powered by People, we’re choosing to be the party that stands up to
every single attack this administration is pursuing against the people.
Regardless of party, geography, or any other difference between us,
Democrats must be willing to fight back for a better country.

Standing up means talking to our friends, family, and neighbors and
getting them involved today. That’s why Powered by People isn’t waiting
until 2026 or 2028 – we’re helping people who want to save this country
get to work right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250501.cPRuQW&refcode=ema20250501-240094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=240094%2E444211%2EdHZ1mc ]Can you pitch in to fuel our fight today? Your contribution will help
us train Volunteer Deputy Registrars – a title you need to register voters
in Texas – to increase turnout in the next elections.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250501.cPRuQW&refcode=ema20250501-240094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=240094%2E444211%2EdHZ1mc ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Team Powered by People

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: By May 31, Claim your 2025 Hillsdale Benefactor Card
body:
I’d like to send you your new 2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204mjpkwb67q4sjrmlllznbj6qgrhu7uh1n1r8e14xcrzzmyhet44rb19thi1yug49uy04ee74fkuo46eff&__stmp=svlt6b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_ | | | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svlt6b&__onlt=h)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'd like to send you your new **2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card**.

This is our way of saying "thank you" for all you do to help us defend "We the People" against out-of-touch bureaucratic despots who reject the principles of the American Founding.
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svlt6b&__onlt=h) **Your generosity helps us to counter a radical agenda in the universities** where bureaucrats are taught, the colleges where activists are trained, and the K-12 schools where children learn that boys can become girls and girls can become boys.

The far-Left wouldn't spend so much time accusing Hillsdale College of being a "danger" to education if our efforts hadn't struck a nerve.

These activists—along with their bureaucrat and legacy media allies—understand that we pose a threat to their anti-American indoctrination plan. One of the ways we are fighting back on the battlefield of education is through our **Project to Revive and Restore Liberty Through Education**.

You're an important part of our efforts, so for a gift of $25 or more, I'd like to send you your**2025 Benefactor Card**.

**Please tell me where you'd like your new card mailed by clicking on this secure link by May 31:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025-benefactor-card](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svlt6b&__onlt=h)**

I'll be blunt: We need your continued support because **we're fighting against a Goliath**.

Not only are these anti-American activists doing everything they can to tear down Western Civilization...

But they are extremely well-funded. They have Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires on their side.

Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to live in freedom and be proud of America's great heritage of liberty.

**We could not accomplish our work without your help.**

Our constitutional system is hanging by a thread...but there are reasons for hope. One of those reasons is you and our work together is more important than ever.

We must never forget that the elite, out-of-touch bureaucrats who enforce the latest Leftist orthodoxy were indoctrinated by anti-American propaganda in our schools and universities. _And we cannot vote them out of office._

**This is why we plan to redouble our efforts in 2025 to engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education—to save our country from the radical ideas that threaten our liberty.**

Our educational outreach goals for 2025 include the following: I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale Benefactor Card** because you understand that we can't just talk about our country's problems—we have to take action. We have to do something while there's still time.

**Hillsdale has been devoted to the defense of liberty since the College's founding in 1844. And we need your help as we prepare to redouble our educational efforts in 2025 to preserve freedom for future generations.**

As you may know, we accomplish all of our work without ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

This independence means that our ability to reach and teach additional millions in this critical year depends entirely on the help of trusted friends like you who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Please show your continued support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or $75—or more—by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025-benefactor-card**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svlt6b&__onlt=h)

Make sure you claim your **2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card** _before_ May 31. Thank you again for your partnership.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
* * **Reaching an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty**. The most widely circulated publication of its kind, Imprimis promotes individual liberty, limited government, free market economics, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense from a constitutional perspective.

* **Teaching citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** We must teach young people about our nation's history and its great heritage of liberty—otherwise, we will not preserve our country! Our free online courses (which you help make possible) have proven to be one of the most effective ways of countering false narratives about America.

* **Leading a movement to restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Far too many children in K-12 classrooms across the country are subjected to critical race theory, transgenderism, and other ideologies destructive of freedom. With your faithful support, we are returning excellence to K-12 education by launching and guiding classical charter and private schools nationwide.

---
| |
---

Please see a special message from our sponsor: | | | | | | Dear Friend, I'd like to send you your new 2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card. This is our way of saying "thank you" for all you do to help us defend "We the People" against out-of-touch bureaucratic despots who reject the principles of the American Founding. Your generosity helps us to counter a radical agenda in the universities where bureaucrats are taught, the colleges where activists are trained, and the K-12 schools where children learn that boys can become girls and girls can become boys. The far-Left wouldn't spend so much time accusing Hillsdale College of being a "danger" to education if our efforts hadn't struck a nerve. These activists—along with their bureaucrat and legacy media allies—understand that we pose a threat to their anti-American indoctrination plan. One of the ways we are fighting back on the battlefield of education is through our Project to Revive and Restore Liberty Through Education. You're an important part of our efforts, so for a gift of $25 or more, I'd like to send you your2025 Benefactor Card. Please tell me where you'd like your new card mailed by clicking on this secure link by May 31: I'll be blunt: We need your continued support because we're fighting against a Goliath. Not only are these anti-American activists doing everything they can to tear down Western Civilization... But they are extremely well-funded. They have Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires on their side. Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to live in freedom and be proud of America's great heritage of liberty. We could not accomplish our work without your help. Our constitutional system is hanging by a thread...but there are reasons for hope. One of those reasons is you and our work together is more important than ever. We must never forget that the elite, out-of-touch bureaucrats who enforce the latest Leftist orthodoxy were indoctrinated by anti-American propaganda in our schools and universities. And we cannot vote them out of office. This is why we plan to redouble our efforts in 2025 to engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education—to save our country from the radical ideas that threaten our liberty. Our educational outreach goals for 2025 include the following: I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale Benefactor Card because you understand that we can't just talk about our country's problems—we have to take action. We have to do something while there's still time. Hillsdale has been devoted to the defense of liberty since the College's founding in 1844. And we need your help as we prepare to redouble our educational efforts in 2025 to preserve freedom for future generations. As you may know, we accomplish all of our work without ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence means that our ability to reach and teach additional millions in this critical year depends entirely on the help of trusted friends like you who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please show your continued support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or $75—or more—by clicking the secure link below: Make sure you claim your 2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card before May 31. Thank you again for your partnership. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reaching an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. The most widely circulated publication of its kind, Imprimis promotes individual liberty, limited government, free market economics, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense from a constitutional perspective. Teaching citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. We must teach young people about our nation's history and its great heritage of liberty—otherwise, we will not preserve our country! Our free online courses (which you help make possible) have proven to be one of the most effective ways of countering false narratives about America. Leading a movement to restore excellence to American K-12 education. Far too many children in K-12 classrooms across the country are subjected to critical race theory, transgenderism, and other ideologies destructive of freedom. With your faithful support, we are returning excellence to K-12 education by launching and guiding classical charter and private schools nationwide. | | To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

Hey Peter, it's Kevin, Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Georgia. Fair warning: This is going to be a long email about Georgia’s upcoming elections and the work we’re doing to turn out the vote, but I hope you’ll stick with me and read on. [If that’s all you need to hear, consider chipping in $10 to the Democratic Party of Georgia today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106919694/543037465/-40001252?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050125_PSC_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI3NDZiOS1kYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ZBskh2ezY-GC5tYlU_Am1YvQikmMV4PNT7oF2wEaUA=) I wanted to extend my sincerest thanks for your support ahead of our April fundraising deadline last night. I know times are tough, and your willingness to support our work to build Democratic power here in the Peach State means more now than ever. Because of you, we hit our April fundraising goal, and I couldn’t be more grateful. **But we can’t afford to slow down now**. Like I said, times are tough. Despite Donald Trump’s promises to lower costs on Day One, he’s seemingly taken every possible action to do the opposite throughout his first 100 days. But here’s the good news: Here in Georgia, we have an opportunity to do something about it on June 17. On that day, we have a critical Special Primary Election for Georgia’s Public Service Commission. If you aren’t familiar with the Public Service Commission, it’s the Commission that determines how high Georgians’ utility bills are. In other words, **the outcome of June’s election will have a direct impact on countless Georgians’ cost of living**. That’s why we’re working day and night to turn out voters and spread the word about this critical Special Primary Election — but we need your help to do it. [Right now, every dollar counts, and every vote counts. Your support — no matter how big or small — will help us reach as many voters as possible over the next 47 days. So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to the Democratic Party of Georgia today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106919695/543037466/-40001252?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050125_PSC_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI3NDZiOS1kYzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ZBskh2ezY-GC5tYlU_Am1YvQikmMV4PNT7oF2wEaUA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Fair warning: This is going to be a long email about Georgia’s upcoming elections and the work we’re doing to turn out the vote, but I hope you’ll stick with me and read on. = I wanted to extend my sincerest thanks for your support ahead of our April fundraising deadline last night. I know times are tough, and your willingness to support our work to build Democratic power here in the Peach State means more now than ever. Because of you, we hit our April fundraising goal, and I couldn’t be more grateful. But we can’t afford to slow down now. Like I said, times are tough. Despite Donald Trump’s promises to lower costs on Day One, he’s seemingly taken every possible action to do the opposite throughout his first 100 days. But here’s the good news: Here in Georgia, we have an opportunity to do something about it on June 17. On that day, we have a critical Special Primary Election for Georgia’s Public Service Commission. If you aren’t familiar with the Public Service Commission, it’s the Commission that determines how high Georgians’ utility bills are. In other words, the outcome of June’s election will have a direct impact on countless Georgians’ cost of living. That’s why we’re working day and night to turn out voters and spread the word about this critical Special Primary Election — but we need your help to do it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you.
