name: Team Jayapal
subject: Solidarity with Seattle union members this May Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It was the perfect day to hit the streets in solidarity with AFT and WFSE members in Seattle.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250501-5003-footer&t=1&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)
Peter,
Today is May Day, which made it the perfect day for Team Jayapal to hit the streets in solidarity with AFT and WFSE members who are opposing furloughs and budget cuts at Seattle Colleges:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250501?refcode=em20250501-5003&amount=3&refcode2=5003_420207_qlcSnJ&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)
**Pramila will never stop fighting on behalf of working families.** Before she was elected to office, she was a longtime organizer for working people who helped make Seattle the first major city in America to pass a $15 minimum wage.
In Congress, Pramila has led the fight to undo decades of anti-worker policies, put power back into workers’ hands, and secure the right to organize for better wages, fair benefits, and a voice on the job.
And with union-busting tactics at some of the country’s biggest corporations on the rise, she’ll continue standing with workers as they organize for a fair deal.
With billionaires like Elon Musk guiding the Trump administration and Republican policies in Congress, things may look bleak right now — but their approval numbers are sinking fast, and _victory is possible if we keep at it._
**In order to win, we need to keep up the pressure and continue building our movement every single day. And since Pramila has never taken a dime from corporations or their PACs, we can’t do it without you, Peter.**
[**This May Day, will you make a grassroots donation of $3 or more to help Pramila keep up the fight for workers in Seattle and across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250501?refcode=em20250501-5003&amount=3&refcode2=5003_420207_qlcSnJ&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250501?amount=3&refcode=em20250501-5003&refcode2=5003_420207_qlcSnJ&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250501-5003-footer&t=2&refcode2=5003_420207_qlcSnJ&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5003%2E420207%2EqlcSnJ)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: 100 reports of corruption in the first 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2536%2E4032634%2EDhjvGH

In order to mark Trump’s first 100 days in
office, I took the liberty of sharing 100 reports of corruption he’s
responsible for.

Take a look below — one example of corruption for every single day he’s
been in office.

I refuse to accept this as our new normal. Americans deserve
accountability. Period. We need to fight back — all of us. That’s what I’m
going to do in the Senate. [ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2993?amount=28&t=1006&akid=2536%2E4032634%2EDhjvGH ]If you’re able to pitch in
$28 or
anything you can, you’ll help strengthen our work to hold this
administration accountable and limit the damage Trump is doing to our
government, our economy, and our democracy.

Count with me now: In just one hundred days, Donald Trump, his family, and
his Administration have:

1. Turned the White House into a Tesla dealership.
2. Fired independent commissioners at the FTC.
3. Punished former officials who opposed his 2020 election lies.
4. Paid for the White House Easter Egg roll by soliciting corporate
sponsors who have business pending with the government.
5. Helped Trump’s son set up a club — pay $500,000 for access to Trump’s
cabinet.
6. Declared that there would be NO tariff exceptions. Then permitted
Apple’s CEO “behind the scenes” access — and poof, iPhone tariffs were
cut.
7. Created an opening for insider trading by reportedly giving Wall Street
exclusive information about trade talks.
8. Hosted million-dollar dinners between Big Pharma CEOs and their
regulator RFK Jr.
9. Launched crypto memecoin right before inauguration to make millions of
dollars, then increased the value of those coins by signing executive
orders making crypto a priority.
10. Launched a meme coin for Melania, too.
11. Promised his "rich-as-hell" donors a giant tax handout, and is working
to deliver.
12. Weakened rules insulating government workers from politics.
13. Limited corporate foreign bribery investigations.
14. Halted enforcement of the Corporate Transparency Act.
15. Offered a private dinner with Trump himself—and a special tour of the
White House—for the top 220 holders of his memecoin, permitting Trump and
his family to profit both from the run up in the value of the coin AND the
increase in trading on the Trump platform.
16. Accepted $40 million for First Lady Melania's documentary from Jeff
Bezos – way above the market rate.
17. Pointed to Bezos’s multi-million-dollar documentary payment as a
model, when Warner Bros. asked Trump's team how to improve its own
relationship with the White House.
18. Struck a deal with Amazon to stream Trump’s old show The Apprentice,
which will mean more money for Trump as Amazon seeks tax breaks and other
federal benefits.
19. Started undermining Medicare’s ability to negotiate drug prices after
Big Pharma companies gave millions to Trump’s inauguration.
20. Filed a meritless lawsuit against 60 Minutes and launched a baseless
FCC investigation.
21. Tried to get the AP to bend the knee and kicked them out of the White
House briefing room when they refused.
22. Hired Defense Secretary Hegseth’s younger brother to serve in a key
role.
23. Hired a longtime former partner of Don Jr. to serve as Ambassador to
Greece.
24. Nominated Jared Kushner’s father to serve as Ambassador to France.
25. Selected Tiffany Trump’s father-in-law to serve as an adviser.
26. Appointed an oil and gas executive to lead the Department of Energy.
27. Selected a Chief of Staff who was a big-time lobbyist for clients like
tobacco and mining companies.
28. Named officials who had recently lobbied for oil and chemical giants
to help write E-P-A rules.
29. Appointed Mehmet Oz, who has close ties to Medicare Advantage
insurers, to lead CMS to set payment rates and otherwise help out Medicare
Advantage insurers.
30. Appointed John Phelan, a major donor with no military or government
experience, to lead the Navy and hand out Navy construction contracts.
31. Appointed Pam Bondi, a former lobbyist for a federal detention
contractor, to lead the DOJ.
32. Announced the DOJ would stop prioritizing enforcement of restrictions
on foreign lobbyists, under the leadership of Bondi, who herself is a
former foreign lobbyist for Qatar.
33. Appointed Howard Lutnick, who has billions invested in companies
accused of illegally facilitating crypto money laundering, to lead the
Commerce Department.
34. Appointed Marty Makary, the former executive of a company selling
weight-loss drugs, to lead the FDA, which would regulate his company.
35. Appointed Sean Duffy, who lobbied for the airline industry, to
Transportation Secretary.
36. Tapped Pete Hegseth, whose wife owns stock in large defense
contractors, to lead the Defense Department.
37. Tapped Doug Burgum — who made money from leasing land to Big Oil — to
lead the Interior Department.
38. Nominated a Big Oil lobbyist to run the Bureau of Ocean Energy
Management.
39. Nominated as IRS head Billy Long, an aggressive salesman for a
fraud-riddled tax credit, who received donations after being nominated to
clear old campaign debts.
40. Tapped Paul Atkins, a former crypto lobbyist, to lead the SEC.
41. Appointed a former tax lobbyist, to lead tax policy.
42. Appointed RFK Jr., who planned to get paid for anti-vax lawsuits while
heading up HHS.
43. Appointed a top Pentagon official who led a firm investing in defense
contractors and has directed D-O-D to outsource as much as it can.
44. Appointed someone who lobbied to privatize Medicare to lead OMB’s
healthcare budget.
45. Installed Steve Davis to effectively lead DOGE while also leading a
Musk company.
46. Installed another DOGE leader to control the Treasury's payment system
while still holding down his day job as a software CEO.
47. Handed power over crypto policy to a White House crypto czar who leads
a venture capital firm that heavily invests in crypto.
48. Selected a border czar who led a firm that got tens of millions of
dollars of federal contracts for homeland security companies.
49. Appointed Treasury Secretary Bessent who is gutting the IRS so that it
can’t audit rich tax cheats — he’s a tax-dodging mega-millionaire.
50. Pardoned Rod Blagojevich, former Illinois governor convicted for
corruption, after his vocal support for Trump.
51. Pardoned January 6 insurrectionists who tried to overturn an election
he lost.
52. Pardoned a Trump loyalist found guilty of wire fraud.
53. Pardoned the son of a longtime Republican donor.
54. Pardoned a corporation that had been fined $100 million for money
laundering.
55. Launched his own stablecoin while preparing to sign legislation that
will help the stablecoin and let him oversee it.
56. Sold merch with presidential branding.
57. Disbanded DOJ’s crypto unit after business talks between Binance and a
Trump-backed crypto company ramped up.
58. Halted SEC enforcement actions against crypto companies that enriched
Trump.
59. Met with crypto executives who are asking Treasury to back off of
oversight of their companies — all while exploring a deal to list a
Trump-linked crypto company’s new stablecoin.
60. Maintained financial ties between Trump officials and Trump’s media
company. That includes FBI Director Kash Patel, who was gifted a huge
award of Trump media company stock.
61. Nominated Attorney General Bondi who owned $2 million in DJT shares.
62. Paid the Education Secretary almost $1 million in Trump Media company
shares.
63. Intelligence Board nominees who have millions in Trump Media company
shares.
64. Selected a Special Envoy to the Middle East who wants to develop real
estate in Gaza while running his own real estate firm.
65. Appointed an FBI Director who consulted for the Qatari government.
66. Picked that FBI Director even though he also received millions from a
Cayman Island holding company with ties to China.
67. Decided to cancel the Direct File program, which will help the bottom
line of Intuit, which gave $1 million to Trump’s inauguration.
68. Took its largest inauguration donation from a poultry company under
DOJ scrutiny. After the donation, the SEC approved its parent company for
the New York Stock Exchange.
69. Dropped a probe into sexual misconduct allegations against Trump’s
Education Secretary’s husband.
70. Hosted dozens of foreign, federal, and state officials at Mar-a-Lago,
helping enrich Trump.
71. Hosted a GOP retreat at another one of Trump’s resorts.
72. Circumvented the normal contracting process to pick a company with
close ties to Trump’s former campaign manager.
73. Awarded a $30 million ICE contract to Trump insider Peter Thiel.
74. Continued developing new Trump properties overseas, including in Saudi
Arabia and the UAE.
75. Hatched a plan for the State Department to pay Tesla $400 million
dollars.
76. Accepted a $4 million inauguration donation from a GOP megadonor and
nominated him as UK ambassador the same day.

And Donald Trump took actions that could advance the personal interests of
his co-president Elon Musk:

77. Fired EEOC leaders investigating and suing Tesla.
78. Illegally fired the NLRB Chair, which filed a complaint against
SpaceX.
79. Gutted CFPB staff and fired the Director after they investigated
complaints against Musk’s companies.
80. Gutted the Department of Labor office investigating Tesla and Space X.
81. Fired the USAID Inspector General, who launched a probe into satellite
terminals made by Musk’s Starlink.
82. Targeted the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration staff who
were reportedly, quote, a “thorn in Tesla's side.”
83. Said Musk would self-police his conflicts of interest. Yeah, right...
84. Pressured the Administrator of the FAA, which fined Musk’s SpaceX, to
resign.
85. Permitted Musk to keep his financial disclosure hidden. I’ve got a new
bill to fix that!
86. Allowed Musk’s Starlink to start working with the FAA after Musk
criticized the FAA’s air traffic telecom system.
87. Made Musk’s SpaceX the frontrunner for a new lucrative Golden Dome
contract.
88. Stood by Musk when his X executives told an advertising firm to
increase ad revenue — threatening that Musk could interfere with a pending
merger.
89. Permitted Musk to join Trump's interview with the Air Force secretary
nominee while SpaceX held billions of dollars in contracts with the Air
Force.
90. Permitted the National Transportation Safety Board to share news
related to the airplane crashes in Washington and Philadelphia only on
Musk-owned X.
91. Permitted the Social Security Administration to only share important
public communication on X.
92. Dropped DOJ’s anti-discrimination complaint against Musk’s SpaceX.
93. Fired FDA staffers reviewing Elon Musk’s Neuralink clinical trial
applications.
94. Coercing law firms to offer almost $1 billion in free legal work in an
arrangement that experts say could run afoul of anti-bribery laws.

And for our closing six moves that make every bit of this corruption even
harder to root out, Trump got rid of cops on the beat:

95. Fired 18 Inspectors General who make sure the federal agencies follow
the law
96. Fired the head of the Office of Special Counsel who protects
whistleblowers and makes sure that civil service laws are fired.
97. Fired the head of the Office of Government Ethics who watches to see
that the President and his Administration follow the laws on conflicts of
interest, bribery and other ethics issues.
98. Fired DOJ prosecutors who worked on January 6th investigations.
99. Sidelined DOJ’s office that reviews the legality of executive orders.
100. Gutted DOJ’s office that prosecutes misconduct by public officials.

I’m going to do everything in my power and use every tool I’ve got to hold
this administration accountable and root corruption out of our government.
[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2993?t=1007&akid=2536%2E4032634%2EDhjvGH ]Your support makes this critical work possible.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Another roadblock for Trump’s deportation agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
A federal judge just BLOCKED Trump’s use of the Alien Enemies Act
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1625%2E791427%2EZKwTIF)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4245?t=2&akid=1625%2E791427%2EZKwTIF)
Friend — A federal judge just BLOCKED Trump’s use of the Alien Enemies Act, a xenophobic law that punishes immigrant communities without due process.
Trump has been using this wartime law that was enacted over 200 years ago to accuse immigrants (including legal US residents) of being “gang members” without the need to provide evidence and deporting them to a notorious super prison in El Salvador.
This is exactly why I introduced the Neighbors Not Enemies Act: To prevent **_any_** president from using this law to fast track deportations.
While this ruling is a step in the right direction, the Trump administration will almost certainly appeal the decision, and it could go all the way to the Supreme Court.
We must keep up the pressure on Congress, the courts, and this administration to do the right thing and stop these illegal, unconstitutional deportations.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

**Hey! 👋 Before you go:**
Ilhan is just getting her reelection campaign off the ground and she’s counting on her top supporters to help us show that our campaign will be hard to beat.
She’s doing everything she can to take on the Trump administration, so your donation right now helps her focus on staying in the fight instead of raising money. [**Please, make a contribution to our campaign today. Show that you stand with Ilhan and this progressive movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250501-1-60&t=3&akid=1625%2E791427%2EZKwTIF)

subject: Making sure you get a chance to weigh in

Date: Tue, Apr 29, 2025
Subject: Do you approve of Donald Trump’s first 100 days in the White House?
| | |
---|---|---

Friend, this week, we're marking the first 100 days of the second Trump administration, and it seems like every single one of them has been filled with some sort of chaos.
Trump’s tariffs have brought us to the brink of an economic catastrophe. Republicans in Congress are pushing a budget that slashes Medicaid and other social safety net programs. Elon Musk is gutting vital programs that millions rely on. Administration officials are ignoring court orders and attacking core constitutional principles. The list goes on and on.
Yet with Trump threatening to drive us off a cliff, Republican politicians are still refusing to take the steering wheel. That’s why it’s so important for concerned Americans like us to raise our voices – together – and send a clear message that we won’t sit idly by while the country we love plunges into chaos.
**So please, make your voice heard now:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump’s first 100 days in the White House?**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It pains me to announce this…
body:
But the numbers don’t lie.
But the numbers don’t lie.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18942244/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRWdwelJtOEg3cQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDE/LbmNsWWx2dTNMbw/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR1F1N21XSXoza0tscw/gaBP9Nw/s0n3733a16a)

| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Friend,
---
It pains me to announce this...
---
But numbers don’t lie. And __these__ numbers tell a deeply troubling story:
---
[**“House Democratic campaign arm raises $36.9M in first quarter” – _The Hill_**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
The radical Democrats have gone on an all-out fundraising BLITZ over the past few months.
---
_We saw what that meant for the recent special elections where the Left was able to OUTSPEND us in Florida by 1000%!_
---
_And now, I worry what it means for our TOSS-UP majority of just a handful of seats._
---
When the Democrats came for our majority in November, I transferred **$2.5 million** of my own campaign funds to ensure we could protect key battleground races from their massive warchest.
---
But after House Democrats just released their target list of vulnerable Republicans for the midterms (_and with their fundraising haul of nearly $40 MILLION!_), I won’t lie, my personal commitment alone would be a mere drop in the bucket.
---
That’s why at this pivotal moment for our majority, I have no choice but to turn to grassroots conservatives like YOU to take a stand with us.
---
If we fail to act right now, a Democrat majority would freeze President Trump’s agenda in the blink of an eye – and all our hard work would be for _NOTHING_.
---
**So, before tonight’s deadline, I’m calling on _2.5 MILLION PATRIOTS_ to MATCH my 2024 commitment by making a grassroots contribution of any amount to help DEFEND President Trump’s House majority.**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to MATCH my commitment to DEFEND our razor-thin House majority.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Jim Jordan
---

---

---

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Susan Wild 2.0: Obando-Derstine is Wild!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Here we go again!

| | | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=d6a44a2dd1&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=cec0bf17e7&e=5ccada9200)
| **Here we go again.** Today, Susan Wild’s hand-picked candidate to be the Democratic nominee in Pennsylvania’s 7th District announced her campaign, and we all know who’s pulling the strings.**After being rejected by voters** , Susan Wild now wants her very own proxy in Washington who will vote exactly how she wants — someone with no record, no accountability, and no independence. Her goal? To create a puppet candidate that she and her consultants can shape, package, and sell to voters, hoping to avoid getting tied to the failed, far-left agenda that drove up inflation, opened our borders, weakened our foreign policy, and forced divisive mandates on hardworking Americans.**We have the receipts:** Susan Wild sent out a mass text looking specifically for a woman to run and promising her support — and **Carol Obando-Derstine answered the call**. That’s it. She didn’t step forward out of a desire to serve — she just replied to a text. This isn’t public service, it’s a casting call.**Make no mistake:** Carol Obando-Derstine’s campaign is nothing more than an attempt to extend Susan Wild’s political career by proxy. And today, she launched her campaign beside Susan Wild and radical activist Greg Edwards—a clear sign of where she stands politically.**Democratic primary voters now face a stark choice** : Lamont McClure, who prioritizes shielding violent illegal immigrants over supporting law enforcement, or Carol Obando-Derstine, who will serve as a rubber stamp for Susan Wild’s extreme agenda and political machine.While they try to outdo each other on who can lean further to the left,**I’ll stay focused on what really matters—standing with working families and fighting for everyone in the Lehigh Valley.**
Sincerely,
Ryan Mackenzie

name: Raul (personal)
subject: We have the momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=0gxjkou4mfqqZVy%2FdWVJTFBpwqZtUS6wmwrqwpCydUtS8%2BvuQzK%2Bexhbq0Rsjn%2BQQGFhYv5IEFvoKBNFEDjKN2AW4M6fXrR%2Bjw0OuznXaxIb%2FQpkQHKDoexjfVybNbK8A9FnZNZMmnd0%2BtWgJhgdLtizOjHemzUlPdTnNRLEl%2FyIuuYPW2OcLF%2F7RUzlcYwa%2B%2Fv7ZgQX2ShebBZNwj%2FTsUvJhqJj2nqwwjgLWKPUtqf4mT0Pe%2Fe29GkrJmpvUA3rTjOWzMpBA2rYnmc744qZZg420CHFYPv6YogztsTkj0MYPMT5GvLxFEwXefw4Fldjq3CuqBWCUgkYCg2H4Jp7pNYFB3jR65FV2738HUkAF4iR7a2%2FTDuFQhZhCBIGwclmOS2JYuiOjImsZ6nuOQByfkb6DWOdORpLNk417BSoU8F%2BZI5EhAqmuJqt2rENoU%2Bc]

# [#]
It's Raul.

Because of you, we closed out April strong — hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal and sending a clear message: we have the momentum, and we’re not backing down .

CA-25 will be one of Republicans’ top targets this cycle, and it’s a must-win if we’re going to flip the House in 2026 — and, thanks to your support, we took a major step towards making that happen.

We have a long road ahead, but this is exactly the kind of early progress we need to stay on track — to hold the line, scale this campaign, and meet the stakes of next year's election head-on.

Thank you for all your support.

— Raul

P.S. We’ve got a chance to carry this momentum into May. If you’d like to help us start the new month strong, you can chip in here » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-may25?amount=]

DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-may25?amount=]
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] It's Raul. Because of you, we closed out April strong — hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal and sending a clear message: we have the momentum, and we’re not backing down . CA-25 will be one of Republicans’ top targets this cycle, and it’s a must-win if we’re going to flip the House in 2026 — and, thanks to your support, we took a major step towards making that happen. We have a long road ahead, but this is exactly the kind of early progress we need to stay on track — to hold the line, scale this campaign, and meet the stakes of next year's election head-on. Thank you for all your support. — Raul P.S. We’ve got a chance to carry this momentum into May. If you’d like to help us start the new month strong, you can chip in here » [=] DONATE NOW » [=] [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress. name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: Happy Heritage Month! Take Action to Protect our Communities
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
The United States has a rich history of immigration strengthening our country. For generations, the U.S. has been a safe harbor for people across the world looking for a better life for themselves and their families. Our communities have built lives, families, businesses, and neighborhoods here, to the benefit of everyone. Having just fended off one threat to our community, we're now taking on another.
Right now the Trump Administration is attacking the most fundamental values of our country. As you may have seen in the New York Times [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/05/01/us/trump-immigration-deportations-missing.html?unlocked_article_code=1.D08.p8Ld.fuxFvCoD7NiJ&smid=nytcore-android-share] , the U.S. is currently deporting Bhutanese refugees. These are genocide survivors who were invited into our country and are now left stateless - citizens of no country, with nowhere to call home even after they spent years building a life here in the United States. This is all because the Trump Administration decided that this will no longer be a welcoming country. No government should have the power to abduct our neighbors, rip parents from their children, or profit from human suffering. No one should have to live in fear of their families, friends, or neighbors disappearing in the dead of night.
These are members of our communities - our neighbors - who are being taken, often being denied legal counsel and due process as they are ripped away from their families and the lives we have built together. We've been working with our partners Asian Refugees United [https://sites.google.com/view/asianrefugeesunited/home] , which is featured in the article, to protect our communities on the ground in Harrisburg. The Asian American diaspora is large - we come from many different cultures, languages, and stories - but we can unite as one community that stands up for each other - regardless of how or when we got here.
Join us as we bring together our communities. Call your member of Congress today and ask them to stand up for our immigrant communities, including the Bhutanese community in Harrisburg who is demanding answers as to why they're being targeted and how they can bring their loved ones home.
Then, if you want to take one more action today, share this article [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/05/01/us/trump-immigration-deportations-missing.html?unlocked_article_code=1.D08.p8Ld.fuxFvCoD7NiJ&smid=nytcore-android-share] and this take action link [https://secure.everyaction.com/89g1PxoNw066kAM7bHD71g2?contactdata=gs8L0U4rlqNegRlF2+pu+vapTdQftod29pO/+2H0EWvN5BzfRbj13ZW3OEDEk7LbPnrM76tzOF/cM+IlyvsbMS8GX5zIejSSk4yxlQbJKB0QgqYypGLh0AKc6XU56oLsHm9cIqKocUlvM9KcOL4rXrsDM/I8Oa2AsvHR0DR6R7g=] with your friends, your family, and on your social media. Tell the story of the Bhutanese community in Harrisburg and how we need to stand with them. Don't let our people suffer in silence.
Make some noise today [https://secure.everyaction.com/89g1PxoNw066kAM7bHD71g2?contactdata=gs8L0U4rlqNegRlF2+pu+vapTdQftod29pO/+2H0EWvN5BzfRbj13ZW3OEDEk7LbPnrM76tzOF/cM+IlyvsbMS8GX5zIejSSk4yxlQbJKB0QgqYypGLh0AKc6XU56oLsHm9cIqKocUlvM9KcOL4rXrsDM/I8Oa2AsvHR0DR6R7g=]
Happy May Day, and happy Asian Pacific American Heritage Month,
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director
API PA
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania] https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social]
Donate to API PA [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/SxZcLwbmqUib9krCmDRzmw2?unsubscribedata=MJPhEj3bdp5OlDALRPyNK%2FwO%2BTOgmRkeJHLE5mfTCbCTGRZ83pPko%2B7%2BT26OVVkaky35RQ1GYPSElXm6eywZMYfXFOQOANf%2Bx4A7cCVLr1k62Ir7owsFWXBtVO8ZGPX2FIuOkOYS%2B%2FJGsqTkUcnAqElPeKHZ%2FflEQR39L53rRGk%2Bh8xI9CwZhjKdtIT9OlByxrO5Gw8YxL1jndKzT2arnItr4sUijXwAf125G%2Flv69iy3dThqdViLkGZLrboTzQg7w2jNLiTyAHfG8Bd1YHrQ8L%2BrnljqnQN0PYIa6%2F79MrJdpBAZjnxBK%2Bj%2F7eMDGUAmGZrAs2VKXIooN09cbxusMn9p6U%2F8%2BuvRlpJP1qV1BYGSyFZTT0hzkLvcENBwesd0SwrcS1%2BaswEmgx1qrHZu5jrW0DO32xdgfjEgvUHuG4%3D .

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Medicaid is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Congressional Republicans are aiming to dismantle Medicaid — they are looking to cut **$880 billion** over the next 10 years from the program. My Democratic colleagues and I are working our hardest to ensure these crucial services are protected.

**_[Before I tell you more, can you click here to sign our petition in support of Medicaid? We need 500 signatures before tomorrow at midnight to make a stand.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106921157/543042254/910779405?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250501_PT_Medicaid_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Medicaid1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFkYjBhZi1lMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBxdisacpRzDQ_5luyZpmJUQ4rvK5gRC9O3YTT_1eig=&emci=2a1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2d1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2678920)_**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106921158/543042255/910779405?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250501_PT_Medicaid_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Medicaid1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFkYjBhZi1lMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBxdisacpRzDQ_5luyZpmJUQ4rvK5gRC9O3YTT_1eig=&emci=2a1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2d1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2678920)**
Reports from GOP representatives have revealed Congressional Republicans are considering shifting more costs to the states. In several states, that **may result in an end to the Medicaid expansion, leaving many uninsured.**

Drastic cuts to Medicaid and its expansion will have devastating effects on the American people. _Half of American children depend on Medicaid_ for healthcare, along with the elderly and other vulnerable populations. Working families depend on these critical services, and we cannot abandon them.

Instead of protecting American families, Republicans in Congress are providing tax giveaways for those who need it the least. It’s up to us, instead, to fight for these programs. But I need your support.

**_[It’s time to fight back. Add your name to our petition to defend Medicaid and stand up to Congressional Republicans’ incompetence before tomorrow at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106921159/543042256/910779405?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250501_PT_Medicaid_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Medicaid1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFkYjBhZi1lMzI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBxdisacpRzDQ_5luyZpmJUQ4rvK5gRC9O3YTT_1eig=&emci=2a1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2d1db0af-e326-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2678920)_**

Thank you for your support,

Mike Thompson

name: Royce White
subject: They’re not just coming for DOGE — they’re coming for your freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=87bd1632d7784251a6dfb31acae39bc0&_e=-_YayWlcJLI65ok2EwRuA-F65_Q2txirrC-p44TFbAKXBTZueBt35Fv7X09yYwGjZjTS6eW4pIwzKBHgxTpaDNaN1Roh0RC4vXyR5JX-tw3ZN2Zh_wbgHMNwlog8H1U63h2FugzIPBBaGzUOeUcBXkSHCd0LWx0kcDYoZH_QduGyclO7bPZSmfN52YaEMy5_7Er13woWkiZjF9ZHCNjgFDgiCJ9h5jbGVgtimhJAnVPhX4f-MKnp1ltk65hA-yNmuTgeVK43irTdY_iY_qKM6v1fXFDI-tHBD-JGMo-72syqsThKEhz4-kpwyRUKcum7BkCvHuWmFgaWFrnhPZgBQ4E6w8eXmCUieucOxnZCBxWAqVDaD_7n3RbON-_hggKxMpASj3pM18qYHkAgiiBGsj3M2mwXSSaL9NbA3agbDlm3DF0_b0hRPCXcLuW2XPYejIP3Qo8GUYdmxhivoHavyCo9ihlpwdBJpPfdNFT70pW-7rJb52RZI7xbFQLXfQ5Ak_lMBbubeLCETiMlIJlKzFRHQ_U0DcHvR6VdAuCPgU_xOieUCU6GugQwDINxC5lx)
---

Peter,

They think you’ll sit back quietly while they come for your DOGE and your freedom.

They don’t just hate Trump. They hate independence. They hate decentralization.

_**And they hate you for believing you don’t need their permission to live free.**_

Now they’re coming for DOGE — the first shot in their war on digital liberty. **Radical Democrats are coming after the things we love, like freedom and independence.**

They call it a joke. You know it’s a tool for real accountability.

**It’s time to push back.**

[**Chip in $5, $25, $50, or whatever you can — and let's send a shockwave through the swamp.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=87bd1632d7784251a6dfb31acae39bc0&_e=-_YayWlcJLI65ok2EwRuA-F65_Q2txirrC-p44TFbAKXBTZueBt35Fv7X09yYwGjZjTS6eW4pIwzKBHgxTpaDNaN1Roh0RC4vXyR5JX-tw3ZN2Zh_wbgHMNwlog8H1U63h2FugzIPBBaGzUOeUcBXkSHCd0LWx0kcDYoZH_QduGyclO7bPZSmfN52YaEMy5_Klr04lne_-CxuqvVWiwPGMa4p2Nw7fCiQcsW7Fg0R8dVQVGhe8o-HE7KgTpattUgiwdlBHHpkImcc3OicuBdc-GqOoyICx_TR1wm3QFqpeK6cD3ZrAv17kemIEJefqU2ZAcceD4SyynSq5_8gSY0Eve7UFQ_tGbY2IAWlixbMQ3jAIFTmFNqRAM51uA2w1yluO-WcHOM3LRCjQbXvB5-a8UofKng-9yhdkAMBC3IuPoqXVhrR3GfKxui6egGW-ZCodHkRP0F9jO1wnZ_m8qGXrLepUJZWRbLKHvuNkyVeI3mc6lzUdIxstuWhl56XI1D6deXmVdrwtbYcBa_C3_Vl1P8esytIy8_iC7VX3a47n14EhYKR3uSui1Fvwqb002R)
I am running for Senate to fight back against the establishment - to show we won’t be silenced.

| [ **HELP ME FIGHT BACK** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=87bd1632d7784251a6dfb31acae39bc0&_e=-_YayWlcJLI65ok2EwRuA-F65_Q2txirrC-p44TFbAKXBTZueBt35Fv7X09yYwGjZjTS6eW4pIwzKBHgxTpaDNaN1Roh0RC4vXyR5JX-tw3ZN2Zh_wbgHMNwlog8H1U63h2FugzIPBBaGzUOeUcBXkSHCd0LWx0kcDYoZH_QduGyclO7bPZSmfN52YaEMy5_oN-eyA_d9S0TDRsIbUvCxhfPLFyCWta_h8TJQgFyk3K4lZxyA2oMb00ie8iyrFyv5NV1rv3fwIcI6OxmUPa8M1daWSMUp4M2QfCQaSdESk1pWSNor181XAU-JdZIFCmXni3dUTVKCe_2L3TdisVFB-HiSlcp2Xb68ejLtSt9gUiqOZSXkNZSdAl8tpSUa61-yIzYygcY21aip2FuIF6j31Tiv8srC-qoDDxw-S6jUcS9E4abuGCxKrLT1eDA2O6lootiaalFJ6gj-d-PfmnhZn1RM2WtFzrNrvXTDrTyeJttsmtTLWMMoho79tFnCsxAoh_CWqORrY1uw_NzWzAU9BQ4sDwS-adqqfsQx_0kncmBQPYi_Poj9W6OvzmOqTlA)
---

I am fighting for you here, but I can’t do it alone. I will go to the Senate to fight alongside our MAGA majority for less GOVERNMENT BLOAT and against things that try to **CHIP AWAY AT OUR INDEPENDENCE.**

They’ll mock us, censor us, call us extremists — just for demanding what our Founders fought for: the right to live under a small and limited government.

We are $36 TRILLION dollars in debt - the government is poisoned by unelected bureaucrats and career politicians. The elites will do anything to shut this movement down.

But we will show them the power of us.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
The Attorney General refuses to stand by and allow Trump to steamroll our families, our laws, and our democracy.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250501&t=1&akid=1765%2E1088799%2EGR340O)
This is what you see when you do a Google search for Rob:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250501?refcode=em20250501-1765&amount=5&refcode2=1765_1088799_GR340O&akid=1765%2E1088799%2EGR340O)
In the first 100 days of the second Trump presidency, Rob has been busier than ever taking legal action when Trump and his far-right administration break the law to advance their harmful agenda.
**Rob and the state of California have sued the Trump administration 16 times within 14 weeks** — that averages out to _more than one lawsuit per week._
[As he wrote in his recent Substack post](https://open.substack.com/pub/agrobbonta/p/100-days-wheres-the-greatness), “I’m not looking for a fight. In fact, as soon as Trump stops breaking the law and violating the Constitution, I will stop taking him to court. Unfortunately, he has given little reason to believe that will happen anytime soon. Until then, you can be sure that I will be here to hold him accountable when he breaks the law and violates the Constitution.”
**[Rob refuses to stand by and allow Trump to steamroll our families, our laws, and our democracy for the next four years. null, I know this moment is scary.
Jobs here in Michigan are being threatened. Grocery bills are getting higher every month. Everything from cars to housing is more expensive than ever.
Donald Trump is single-handedly causing ALL of this with his reckless and pointless tariffs, and Republicans in the Senate have shown us that they aren’t willing to lift a finger to stop him.
**To truly put an end to Trump’s disastrous agenda, we have to take back the Senate for Democrats, and experts predict that the majority will likely be decided by our race in Michigan.[If you’re as fed up as I am with the chaos, will you chip $5 or more now to help me keep Michigan’s Senate seat blue, flip the Senate, and protect our families from Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106921387/543043133/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjI0Y2Y0Zi1lNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LebDY9O6UCz4T6ccW2s2mXCFnkPRH390yZkJriK0aQk=)**

I’m running to become Michigan’s next senator because I’ve met a moment like this before – I _know_ what it takes to get our economy back on track.
During the Great Recession in 2008, I worked alongside President Obama to save the auto industry and stabilize our economy. In the end, we helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs.
During my time in Congress, I’ve continued to fight like hell for Michigan workers, Michigan jobs, and Michigan families. You better believe I’ll keep doing exactly that in the Senate.
But I’ve got a tough road ahead. _The Cook Political Report_ has already ranked this race as a “Toss Up,” which means the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat. They dumped nearly $80 million into Michigan’s last Senate race, and they could spend even more this time around.
**The only way I can fight back is with your grassroots support. But right now, I’m falling short of my $15,000 daily goal. That’s why I’m counting on your immediate help to close this gap:[Will you pitch in $5 or more today to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate, and stop Donald Trump? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106921392/543043138/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjI0Y2Y0Zi1lNjI2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LebDY9O6UCz4T6ccW2s2mXCFnkPRH390yZkJriK0aQk=)**
I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. Thank you.
Haley Stevens
|

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love.
